name: Jerri Green
subject: Black History is Tennessee History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Green for Governor
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124593818/599095714/-1977837920?refcode=2.2.26_Black_History&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTQwMTc0Yy05MzAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RZRBtEZ4Qe1eRxvAE6cIEJMlacT3sTnH9W4BYglnk1A=&emci=583914e6-5300-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=ce40174c-9300-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=52142494)
---
Dear Friend, **Black History is Tennessee History.** From **Ida B. Wells** ' reporting about lynchings in the South to the education of civil rights leaders like **John Lewis** in Nashville, also known as the "Black Athens of the South". From **Dr. King** 's final speech in Memphis in support of the sanitation workers' strike to the **Clinton 12** who bravely integrated Clinton High School in Clinton, TN. From **Bessie Smith** , known as the "Empress of the Blues" to **Aretha Franklin** , the "Queen of Soul" and a civil rights activist. **Black history, culture, and innovation is the bedrock of what makes Tennessee so special. **_**But today, that history is under attack right here in our state.**_ Right now, there is a coordinated movement to erase this legacy and marginalize Black communities. Extremists have pushed to ban books about Black history, enacted some of the most restrictive voting laws in the country and invest further in systems of mass incarceration that disproportionately impact Black people and communities. **As your next Governor, I won't lead from division—I will lead for every Tennessean.** I won't carry out the GOP campaign to whitewash history and further marginalize. I will lead our state to face our past with honesty and honor the lengths Black leaders have gone to fight for their rights— _and ours._ **_Leading for every Tennessean means fighting for Black communities right here, right now, and building towards a future where every Black Tennessean can grow old and live a thriving life full of the same rights and opportunities afforded to others._** Here's exactly what **my plan is to lift up Black Tennesseans** from Memphis to Mountain City:
### **Fight for livable wages**
Black Tennesseans are more likely to live in poverty than their white peers, with nearly 50% of Black residents in Middle Tennessee, 43% in Knoxville, and 25% of Memphians living at or below the poverty line. ➡️ I will fight to **lift the minimum wages** statewide to at least $20/hr, support businesses and corporations that pay living wages, and **invest in small businesses** in underserved areas.
### **Expand healthcare access**
**** Nearly 10% of Black Tennesseans are uninsured, and are more likely to to have inadequate coverage to get the care they need. Black women also face severe maternal health disparities.**** ➡️ I will work to **expand Medicaid** , **repeal our near-total abortion ban** and restore acccess to reproductive healthcare, and **eliminate medical debt for hundreds of thousands of low-income families on day ONE**.
### **Fully fund public schools & defund the voucher scam**
**** School vouchers harm Black students by exacerbating racial and economic segration—especially by reducing funding for public schools that serve the majority of Black children. ➡️ I will **defund the voucher scheme** in my first budget as Governor and **redistribute that funding back to public schools** , especially those in underserved and rural communities. I will also increase funding for public schools, raise teacher pay, and protect honest, inclusive education.
### **Expand affordable housing**
Housing costs and the overall cost-burden is higher for Black households in Tennessee. ➡️ I will **increase funding for affordable housing **to build more housing across the state for lower-income earners, work to **provide more down-payment assistance **for first-time homebuyers who couldn't otherwise afford to purchase their own homes, and **dedicate TANF funding to eliminating first and last month's deposit for low-income individuals on day ONE **to alleviate barriers to getting housing.
### **Make childcare affordable for all**
Tennesseans are now paying more for childcare than a college tuition, and with more Black Tennesseans earning less—they're likely to spend more of their income on care than white households. ➡️ I will **put down TANF funds to provide stipends for childcare on day ONE** to folks who can't or have trouble affording childcare, create a **stipend program to offer free diapers** to low-income parents, and **invest more in universal Pre-K.**
### **Divest from mass incarceration**
**** Tennessee has the 9th highest incarceration rate in the world—with a disproportionate amount of incarcerated people being Black. ➡️ We will fight t**o end private prisons, legalize marijuana** to end disproportionate arrests of Black people for this nonviolent offense**, and undo harmful and unconstitutional legislation** to criminalize poverty, including by eliminating income as a consideration for bail. **We cannot move toward a better future if we are busy erasing the past.** Tennesseans deserve a Governor who doesn't fear our history, but learns from it. I am running to build a state where justice isn't a luxury and opportunity isn't determined by your zip code or the color of your skin. **Together, we can build a Tennessee that finally lives up to its promise.** In the words Dr. King left us with in Memphis, let us work until**"justice rolls down like waters, and righteousness like a mighty stream."** Onward, **Jerri Green**
Democratic Candidate for Governor
Green For Governor
P.O. Box 40034
Memphis, TN 38174

body:

Peter,

After Michele Tafoya’s open letter in 2022 to President Trump urging him not to run for President in 2024, I wanted to welcome Michele to the Minnesota Republican Primary with an open letter to her.

**[Please read my open letter to Michele below and consider donating to my MAGA Campaign at the end.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=874bc01a8a9340c3b25ea7a74f00dad8&_e=JSqEBVFExr_xPko5gyO10feZQ-9GCBLV1d5PvWztDXFFlbFx6UoxY7OxLNYInDRKZBNM4lID4cvmsElN_vfT2lgJJAKjyRJGLChBiKIYPpVBCz5t5mgJN5AIJqh7Otg5-TV0II4-lQMWDRXRrJbTU0TBVYtatI53xxNmjXHwKx4_vvOPmnxcdy8Kg6siUDOcWWcqCQNmK2UwIwh4qGRNSbmBpZlE6ZD2z8KT8KYc3HMxdXgC2aQqNfMEVFsqsQdfegsYAHMJNbX2-H3WVdviOyDIpGIksDhF6SYK4WYUHBPsZeBNDFCr4uDecim-R3g4yXJ1AL7im6PxeIpawd5lrXYD6TmwnN2_lkTYh9fXjLpWKWm_Yq4MvQ6iWICxClMx6FnCJClkWmTsPXlrdyFFMSJGJp_g0jFKbPLlkky5J8If0IP-6lyG-AGG53sdjVUAo91DOXf-gCUqV4v2FKJDJnrogZ2pNmx7ZzhTu9NE05WD3B44xGOVf5A7eQpQFEJno7_eDaYDE5h47qXJbvA4xhTYLH3MXFM9plUx_O8VCws_wwevJUsJyP3SNWB45i-Z)**

_Dear White Liberal Pretending to be a Republican, Michele Tafoya:

I’m going to take a lot of heat for this, but I would take heat from the RINO Establishment for curing cancer. So here it goes.

Please, check yourself. While I was driving around in a truck with a huge picture of his face on it, you were on your knees begging President Trump not to run again in 2022, saying you didn’t want his “baggage he carries.”

This whole time, you’ve stood on the sidelines, as you’ve said yourself in your announcement video. Now, you want to get on the field and reap the benefits of the hard work that Patriots like President Trump and I have already fought for.

You’re a pathetic RINO who goes whichever way you think the wind is blowing. No backbone. No qualifications. Nothing.

You really think you’re qualified to be a United States Senator? Your whole career was spent on the sidelines watching greater men accomplish greater feats than you could ever imagine.

I’ve seen McDonald’s Managers more qualified to run for Senate than you.

So, on behalf of all real MAGA Patriots, please check yourself.

No amount of RINO Establishment support can help you. If you get to D.C., you’ll be eaten alive by the Radical Left and MAGA. You may think you have opinions now, but you’ll cave into whichever lobbyist donates the most money to your RINO PAC. You’re no better than any other Corrupt RINO who attacks President Trump.

The People Are Coming!

Royce White_

Peter, thank you for reading my open letter to Michele Tafoya.

Your whole career was spent on the sidelines watching greater men accomplish greater feats than you could ever imagine. I’ve seen McDonald’s Managers more qualified to run for Senate than you. So, on behalf of all real MAGA Patriots, please check yourself. No amount of RINO Establishment support can help you. If you get to D.C., you’ll be eaten alive by the Radical Left and MAGA. You may think you have opinions now, but you’ll cave into whichever lobbyist donates the most money to your RINO PAC. You’re no better than any other Corrupt RINO who attacks President Trump. The People Are Coming! Royce White Peter, thank you for reading my open letter to Michele Tafoya. | Thank you, Royce White PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2026 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q1?refcode=x_260202_teargassingprotestors_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q1?refcode=x_260202_teargassingprotestors_act]
Masked ICE agents tear-gassed, attacked, and kidnapped Oregonians while they protested peacefully.
This is an escalation of Trump’s reign of terror on our communities. His agents hide their identities while conducting warrantless and illegal searches and seizures. They attack peaceful protestors. And they’re denying illegally detained individuals access to legal representation, their families, members of Congress, and proper medical care.
As long as Trump’s ICE exists, I will not vote to fund a single dollar. We need to dismantle and defund ICE and all of Kristi Noem’s illegal operations.
I already brought articles of impeachment against Noem, but we need to impeach Trump and dismantle ICE before more Americans are harmed or killed at ICE’s hands.
Congressional Republicans are just a rubber stamp for Trump’s inhumane agenda—they proved they’ll stand in the way of justice, and that’s why we need to build up our base and vote them out.
If you agree that we need to dismantle ICE and impeach Trump, please pitch in $26 today to build a movement to flip the House and Senate. 2026 is the year we can take back the majority and hold the MAGA extremists accountable for their cruelty. name: Scott Wiener
subject: Trump’s anti-science crusade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott WIENER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |

**Peter - science saves lives. But right now, it’s under attack.**

Trump’s anti-science crusade is making people sicker: blocking new vaccines, slashing funding for lifesaving research, and pulling back billions in public health investments.

We’re already seeing the consequences. Measles outbreaks are back. Researchers are being forced to halt promising work. And breakthroughs that could save lives are being delayed or abandoned altogether.

**California doesn’t have to sit back and watch this disaster unfold.**

**That’s why I’m leading a bipartisan effort to put a $23 billion science research bond on the 2026 ballot** \- _and let Californians decide whether our state should step up when Washington won’t._

This bond will protect critical research and keep California at the forefront of scientific discovery. _The best part?_ Drugs developed with this bond must be sold at a discount to Californians, so that families can actually afford them.
**I want to hear from you, Peter. Take this quick, one-click poll:

Do you support California stepping up to defend science and public health?** ** ** | | ******[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124594464/599100093/1879001752?amount=10&refcode=SW_EM_SV_180DO_260202_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDY5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmIwNTNmZS05MzAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QSppdB4Te2mb3FGH790Zf4Tp_LH1Pa9uHoYuH_ZN-V0=)******

---

I’ve been getting the word out wherever I can - including on CNN - because the stakes couldn’t be higher:

“California has long been a global epicenter of scientific research - at the University of California, Stanford, and so many other institutions. California helped create the Internet, high-yield rice that reduced hunger around the world, gene editing, and countless life-saving technologies and treatments. **We want to keep it that way.** ”

Science saves lives. This is how we fight back.

Scott Wiener

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: U.S. state-sanctioned violence has always targeted Black people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We must push back against anti-Black racism together. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWWuEFu0stFP7HnIGGgGefzo9V75OBM6g1PIJ0IO21gO0ZGK9XsczC9c0jXv1cLjQnIIiZWuc9OLb8-rzy9IRaj7zsBrcic_iFie2ZavFN_CQlw_pFJonNufAe_QUAe_ODJF4PeX06YvVv_5aqfjJWb8EY6SmNmGA4e2BcH01W0iac4D_mJXjd1QG7LF9fWhRyiRoZ_iZNn37G9I4fUyeQW2Y-YTppHonuLmV2QYCGIWE/4nu/4mgKV0PKT1mk9vyeW03A6Q/h0/h001.j3XcEyNtaqlqjstn29FQu0Y518CRTWbFDBlMLUSyVLs)
---
Friend, This Black History Month, let’s shine a light on this country’s state-sanctioned violence that has always targeted Black people. Don’t forget about Keith Porter, a father who was killed this New Year’s Eve by an off-duty ICE agent. We must Say His Name when talking about the recent victims of ICE violence. And remember: Trump initially sent federal agents to Minnesota to target Black Somali immigrants. His administration recently stopped processing green card, asylum, and other immigration applications from people in 19 countries—primarily African and Black-majority countries. And he just revoked Haitians’ Temporary Protected Status, endangering 350,000 U.S. residents. Last week his administration arrested six Black Minnesotans in connection with a peaceful protest at a church whose pastor works for ICE. Two journalists and four activists were targeted for exercising their First Amendment rights _and_ for the color of their skin. Trump’s followers also attacked two of my Black colleagues in recent weeks: Reps. Ilhan Omar and Maxwell Frost. Ilhan’s attacker had previously threatened her life, and the person who punched Maxwell said: “We are going to deport you and your kind.” **The criminalization of immigration is rooted in white supremacist ideology about who belongs here. And it’s intertwined with our country’s anti-Black systems of policing and incarceration, which emerged out of slave patrols.** No matter which party is in power, Black immigrants in the U.S. have endured racist policing and over-criminalization—as have Black Americans. In Minneapolis alone, police shot Philando Castile in his car and killed George Floyd on the street. Each year, Congresspeople from both sides of the aisle keep spending more and more of our tax dollars on state violence—such as war abroad and policing and incarceration at home, including immigration enforcement and detention. These systems are all connected. When the 13th Amendment passed, it abolished slavery—“except as punishment for crime.” Now incarceration is a big business, with for-profit prisons exploiting incarcerated people’s labor _and_ getting big government contracts. **Black Americans are deeply familiar with state violence.** About a week ago, Jackie Summers wrote in a social media post: _“For Black people, this country has always been fascist. What’s new is who else is inside the blast radius... Study Black history. Our grief, our joy, and how we organized.”_ **For centuries, Black Americans have been leading resistance movements and movements for collective liberation.** We can look at what happened in response to Fugitive Slave laws, when armed white government agents kidnapped Black people around the country and forced them into slavery. Everyday people came out en masse to defend their neighbors, blocking arrests and physically getting between them and U.S. Marshals. They formed vigilance committees to alert and show up for their neighbors who were at risk. These committees also helped people in the Underground Railroad, providing passage and shelter. To overturn Jim Crow laws, Black Americans in the Civil Rights Movement trained each other and coordinated mass boycotts, during which they provided financial and material support for one another. **Our country has been here before, and we have**** _been_****fighting back. We have blueprints for resisting and for building resilient communities.** For example, the Black Panthers provided free breakfasts for children, which has since been adopted nationwide in schools. They ran free community survival programs such as health clinics, ambulances, legal aid, education, food pantries, housing cooperatives, and more. Ruth Wilson Gilmore, a leader in the ongoing movement for abolition, writes that abolition isn’t just about working toward a world with no prisons, it’s about building life-affirming institutions. She explains that _“abolition's goal is to change how we interact with each other and the planet by putting people over profit, welfare over warfare, and life over death.”_ In Congress I’m pushing to move funding away from state violence—including policing and prisons and immigration enforcement and detention centers—and instead invest those taxpayer dollars into our communities' needs. [**If you agree, please sign our petition demanding Congress support care for our communities over criminalization.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9PVaqzmCTkqXSicnFxIeX5QwWMpV3fNkZ2GJw0F-UAe3vV5GEQkO8pg9NqUVlX3m8dv02Zt7PnJ0nweL86F4XM3anDrPTKa-oFSmYAvKJHi3Tilbb9zUVrBww-mAd3BNU97U1qGoU9xcJrZcssE2HIGiiJgEsnZxyezIYPAFtMC6iJBPlq2A3pxULiQfiFdF4LH-VSknIYIr9n2C5nYPpyxqMKG97kRgmkf5uyISQBR_xSnaUymdkzGR9GpD9ID5fnHTAGl_sBxJoG0XJJUB_QIsPVJbtjB5zk8oAK_sUcFOATbeS6WToeHKEjEiJ49GWJMaR167sJWYnjV5ybX1gY-X-NORs15tQssg6jYllyNWdmpHfcZxZERTyajSJQhvqkN3l_pZXIzIbcaw20KINhK1Zt_9F1I2hwzsG6NoCqovdi8f_ijHsfjMn0uJwLAhXSgxtviLIuymW8f6q7XhHzQ/4nu/4mgKV0PKT1mk9vyeW03A6Q/h1/h001.23xi9G1wkt6pDh-XxdkwJp2G0LSVHHgiBRfSqi-TojI) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9PVaqzmCTkqXSicnFxIeX5QwWMpV3fNkZ2GJw0F-UAe3vV5GEQkO8pg9NqUVlX3m8dv02Zt7PnJ0nweL86F4XM3anDrPTKa-oFSmYAvKJHi3Tilbb9zUVrBww-mAd3BNU97U1qGoU9xcJrZcssE2HIAKXBIiuFHg0CEw47G9MYuoMzCVcois_zU1Q7j5kqEL9Ua2126lz5N1BA2GFtlo-MbV7Jt30FI9Ij7f-_EhRECJ6twYMwhM9HhUKcCzRrmPISadRsLIB4NedAMmEzHMywH0G4WzE2onDGi4FFMdcTdXntISzUHIcUMhEs4mSFZR87x6Kjf3iCsk35X7R6Ke3qYIgr6ZYPDBNHd04g4rgUtikrYJMSPS_u7CWuW8gzet32_VeKBgYqGfdA98kCRfunjN-VU4jPH552PDCKydOzzHJ5HigzYp_Gb7YMLhkDLZ_QlIk6b-lo6q0dxpxcqJRug/4nu/4mgKV0PKT1mk9vyeW03A6Q/h2/h001.pWQBZiYCAyvUeQY4ZVRl4TwaH3P-WNSmGk04i5sq70Q)
---
Many transformative policies have already been introduced to get us closer to this reality, and I’ve been proud to co-sponsor many of them:
* The **_People’s Response Act_** would change our country’s approach to public safety by centering care and healing over punishment, including funding non-carceral and unarmed first responders such as mental health and substance use counselors.
* The **_Break the Cycle of Violence Act_** __ would provide needed resources for non-carceral community-based violence intervention programs.
* The **_People’s Justice Guarantee_** would reduce jail and prison populations, eliminate wealth-based discrimination such as pre-trial cash bail, end solitary confinement and forced labor, and so much more.
* The** _Dignity for Detained Migrants Act_** would end mandatory detention, prohibit family and child detention, end private detention facilities and jails, and assert clear standards for treatment of detained immigrants. The **_New Way Forward Act_** has similarities.
* The **_Dismantle Mass Incarceration for Public Health Act_** , which I introduced, would release people in ICE detention, people who haven’t yet been convicted, people who are pregnant, seniors, people nearing the end of their sentences, and more.
* The** _Justice For All Act_** , which I’ve introduced, would end qualified immunity for government employees and strengthen civil rights protections against discrimination—including prohibiting racial profiling in police investigations and activity.
* The **_Melt ICE Act_** would strip funding from detention and surveillance and redirect those resources into health care, housing, and real community safety.

More pieces of legislation are listed on our petition page.
[**Please add your name if you want to see Congress pass some of these transformative policies.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9PVaqzmCTkqXSicnFxIeX5QwWMpV3fNkZ2GJw0F-UAe3vV5GEQkO8pg9NqUVlX3m8dv02Zt7PnJ0nweL86F4XM3anDrPTKa-oFSmYAvKJHi3Tilbb9zUVrBww-mAd3BNU97U1qGoU9xcJrZcssE2HIOGr1jBSQNnvwAFvJecs-eeT5gF5HND2J1BkG_0wvt24aWyFyaEWVNiGrVifihZud6dY4xiXymMuR7pQVVINFmuAB_Zy7rKXwjHttnca6zNhBfrllhetU8NYEJ_zPSn6XLBub0plbqCRmgDcTpMBYZnzU4JhI9pGWGbvtUi56TPrks1jBrvp9a2cuh3zM7BfvjtBwigA3dEm7j2XJPhf9sUrhKBlYEsHpMggX0G4DBjDCwV-GzGmaqpQa7NGS8yZVQqNxA8mHn5YHD5e60k2lVdWP4J3XYdc_N2a_2QbO88d68AuAjnG20M50i4nclF3Qw/4nu/4mgKV0PKT1mk9vyeW03A6Q/h3/h001.AcsNLkfLeVz0XGFpxI71A5koxrEW2p_lX93AV9T_hwY)
Black movement leaders created Black Futures Month to celebrate not only Black history but also to honor the ongoing work for a liberated future, where all Black people are free and thriving.
Together, we’ll keep working toward decriminalizing immigration and poverty, and moving away from criminalization overall. We’ll keep demanding investments in what actually keeps us safe: making sure everyone has what they need to survive and thrive.
With you in the fight,
Rashida

clean_body: We must push back against anti-Black racism together. | | | Friend, This Black History Month, let’s shine a light on this country’s state-sanctioned violence that has always targeted Black people. Don’t forget about Keith Porter, a father who was killed this New Year’s Eve by an off-duty ICE agent. We must Say His Name when talking about the recent victims of ICE violence. And remember: Trump initially sent federal agents to Minnesota to target Black Somali immigrants. His administration recently stopped processing green card, asylum, and other immigration applications from people in 19 countries—primarily African and Black-majority countries. And he just revoked Haitians’ Temporary Protected Status, endangering 350,000 U.S. residents. Last week his administration arrested six Black Minnesotans in connection with a peaceful protest at a church whose pastor works for ICE. Two journalists and four activists were targeted for exercising their First Amendment rights and for the color of their skin. Trump’s followers also attacked two of my Black colleagues in recent weeks: Reps. Ilhan Omar and Maxwell Frost. Ilhan’s attacker had previously threatened her life, and the person who punched Maxwell said: “We are going to deport you and your kind.” The criminalization of immigration is rooted in white supremacist ideology about who belongs here. And it’s intertwined with our country’s anti-Black systems of policing and incarceration, which emerged out of slave patrols. No matter which party is in power, Black immigrants in the U.S. have endured racist policing and over-criminalization—as have Black Americans. In Minneapolis alone, police shot Philando Castile in his car and killed George Floyd on the street. Each year, Congresspeople from both sides of the aisle keep spending more and more of our tax dollars on state violence—such as war abroad and policing and incarceration at home, including immigration enforcement and detention. These systems are all connected. When the 13th Amendment passed, it abolished slavery—“except as punishment for crime.” Now incarceration is a big business, with for-profit prisons exploiting incarcerated people’s labor and getting big government contracts. Black Americans are deeply familiar with state violence. About a week ago, Jackie Summers wrote in a social media post: “For Black people, this country has always been fascist. What’s new is who else is inside the blast radius... Study Black history. Our grief, our joy, and how we organized.” For centuries, Black Americans have been leading resistance movements and movements for collective liberation. We can look at what happened in response to Fugitive Slave laws, when armed white government agents kidnapped Black people around the country and forced them into slavery. Everyday people came out en masse to defend their neighbors, blocking arrests and physically getting between them and U.S. Marshals. They formed vigilance committees to alert and show up for their neighbors who were at risk. These committees also helped people in the Underground Railroad, providing passage and shelter. To overturn Jim Crow laws, Black Americans in the Civil Rights Movement trained each other and coordinated mass boycotts, during which they provided financial and material support for one another. Our country has been here before, and we have beenfighting back. We have blueprints for resisting and for building resilient communities. For example, the Black Panthers provided free breakfasts for children, which has since been adopted nationwide in schools. They ran free community survival programs such as health clinics, ambulances, legal aid, education, food pantries, housing cooperatives, and more. Ruth Wilson Gilmore, a leader in the ongoing movement for abolition, writes that abolition isn’t just about working toward a world with no prisons, it’s about building life-affirming institutions. She explains that “abolition's goal is to change how we interact with each other and the planet by putting people over profit, welfare over warfare, and life over death.” In Congress I’m pushing to move funding away from state violence—including policing and prisons and immigration enforcement and detention centers—and instead invest those taxpayer dollars into our communities' needs. | Many transformative policies have already been introduced to get us closer to this reality, and I’ve been proud to co-sponsor many of them: The People’s Response Act would change our country’s approach to public safety by centering care and healing over punishment, including funding non-carceral and unarmed first responders such as mental health and substance use counselors. The Break the Cycle of Violence Act would provide needed resources for non-carceral community-based violence intervention programs. The People’s Justice Guarantee would reduce jail and prison populations, eliminate wealth-based discrimination such as pre-trial cash bail, end solitary confinement and forced labor, and so much more. The Dignity for Detained Migrants Act would end mandatory detention, prohibit family and child detention, end private detention facilities and jails, and assert clear standards for treatment of detained immigrants. The New Way Forward Act has similarities. The Dismantle Mass Incarceration for Public Health Act , which I introduced, would release people in ICE detention, people who haven’t yet been convicted, people who are pregnant, seniors, people nearing the end of their sentences, and more. The Justice For All Act , which I’ve introduced, would end qualified immunity for government employees and strengthen civil rights protections against discrimination—including prohibiting racial profiling in police investigations and activity. The Melt ICE Act would strip funding from detention and surveillance and redirect those resources into health care, housing, and real community safety. More pieces of legislation are listed on our petition page. Black movement leaders created Black Futures Month to celebrate not only Black history but also to honor the ongoing work for a liberated future, where all Black people are free and thriving. Together, we’ll keep working toward decriminalizing immigration and poverty, and moving away from criminalization overall. We’ll keep demanding investments in what actually keeps us safe: making sure everyone has what they need to survive and thrive. With you in the fight, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Barlow For Wyo
subject: Barlow For Wyoming Newsletter
body:
Sharing the Barlow for Governor Message (In every way!)
| | | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_0)
---
| **Welcome to the Barlow for Wyoming Newsletter. Your hub for latest news, information and upcoming events.**
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Sharing the Barlow for Governor Message (in every way)!
---
| Hi friends, I'm headed to Cheyenne at the end of the week, which kicks off around 30 days of steady focus for the budget session. Before I go, I'll continue a whirlwind of radio and newspaper interviews, meet-and-greets, industry tours, and community events across Johnson, Campbell, and Sheridan Counties. I continue to appreciate the hospitality and important conversations in every community I visit. Those who know me and my flip phone understand that I am not the most social media-savvy person, so please know the following request is not a phrase I would typically say. But here goes: CAN YOU LIKE AND SHARE FROM MY SOCIAL MEDIA PAGES? The Barlow for Governor team of staff, advisors, County Chairs, and volunteers work hard to help me get my message out to those I haven't had a chance to meet yet, and we are also relying on the power of the internet to share my travels, policy positions, and even this newsletter across our vast state! Between our website, Facebook and Instagram posts, 'Reels', and upcoming videos, there are a lot of ways to help people connect with the campaign and learn more.

The campaign [website ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_1)offers my background and positions on key topics, as well as a chance to sign up for this newsletter, request a sign, offer an endorsement, or share a note. Please share the website link or info when you hear someone wondering! If you're a social media user, please 'like and share' our posts and reels to your own pages, as well as into public pages where pertinent conversations are happening. This engagement really matters. If you need technical advice about how to do any of this, please let us know. We are excited about our current video reel, where I am endorsed by former Petroleum Association VP John Robitaille, see below. Thank you to John for doing this, and to others who are on deck to be next. Thank you again for your help in using all of the tools in the toolbox to invite others to learn more and join us! \- Eric
---
|
---
| | | **STEM CELL FREEDOM ACT** On behalf of constituents requesting it, I’ve introduced the Stem Cell Freedom Act to give Wyoming patients access to treatments that use their own cells, with clear rules and factual medical oversight. Folks facing tough diagnoses shouldn’t have to sit on the sidelines while promising options work their way through years of red tape.
This isn’t about taking risks or cutting corners. It’s about doing this the right way, with informed consent and high standards of care, and without using any embryonic material. If a patient understands the risks and a doctor is willing to help, Wyoming should make room for that conversation and that chance. Here is a link to the bill: [Stem Cell Freedom Act](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_2)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | ERIC BARLOW IS PRO ENERGY There's a whisper campaign from detractors that wants to portray Eric as not being supportive of oil and gas, and that's just not true.
Oil and gas leaders from around the state are helping us produce videos and letters of endorsement right now to help voters know Eric has been a long-time supporter and policy leader for the energy industry. See former Petroleum Association of Wyoming VP John Robitaille's endorsement video[ here](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_3) When you hear misinformation, combat it with a few facts:
• The Barlow Ranch has worked with oil and gas operators for more than 70 years through leased operations on their land. • During the coalbed methane boom, Eric pushed for practical fixes so development could move forward. • Eric served on a state coalbed methane working group to improve communications between landowners and operators.

---
| | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | IN THE NEWS & ON THE RADIO
Our message is getting out there in a variety of ways, and we're not stopping! Click links for full article.

[WYOFILE ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_4)on JAC cuts: “The short answer is, not like this. The longer answer is that unilateral dismantling by the JAC is short-sighted and leaves us with a forced process for other state agencies to take on duties which they haven’t planned or budgeted for. The Wyoming answer is that you don’t gut-shoot a deer and then expect it to jump in the back of your truck,” [COWBOY STATE DAILY](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_5) on Stem Cell Freedom Act:

“Patient safety in this bill is absolutely paramount. They need to know the risks and potential positive outcomes,” Barlow said. “But I think we’ve got a perfect combination: powerful medicine, the ability to use your own cells for your own healing, and the ability for a doctor to provide that for you.” Radio Shows: [Star Valley Independent Weekday Wake Up with Duke Dance](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_6)

[Cowboy State Daily Morning Show with Jake](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_7)

[What's Up Wyoming ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_8)with Bruce Piven (Kelly joined, too!)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | YAY - SIGNS!! (Sourced in WY)

CAN YOU HELP WITH THE NEXT ORDER??
You've all been patient, and FINALLY, the Barlow for Governor signs are starting to appear across the Wyoming landscape, with strong backing for the Wyoming wind and weather! Many of you have asked for smaller yard signs, which will arrive for distribution this spring.
But, as you know...we have A LOT of land to cover. Can you help with an additional donation to keep the sign printer moving? Click the link below!
---
| | |
---
| | [ HELP WITH SIGN COSTS! ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_9)
---
|
---
| **On The Trail**
---
| |
---
| **ROCK SPRINGS, MOUNTAIN VIEW, EVANSTON, AFTON, KEMMERER, RIVERTON, CASPER**
Kelly and I spent our last weekend of January together in Southwest Wyoming, traveling between Sweetwater and Uinta counties. I traveled on to Lincoln and Fremont counties, while Kelly joined our Wyoming participants at the National 'Make it with Wool' in Reno, NV. Finished the trip with a quick stop in Casper to visit the team at WyldGear. During our travels, we stopped by local businesses and toured Cokeville High School and Riverton’s community hospital project. Along the way, we had meaningful conversations with current and former legislative colleagues, constituents, young professionals, educators and administrators, and business leaders. These discussions covered a wide range of issues from the budget session and rural healthcare to the energy industry, local economic development, career and technical education programs, and what it will take to ensure Wyoming’s young people choose to build their futures here.
In Riverton, I also attended the Select Committee on Tribal Relations meeting. I appreciate the time of both Tribal Business Councils and stakeholders to come together to discuss important topics. Thank you to all our hosts and to Bruce Pivic and Duke Dance for the interviews.
---
|
---
| **Get In The Saddle**
---
| | |
---
| | | | Wyoming’s strength has always come from neighbors pitching in. Join the Barlow For Wyoming team of volunteers who are helping share his message across our state. **🤠 Ride with us — sign up to volunteer!**
---
| | [ VOLUNTEER ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_10)
---
| | | | **Follow Us Online**
---
| [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_11) [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_12) [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_13) [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_14)
---
| No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_15)
Barlow For Wyo P.O. Box 822 Green River, WY 82935 [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KGGDFEV601WSX3VN3Q4EAZ3M_16)
---

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: A Federal Prosecutor Just Called Out Bregman's Lies About Federal Agents
body:
Plus: Don Lemon gets owned on camera | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=7db8a9d6bc&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | | When a county DA goes on national TV threatening to arrest federal agents, someone who's actually been inside a federal courtroom needs to set the record straight. [This week, former federal prosecutor Reeve Swainston did exactly that.](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=707e286a39&e=567664f14c)
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ed2d290812&e=567664f14c)
| |
🔥 **FORMER PROSECUTOR DISMANTLES DA BREGMAN'S ICE THREATS**
Swainston wrote a blistering Albuquerque Journal op-ed. Then he came on our show to go deeper.
There's a specific federal statute — Title 8 USC 1357 — that Bregman is either ignoring or doesn't understand.
Swainston breaks it down in plain English. When you hear what the law actually says, you'll understand why Bregman's threats are legally meaningless — and why they're dangerous.

🚨 **"COMPLIANCE SAVES LIVES"**
New video shows Alex Pretti spitting on ICE agents and kicking their vehicle in Minneapolis. He had a gun on him. Faced zero consequences.
Ten days later, he was dead.
Swainston's argument: If Minneapolis had arrested him that day, he'd likely still be alive.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=7bceed82c6&e=567664f14c)
---
| |

🍋 **DON LEMON CHARGED UNDER FACE ACT
** Don Lemon invaded a church in St. Paul with protesters. Now he's facing federal charges. But that's not even the most embarrassing part. We play you the legendary clip where Lemon claims "a misdemeanor is not a crime" on the streets of Chicago — and a random couple completely owns him on camera.

📚 **TEACHER UNIONS HANDING OUT "HOW TO FIGHT ICE" PAMPHLETS**
You have to see this to believe it. Instruction manuals — distributed to students — that literally acknowledge "some of these acts may constitute a crime." Who's funding this? Swainston has thoughts.

👮 **THE 55 GANGS VIDEO**
A candidate for mayor in Long Beach posted a video calling all 55 gangs to meet him at City Hall. His goal? Fight federal law enforcement.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b0f3a3d086&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---

clean_body: Plus: Don Lemon gets owned on camera | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | | | | | | | | | When a county DA goes on national TV threatening to arrest federal agents, someone who's actually been inside a federal courtroom needs to set the record straight. | | 🔥 FORMER PROSECUTOR DISMANTLES DA BREGMAN'S ICE THREATS Swainston wrote a blistering Albuquerque Journal op-ed. Then he came on our show to go deeper. There's a specific federal statute — Title 8 USC 1357 — that Bregman is either ignoring or doesn't understand. Swainston breaks it down in plain English. When you hear what the law actually says, you'll understand why Bregman's threats are legally meaningless — and why they're dangerous. 🚨 "COMPLIANCE SAVES LIVES" New video shows Alex Pretti spitting on ICE agents and kicking their vehicle in Minneapolis. He had a gun on him. Faced zero consequences. Ten days later, he was dead. Swainston's argument: If Minneapolis had arrested him that day, he'd likely still be alive. | | | 🍋 DON LEMON CHARGED UNDER FACE ACT Don Lemon invaded a church in St. Paul with protesters. Now he's facing federal charges. But that's not even the most embarrassing part. We play you the legendary clip where Lemon claims "a misdemeanor is not a crime" on the streets of Chicago — and a random couple completely owns him on camera. 📚 TEACHER UNIONS HANDING OUT "HOW TO FIGHT ICE" PAMPHLETS You have to see this to believe it. Instruction manuals — distributed to students — that literally acknowledge "some of these acts may constitute a crime." Who's funding this? Swainston has thoughts. 👮 THE 55 GANGS VIDEO A candidate for mayor in Long Beach posted a video calling all 55 gangs to meet him at City Hall. His goal? Fight federal law enforcement. | | | | ✅ LIKE the episode on ✅ SUBSCRIBE to and hit the 🔔 for updates ✅ RATE & REVIEW us on ✅ DONATE to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 Thank you for being part of this community — real talk, real issues, and no spin. Mark & Krysty Ronchetti No Doubt About It Podcast 🎙️ | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | © 2026 Choose Adventure Media. All rights reserved.

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Can you help me pull this off?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I’ve run in a lot of close elections throughout my life

Derek, I promise I’ll keep this short.

I’ve run in a lot of close elections throughout my life. **But this one is unlike any other.**

Here in Pennsylvania, we’ve rejected the chaos, cruelty, and corruption that defines Washington right now. But if we fall short on Election Day? That backwards brand of politics could come straight to our Commonwealth’s front door.

**[Derek, I know we can pull this off as long as folks like you step off the sidelines and get into the game. Can you chip in and help us reach undecided voters all across Pennsylvania?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124594906/599107550/-1395620021?refcode=email_020226_unlikeanyother&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWQ4MzVhYS05NTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OAP3oDo2miPKrSks1sGhJru7v9BkemTpRkmvDfDdNcU=)** I’ve always believed that no race can be taken for granted. Today, that's truer than ever before. **We cannot rest until this fight is won.**

– Josh Shapiro

name: GOTV PAC
subject: The latest FEC reports just dropped… (uh oh)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026]
Peter ,
Democrats have had some big wins in special elections this year, but don’t get too comfortable. New FEC reports are out, and anyone who thinks the midterms are in the bag is sadly dead wrong.
Republicans are heading into this year’s election with nearly a $100 million cash-on-hand advantage over Democrats. The RNC alone is sitting on roughly $95 million, while the DNC only has about $14 million.
But Peter, at GOTV PAC, we’ve never believed you have to outraise your opponent to beat them, but you do have to spend smarter.
That means no bloated consultant contracts siphoning off hundreds of thousands of dollars that should be going directly to voter turnout. We run our Get Out The Vote program in-house to ensure your donation goes further.
It’s a model that works, and it’s why every campaign we backed last November won.
If you can chip in right now – even $20 or $25 – you’ll help us scale the same proven, efficient GOTV operation into the 2026 midterms, exactly where Republicans are trying to buy their wins. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email02022026]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I’m never backing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This weekend, the Washington State GOP responded to my remarks about ICE’s reign of terror. And what they had to say was, frankly, bullsh*t.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260202-5881-footer&t=1&akid=5881%2E420207%2E-7GU2m)
Peter,
This weekend, the Washington State GOP responded to my remarks about ICE’s reign of terror. And what they had to say was, frankly, bullsh*t.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260202.Ao57dt&refcode=em20260202-5881&amount=3&t=2&akid=5881%2E420207%2E-7GU2m)
This kind of dangerous rhetoric undermines the very notion of citizenship, takes an axe to the First Amendment’s protections of free speech, and is the kind of rhetoric that fuels violence — not to mention the fact that it’s an insult to the hundreds of thousands of people I represent here in Seattle.
**But no matter what they say or do, I’m never backing down.**
As a first-generation immigrant myself, I know that what’s happening to immigrants all over the country right now could’ve happened to me. And I won’t stay silent while masked men with guns terrorize our communities across the nation.
[**If you’re with me, please chip in $3 or whatever you can to support my campaign and help me keep fighting to reign in ICE and protect immigrant communities.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260202.Ao57dt&refcode=em20260202-5881&amount=3&t=3&akid=5881%2E420207%2E-7GU2m)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
cover-up confirmed
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124595225/599118231/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2UzMDM1Mi05ODAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7y4oEx3g-f6idIC4pBeQocqEwM11FecAg9hwaIeYWus=)
_**Breaking news about the latest Epstein Files release:**_
**The Department of Justice just admitted it is STILL withholding roughly 50% of the Epstein files after this week’s release — while claiming it has fully complied with the law.**
_That's not what we demanded_
Congress mandated the full release of these files. The DOJ reviewed six million pages and chose to release only half. At the same time, documents mentioning Donald Trump have been quietly taken down and reposted, while survivors’ names were left unredacted.
Let me be very clear: **this is a cover-up.**
Pam Bondi and the Trump DOJ want the public to believe this case is “closed.” It’s not. Our investigation is just getting started — and we know exactly why Trump has been so obsessed with shutting this down.
Right now, my colleagues and I are beginning a thorough review of this limited release, but we are demanding the remaining files. We are demanding the required report to Congress. And we are demanding answers about who ordered these redactions — and why.
**But accountability doesn't happen on its own. **
**[If you believe no one is above the law — not even Donald Trump — I need you with me right now. Chip in today to help us keep the pressure on, force compliance, and expose this cover-up for what it is.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124595226/599118232/-309737922?refcode=260202_RG_DOJ-admits&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2UzMDM1Mi05ODAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7y4oEx3g-f6idIC4pBeQocqEwM11FecAg9hwaIeYWus=)**

In solidarity,
Robert Garcia

name: Team Walz
subject: This isn’t immigration enforcement. It’s intimidation.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
#
Peter,
We want to be clear with you about where things stand.
What’s happening in Minnesota right now isn’t immigration enforcement. It’s a campaign of intimidation and brutality intended to sow chaos across our state.
The Trump administration is seeking political retribution against the people of Minnesota — wielding the power of the federal government and legal threats to put pressure on anyone who won’t fall in line.
Tim is their top target, but he won’t be silenced. He’s going to keep standing up for the people of this state, for due process, for accountability, and for the rule of law — no matter how loud or ugly the attacks get.
But defending Minnesota from this kind of abuse of power comes at a cost. Our legal fees are already mounting, and this fight could drag on longer than any of us want.
**[Will you contribute $5 to our Legal Defense Fund so Tim can focus on defending Minnesota?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20260202.oq_0X2&amount=5&refcode=em20260202-452&t=1&akid=452%2E34582%2E_uH_TJ)**
Thank you,
Team Walz

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_ldf_footer?refcode=tw-em-20260202-452&t=2&refcode2=452_34582__uH_TJ&akid=452%2E34582%2E_uH_TJ)**
---
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=3&akid=452%2E34582%2E_uH_TJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=452%2E34582%2E_uH_TJ)

Prepared and paid for by Walz for Governor
Tim Walz for Governor
P.O. Box 4337
St. Paul MN 55104

**WHO I AM** My name is Chris Dudley. At age 16, I was diagnosed with Type 1 Diabetes. By 22, I would be the __**[_first in NBA history to play with this disease_.](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=e5b0fddd0e3e4707aed4ef6287f49bc5&_e=yJroRGVOnCHfPJhuBDhNa-Br_ctdaqoKRxtKe2KqHdr1-dXncD83HTkcBgfmH_lS5IQC0If35fuxaa-P8OJQgv93IMtcHIhdtvsBNppBP1GHr_mfewf7X0qG55YM1MhCzw69HRbpuU8CwvI7zQvql1mz_FEvZ8yT3tTfzLGfJiD0ClZKMCc-2wqH5JDzw1zLMCAo-buySEGx_idyTjdfHTev18ocsje5PkneH-cH7SjFHCKuGK9O7l1oYM7gkMMpjqO_2ifx7ndejlfjMUZcwC7HxxCF_mRX6F522naFVEX9MutgyWM88pg9IYDEjppLHfQzroiCQqanTiCyq3AI5wxDtS9Wm5o2Y_OnfLkhBjgg7WDWgiLIhFkVQqL-ljXEzuF6dTNxmIZLfIMJ7MWoC8TODyJuQno3nHt6aCJaK42ttN4KACdwvVe_6CjTbWF4eF-Ji2QRvY4P7YMH4PE7q7KhQU3ypjGdIR1Pe4i77eg3tyefFHGvVD2hE5Vj9Pu-t_S1pn8Z-s_AoAW1gTjEqpj9X-5mQkSqJVIsmLH13DuKBi-9DuZLzT3MbbwSoR2Xrjg5ffIslfQQrDO3rU14q2QRHNLeb25uydJLxf4Oq6HeU76Tsilyby2GtG5OKJIRh2m22LEQ2UccOFRhMZqwyrY-pajH6iU63S9auKnpm6o%3D)** ** Since then, I've spent the last 40 years of my life teaching kids with Type 1 Diabetes how to play the game that has given me so much.**

clean_body: Michael Jordan. I battled him on the court. | | | Friend, If you cheered me on during my playing days, thank you. Going pound-for-pound against all-time greats like Michael Jordan was an honor of a lifetime. Winning the big games in front of thousands of fans are memories I 'll never forget. But those hard-fought battles were NOTHING compared to my battle ahead: Will you help me deliver a MAJOR VICTORY for Republicans? With just two minutes of your time, I'd like to tell you: 1) Who I am 2) Why I'm running for Governor 3) How YOU can help me win this critical "jump ball" election Let 's get right into it... WHO I AM My name is Chris Dudley. At age 16, I was diagnosed with Type 1 Diabetes. By 22, I would be the Since then, I've spent the last 40 years of my life teaching kids with Type 1 Diabetes how to play the game that has given me so much. This isn't just about coaching the Xs and Os... This is about showing young Americans - no matter what hand they 're dealt in life - how to overcome adversity and be strong leaders in their communities. And make no mistake; Which brings me to the next part ... WHY I 'M RUNNING FOR GOVERNOR Politicians like Tina Kotek have failed America on: -> Education -> Law & Order -> Ensuring YOUR tax dollars are going to work for YOU Her weak leadership has epitomized the failed policies of Salem politicians that continue to destroy our state. It's time to send Tina Kotek into retirement and elect a new Republican Governor who will: -> Put parents in charge of their child's education -> Empower law enforcement to do their jobs; and -> Root out BILLIONS in taxpayer fraud! They are FURIOUS this election is quickly turning into a 50/50 "jump ball". Will you rally behind my campaign for the win ? HOW YOU CAN HELP ME WIN THIS CRITICAL ELECTION Doorknockers. TV ads. Local rallies and events. These are the bread and butter of winning campaigns. While Tina Kotek collects million-dollar checks from around the country, This is how we dominate the grassroots vote. This is how we grab that "50/50 jump ball" and turn it into a slam dunk for Republicans. But we must get to work right now. The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING they can to STOMP OUT our momentum and defend their "home court" in Oregon. Whether it's smearing my name in the media, attacking me on the campaign trail, or turning out the vote into deep blue cities - I need YOU to fight back with me NOW! I'm setting a 10 minute shot clock on your donation. For America, Chris Dudley Former NBA Basketball Player Republican for Governor (OR) | | PAID FOR DUDLEY FOR OREGON | | 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #395, Happy Valley, OR, 97086 | | Not authorized or endorsed by the National Basketball Association or any of its member teams.

We're barrelling towards one of the most consequential elections of our lifetime and every state marked in red on that map made it harder for eligible voters to cast a ballot. **[Team, this is the fight of our lives. | | Need more facts? **Lawmakers in 47 of our 50 states proposed suppressive legislation in 2025**. More is on the way, with **more than a half-dozen suppressive bills pre-filed in states like Arizona, Virginia, and Missouri** that allow for pre-filing ahead of state legislature sessions. None of that includes bills filed in legislatures that already started sessions in January, either. It's all part of a pattern two decades in the making. **From attacks on mail-in voting to suppressive citizenship proof requirements to legalized partisan election interference** , suppressive state legislators in states across the country are trying their best to harm our fundamental right to vote. Unlike the opponents of voting rights driving these new restrictions with their dark money millions, **we believe that everyone’s voice should be heard and every vote should count**. That's why we need your help to preserve and protect our democracy now. **[Standing up for our fundamental right to vote is the only answer. Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. clean_body: BCJ - State Voting Laws Roundup: 2025 in Review| | | | | This is what we've always been up against: States that execute an agenda of voter suppression, driven by partisan lies. Dark money and decades of work by opponents of voting rights have brought us here. It's scary, and it shows just how far the vote suppressors are willing to go. = | | | = The data is in, Team, and it's not good. 16 states enacted 31 new suppressive anti-voting laws in 2025. According to the nonpartisan Brennan Center, this is the second-highest total since they started tracking voter suppression laws in 2011. Check out this map: Last year, in fact, we told you that the Brennan Center said "states enacted more restrictive voting laws in 2024 than in any year in the last decade except for 2021 ". 2025 just beat that. The implications for the upcoming midterms are huge. We're barrelling towards one of the most consequential elections of our lifetime and every state marked in red on that map made it harder for eligible voters to cast a ballot. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | | Need more facts? Lawmakers in 47 of our 50 states proposed suppressive legislation in 2025. More is on the way, with more than a half-dozen suppressive bills pre-filed in states like Arizona, Virginia, and Missouri that allow for pre-filing ahead of state legislature sessions. None of that includes bills filed in legislatures that already started sessions in January, either. It's all part of a pattern two decades in the making. From attacks on mail-in voting to suppressive citizenship proof requirements to legalized partisan election interference , suppressive state legislators in states across the country are trying their best to harm our fundamental right to vote. Unlike the opponents of voting rights driving these new restrictions with their dark money millions, we believe that everyone’s voice should be heard and every vote should count. That's why we need your help to preserve and protect our democracy now. = | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. = = Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. I missed one of everything while I was deployed: One of every birthday, one of every holiday. Recitals and soccer games.

Hello – whenever someone asks me what the hardest part of being deployed to Afghanistan was, I tell them: _“Little Caesar’s Hot-N-Ready pizza.”_
I missed one of everything while I was deployed: One of every birthday, one of every holiday. Recitals and soccer games. I knew what I had signed up for, but I still missed my husband. I missed our five kids even more.
After I finally returned home to Colorado, we were driving back from church one day when my husband, Chris, suggested we stop and get two of those $5 pizzas from Little Caesar’s.
Sitting at our kitchen table, surrounded by the six most important people to me in the world, I couldn’t help but feel an immense sense of gratitude to finally all be together again, just enjoying a simple meal.
_“Wow,”_ I told my husband. _“This was a great idea.”_
Grabbing another slice, he had no idea that what he said next nearly broke my heart: _“Yeah, we do this all the time.”_
Suddenly, I realized that there were all these little things – these new family traditions – that not only had I not been a part of, not only had I missed, but I had no idea existed. I had sacrificed so much more than I even knew. And it killed me. It still does.
**I am running for Congress against Lauren Boebert because I know what sacrifice means. I know what service looks like. And Lauren Boebert doesn’t have a clue. She is not a patriot. She doesn’t understand our values, our struggles, or what it means to serve. And worst of all: She doesn’t care.**
Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. Together, we can write the final chapter in Lauren Boebert’s embarrassing political career – but I need your help now to do it.
We need to raise another $10,000 before midnight tonight to defeat Lauren Boebert and take back the House for Democrats, but right now, we’re still very short. **If we are going to finally send Lauren Boebert packing and flip this seat blue, I am counting on grassroots donors like you to chip in now to my campaign:**
[**Please, will you make a monthly donation right now – whatever amount you can afford – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats? I am not taking money from corporate PACs, so no amount you can give is too small.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124596335/599138812/156431970?refcode=20260202pm-nd&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTgxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI4MTVhYzYtOWQwMC1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PAu3uwJlBqx1IT3VVW2WQ5lj_gWbboIAitRi4LGBlsU=)

My father and grandfather both served in the Navy. I’ve always felt like service is in my blood. And it would the honor of a lifetime to serve the people of Colorado’s 4th congressional district in Washington.
I am humbled beyond words to have your support on this journey.
Thank you,
Eileen

name: David Hogg
subject: Meet Demi Palecek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Demi Palecek is building one of the largest field programs I've ever seen for a state race.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260202-1&t=1&akid=3112%2E587540%2EYcXJ4e)
Peter,
This is why we do this.
I’m heading to Chicago later this month to support Demi Palecek's campaign for State Representative in Illinois' 13th District, and she’s doing something unique.
Demi is organizing one of the largest field programs of any candidate we’ve worked with for a state legislative race. And she’s doing it in a community that Trump has been terrorizing with his immigration crackdowns — a community desperately needing new leadership _that will actually stand up and fight back._
**[If you want to elect leaders like Demi, will you contribute $5 to Leaders We Deserve?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260202_1_demi.OuOVFR&refcode=em20260202-3112&amount=5&t=2&akid=3112%2E587540%2EYcXJ4e)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260202_1_demi.OuOVFR&amount=5&refcode=em20260202-3112&t=21&akid=3112%2E587540%2EYcXJ4e)**
Demi doesn’t just talk about change — she gets to work and makes it happen. She’s mobilizing her community to take action beyond her campaign. Demi is a member of the Illinois National Guard that protected our Capitol (and our Democracy) in the wake of Jan. 6. She’s lived it, and she understands what’s at stake when defending immigrant rights, ensuring access to healthcare, and fighting for the issues that really matter.
_If you can’t figure out how to help your community, you need to get out of politics and retire._ Demi gets that. She’s the kind of leader who shows up, in and out of uniform, on the campaign trail or at the doors of her neighbors.
**Demi’s ready to help usher in a new generation of young progressive leaders, and so are we.[Will you donate $5 to Leaders We Deserve today to help us elect organizers like Demi who mobilize their communities to fight back?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260202_1_demi.OuOVFR&refcode=em20260202-3112&amount=5&t=22&akid=3112%2E587540%2EYcXJ4e)**
This is one of the most unique campaigns I've ever worked with. I’ll be organizing with Demi in Chicago because this is the work that matters. And she’s here to do the work.
Thank you for your support.
— David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260202-1&t=23&refcode2=3112_587540_YcXJ4e&akid=3112%2E587540%2EYcXJ4e)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=3112%2E587540%2EYcXJ4e)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3112%2E587540%2EYcXJ4e)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Sarah Trone Garriott
subject: I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’m a mom, minister, and Democratic State Senator. Now I’m running to represent Iowa’s Third District in Congress.
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260202-1.mHOuxh&amount=5&%3Brefcode=em20260202-2770&t=1&akid=2770%2E21716%2EDVMUaL)
Hey, my name is Sarah Trone Garriott.
I’m a mom, a minister, and a Democratic State Senator — and I’m used to tackling tough challenges. I’ve stood up time and again for working families, taken on corrupt insiders rigging the system against everyday Iowans, flipped senate districts from red to blue, and now, **I’m running to represent Iowa’s Third District in Congress.**
[**I want to tell you why I’m running for Congress, but if you’re already on board, I’m asking for your support today. Can you split a donation between Congresswoman Sarah McBride and my campaign to help me build a grassroots movement strong enough to flip IA-03 blue? →**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260202-1.mHOuxh&refcode=em20260202-2770&amount=5&t=2&akid=2770%2E21716%2EDVMUaL)
**[Pitch In →](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260202-1.mHOuxh&amount=5&refcode=em20260202-2770&t=3&akid=2770%2E21716%2EDVMUaL)**
Look, our country is facing a critical moment. Political insiders in Washington have slashed vital programs that Iowa families rely on. The administration’s reckless tariffs are sending the economy into chaos. And here in Iowa, we’ve lost some of our most basic civil rights — like reproductive freedom.
**But Republicans in Congress are failing to meet the moment.** Instead, they’re in hiding, _refusing to even meet with their own constituents._ **We deserve better, and that’s why I’m running for Congress:**
I’ll take on the political establishment and stand up for working people in Washington D.C.
I’ll fight to keep the government out of women’s personal healthcare decisions.
And I will do everything in my power to lower costs for families like yours and mine.
This race will be an uphill battle, but I’m no stranger to tough elections. I’ve won three straight races, flipped two districts from red-to-blue, and held onto my seat in the State Senate even as Donald Trump carried Iowa by double digits. **I know how to win in Iowa — _and I always stay true to my values._**
**This will be one of the closest races in the entire country. We have a real shot to flip this seat — _and the House_ — blue. But I cannot do this alone. **
[**I’ve flipped seats from red to blue before, and I know that with your help, we can flip IA-03 and rebuild our Democratic House majority. So, are you with me? clean_body: I’m a mom, minister, and Democratic State Senator. Now I’m running to represent Iowa’s Third District in Congress. Hey, my name is Sarah Trone Garriott. I’m a mom, a minister, and a Democratic State Senator — and I’m used to tackling tough challenges. I’ve stood up time and again for working families, taken on corrupt insiders rigging the system against everyday Iowans, flipped senate districts from red to blue, and now, I’m running to represent Iowa’s Third District in Congress. Look, our country is facing a critical moment. Political insiders in Washington have slashed vital programs that Iowa families rely on. The administration’s reckless tariffs are sending the economy into chaos. And here in Iowa, we’ve lost some of our most basic civil rights — like reproductive freedom. But Republicans in Congress are failing to meet the moment. Instead, they’re in hiding, refusing to even meet with their own constituents. We deserve better, and that’s why I’m running for Congress: I’ll take on the political establishment and stand up for working people in Washington D.C. I’ll fight to keep the government out of women’s personal healthcare decisions. And I will do everything in my power to lower costs for families like yours and mine. This race will be an uphill battle, but I’m no stranger to tough elections. I’ve won three straight races, flipped two districts from red-to-blue, and held onto my seat in the State Senate even as Donald Trump carried Iowa by double digits. I know how to win in Iowa — and I always stay true to my values. This will be one of the closest races in the entire country. We have a real shot to flip this seat — and the House — blue. But I cannot do this alone. Thank you for standing with me. Let’s win this, — Sarah

subject: Not one, but TWO polls
body:
Hear me out, Derek.
---
Derek — is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $20 split between the DNC and my Senate campaign today? [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-brown-split?refcode=em_20260202_5979_fr&amount=20&refcode2=5979_22930333_14r72n&akid=5979%2E22930333%2E14r72n) **[CHIP IN](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-brown-split?refcode=em_20260202_5979_fr&amount=20&refcode2=5979_22930333_14r72n&akid=5979%2E22930333%2E14r72n)** What if I told you that not one, but _two_ polls show me with a slight lead in this race? What if I told you that experts at MSNBC say the Senate is “in play,” and that Ohio is one of the states we must win? name: Oregon GOP
subject: Restoring Law and Order for Oregon’s Small Businesses
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (FEC COMMITTEE ID C00153031)
body:
| | | | Why lawlessness isn’t compassion—and why Oregon must change course
---
---
Dear Patriot,

Oregon’s small businesses have been paying the price for failed leadership for far too long.

In Portland, business owners have endured waves of violence, vandalism, and lawlessness—often with little to no protection from the very leaders sworn to uphold public safety. These are not isolated incidents. They are the predictable result of years of one-party rule that has prioritized ideology over accountability, and chaos over common sense.

One such business owner is Gregg Schumacher, whose family business—Schumacher Furs, established in 1895 and the oldest fur company in America—was forced to close after repeated extremist attacks in downtown Portland.

Regardless of where one stands on the social acceptability of fur, attacks that cause property damage and terrorize business owners are not acceptable forms of protest. No American should lose their livelihood because the rule of law was abandoned.

Recent developments have only heightened those concerns. Oregon National Guard members have since been withdrawn from Portland, increasing uncertainty for businesses that have already endured years of instability and inadequate protection.

For many businesses, the damage is already done. Some have been forced to close their doors. Others are still trying to recover financially, emotionally, and legally.

We are sharing the following external resource for informational purposes only.

It outlines one legal effort aimed at helping business owners who have suffered property damage or financial loss due to public safety failures.
---
[ Download the Restore Law & Order informational flyer (PDF) ](https://u56485850.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.5zzgRGClB3Mh9j4Ybq0XmgkP7N36tR5AwsOVA1rsnq3jUF9EDq-2BKKRin4ifRaq-2B67EWIGdCfV9XpeEi1p8vYZxb-2FS-2FM-2B4AHp7sB-2B1-2FYFJfJYw3mLg7Og-2FG072umLoAOCx6vz_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCKy-2B-2B58EQo9OBZ1DFkEmwuM7vQygzizVvxKmA-2F9J-2FE19DrCJBiChnWEt1YTcce0486aCCtakNmtIV2Bwhjynf9Hi6ChikaWGsW2E-2FoTBQUw63UmajaehyBKPG5hHqolnaERWQcQ5mmGVQ6SWripZk1t4J52r6gnLE5wdPFvOiDiJhyvbNl-2F-2BuNbp7y94591PQrR74QvXMDQ1cSUPkY-2FytKcE9IvXnfJJkt3osk7JUyDYGmmRGHblu1LaV3nWNrzjaL1ZULf8ViVcIMZH0KjOoKrZiKc5Ardd5uosJcvW-2B7GNmSFy-2FP-2BfbOdWti8sXIWG618dpTupYffFtaonr5WLrmww9Va8kh6s2DujN7YDrRAMcVtw1k2sJvE0xaziu5MiLV4gRjyKB-2Fj3XNV-2FOnjMALl-2B8INh3O1ueLLhWQU3nUpP131xi3XWErwMD4n2MkZjlBQz9v3rh8wwJbYWCXgcDfVvI2uIcONjBhOf-2BzxHlod6rq6uEIdBhWk6wG5bYk8FlyQ0eYxtNlUwEVRt5JlzFwpcPtM1jEnVK70Ky19Z1vVwuM9ybckTlM-2FN0SCYfwFjJHW5tATBsPns-2FaKSU5FTbfvkSnS7d5j73ODmDTvw-2F6FOOHi7yQ43n5G2jdo6xLBlC-2B8gVuoIhXtNhZxStID1jH6z3tZFVV92qzH7GbTat7087kmoZOqvUHvRgMpmO0yHKRwxk0fSibWezvdywOkWHR3z8v9cFGqq-2F1BBX-2BLxzbdnR56SPb-2Bc9DxfDNGR8HXyJC-2F7VN0K0jobP9rP3wZnq2dSYVhhy3OjN5MtXZPxk70JBqauxoO6dYquzKSWPIBYoHuFDWTxR1vUY1oV-2BG1jMore3MWug6TFGXlQTEVndnqA-3D-3D)
---
But let’s be clear: lawsuits are not a long-term solution.

The only real solution is changing who is in charge.

That’s why the Oregon Republican Party is laser-focused on rebuilding our statewide infrastructure now—so we are ready to win in 2026 and restore leadership that believes public safety matters, small businesses matter, and lawlessness is not compassion.

This work doesn’t happen on its own. It requires resources, organization, and commitment—especially in a state where the political deck has been stacked against common-sense leadership for years.

If you are tired of watching Oregon slide further in the wrong direction, please consider making a contribution today by clicking the Donate button below.

Oregon can do better—but only if we act.

With hope and resolve,

Connie Whelchel
Chair, Oregon Republican Party

clean_body: | | | | Why lawlessness isn’t compassion—and why Oregon must change course Dear Patriot, Oregon’s small businesses have been paying the price for failed leadership for far too long. In Portland, business owners have endured waves of violence, vandalism, and lawlessness—often with little to no protection from the very leaders sworn to uphold public safety. These are not isolated incidents. They are the predictable result of years of one-party rule that has prioritized ideology over accountability, and chaos over common sense. One such business owner is Gregg Schumacher, whose family business—Schumacher Furs, established in 1895 and the oldest fur company in America—was forced to close after repeated extremist attacks in downtown Portland. Regardless of where one stands on the social acceptability of fur, attacks that cause property damage and terrorize business owners are not acceptable forms of protest. No American should lose their livelihood because the rule of law was abandoned. Recent developments have only heightened those concerns. Oregon National Guard members have since been withdrawn from Portland, increasing uncertainty for businesses that have already endured years of instability and inadequate protection. For many businesses, the damage is already done. Some have been forced to close their doors. Others are still trying to recover financially, emotionally, and legally. We are sharing the following external resource for informational purposes only. It outlines one legal effort aimed at helping business owners who have suffered property damage or financial loss due to public safety failures. But let’s be clear: lawsuits are not a long-term solution. The only real solution is changing who is in charge. That’s why the Oregon Republican Party is laser-focused on rebuilding our statewide infrastructure now—so we are ready to win in 2026 and restore leadership that believes public safety matters, small businesses matter, and lawlessness is not compassion. This work doesn’t happen on its own. It requires resources, organization, and commitment—especially in a state where the political deck has been stacked against common-sense leadership for years. If you are tired of watching Oregon slide further in the wrong direction, please consider making a contribution today by clicking the Donate button below. Oregon can do better—but only if we act. With hope and resolve, Connie Whelchel Chair, Oregon Republican Party External resources are shared for informational purposes only and do not constitute endorsement by the Oregon Republican Party. | Shop our store for other Oregon GOP merchandise to show your support and spread our winning message! | Stay up to date with the latest campaign updates and Oregon news by following us on social media! | | | | | We are dedicated to promoting conservative values, protecting individual freedoms, and building a prosperous future for all Oregonians. From state and local governments to the federal level, we are fighting for a better Oregon – defending parental rights, reducing taxes, ensuring safe communities, and standing against government overreach. | | ↓ CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK ↓ Oregon Republican Party PO Box 1586 Lake Oswego, OR 97035 By participating, you agree to the terms & for recurring autodialed campaign & donation messages from the Oregon Republican Party to the phone number you provide. No consent required to buy. Msg&data rates may apply. | | PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (FEC COMMITTEE ID C00153031) 732 HAWTHORNE AVE. NE, SALEM, OR 97301.
