name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: February 2026
body:
National security activity hasn’t slowed down
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
#### Teichert in the Trenches - February 2026
Welcome to this month’s installment of Teichert in the Trenches, a monthly newsletter highlighting a snippet of my attempts to maximize my impact on people and our great nation and to develop the leaders our nation needs!
I hope you are having a wonderful start to 2026 and a chance to reflect on our nation’s semiquincentennial (my new favorite word). ** _Teichert in the News_**
---
National security activity hasn’t slowed down at the beginning of the year. The following videos provide a sample of key topics from last month, including thoughts on Venezuela, Greenland, and Iran.
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeFuBmP64SPACXkt7Xr7g/2od1y9pGWo5X)
---
In the midst of several national media engagements, I always especially enjoy supporting Maryland media (w/ Patrice Sanders, January 5, Fox45 Baltimore).
* “The key now is to turn what was a dazzling tactical and operational success on Friday into a similarly dazzling strategic success.” The lynchpin to doing so is follow-on governance and a quick transition to a duly elected government in Venezuela.

| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG13EXv1dZJgdaBrW9hw/UNS70EScNmO5)
---
U.S. rhetoric over Greenland was a big topic this month, and I was glad to provide perspective (w/ Tony Perkins, January 7, Family Research Council)
* The large and trusting network of allies and partners created and maintained by the United States is a massive strategic advantage that uniquely benefits us, and anything that would sever it would be profoundly harmful to our interests.

| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG7uggjyojTAjPUbUSIC/obWVZ4b22xQp)
---
It was an honor and privilege to offer thoughts on the situation in Iran alongside Geraldo Rivera (w/ Connell McShane, January 14, NewsNation)
* There is reason for very cautious optimism at what we are seeing in the protests that are sweeping across the Islamic Republic of Iran.

| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGEm8pYvztcepEnLSksS/lsiRRmjf2IYL)
---
| | | I thoroughly enjoyed being in studio to speak about the latest situation in the Middle East and Latin America (w/ John Roberts, January 16, Fox News)
* With a carrier strike group inbound to the Middle East: “Help is on the way!”

** _Thoughts by Teichert_**
---
| [ Aligning Incentives for Congress: A Strategy of Mutually Assured Destruction](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGLdayNtB3m8v465R3Si/ODU97wXSwNNW)
---
| | | A hearty thanks to Real Clear Politics for publishing these thoughts on ways to prompt Congress to pass a budget on time (i.e. actually do their jobs) (January 13):
* Our federal government’s budgetary dysfunction is harming our citizens, hurting our country, and hacking away at our credibility
* “If this sounds draconian [my recommendation] – yes, it is, and that’s the point. It makes such situations sufficiently painful so that no government would willingly stumble into such a scenario. And if they did, the impacts would be so widespread that the incumbent advantages would be wiped away during the next electoral cycle. It’s a political manifestation of mutually assured destruction.”

---
| | | | [ Redistricting effort deserves protest](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGSV37CqMDvd0tOpPM2y/WCpi1vorIbYe)
---
| | | Thanks to The Baltimore Sun for publishing this letter to the editor as a follow up to my OpEd from last month (January 27 – full text below):
* Last month, I ran a commentary in The Baltimore Sun, entitled, “Maryland must come before the governor’s political ambitions.” Yet, Gov. Wes Moore continues to recklessly press his agenda to monopolize Maryland’s political system.
* Though nearly half of Maryland’s electorate is not registered Democrats, Moore pursues a self-serving pathway that would disenfranchise millions of Marylanders. However, there is a better historical phrase than _disenfranchise_ to describe his desires. Our governor seeks a policy of _taxation without representation_. He may not care about our votes, but he sure likes our taxes.
* In honor of our founders, we should take a page from their playbook. While we can’t all make it to Annapolis to testify against such anti-democratic measures, we must make our voices heard. What better way than to send boxes of tea to the Governor’s Mansion and the speaker’s office?! Doing so would allow us to register a double dose of disgust about the high and growing price we pay to live in this great state while the governor simultaneously seeks to void our votes.

---
| | | | [ Geopolitics, Leadership, and Risk and Mach 2](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGZMVG1nXO576ihZNedE/zOITqwC0zA4Y)
---
| | | 💥 Full Spectrum Considerations for Risk Management – The Political Risk Podcast!

🔥 Thanks to David Benyon for leading a stellar discussion about risk management considerations derived from leadership, combat, flight test, and international affairs. The lessons are directly applicable to anyone who considers or manages risk, and the discussion was fun, fast moving, and full of stories. ** _Teichert in the Trenches_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **_Behind the Scenes_**
---
| | | |
---
📺 Anchor Buddy – Thoughts on U.S. Activity in Venezuela

🎥 It was an honor to join Leland Vittert on set for three hours on Saturday alongside Tom Dupree to provide running commentary on the breaking news on the day of the capture of Maduro. The team at NewsNation was world class as always, providing News for All Americans !!️
|
---
🎉It is wonderful to have Markie Martin back as the anchor for NewsNation’s morning show (Morning in America) after her maternity leave, and I’m thrilled that she got my baby gift! A huge congratulations to Markie and her incredible family!
|
---
|
---
❄️ A Fox News interview in the snow!

☃️ It was a stark contrast between the environment outside and the movie magic in the control van on Monday evening (Jan 26). Thanks to Trace Gallagher and Fox News for the opportunity to interview about Iran and Ukraine. Traipsing a few blocks in the 14-degree weather at 11pm and hopping onto a high-vis hit that looks like I was in the studio was a bit of a shock.
|
---
| | | Pastor Wells and I are in the last stages of finalizing our book, which is still on track to publish by the end of February. Here is one of the endorsements:
* “What’s true about leadership in organizational life is equally true in one’s personal life: The most difficult person you’ll ever have to lead is yourself. While this truth has major implications for institutions large and small in every corner of our country, its force extends well beyond the personal to the national level as ‘we the people’ play our individual parts to create the common good. _In God I Trust_ is a welcome reminder that ‘we’ is nothing more than the collection of every last ‘I.’ In other words, the best thing I can do to strengthen our ‘we’ is to look in the mirror and start with me. Trust me, there can be no better anniversary gift to this great Nation than that. Better yet, trust God.”
* Dr. Dondi E. Costin, Major General (ret), United States Air Force – President, Liberty University

** _My Bookshelf_**
---
| | | |
---
🔑 The New Year period is a great chance to reset and read a bit of fiction. I thoroughly enjoyed this book, written by my friend and fellow F-22 test pilot!

📣 I loved the endorsement by award-winning author Bryan Timothy Mitchell: “Strap in! This is action-packed science fiction with a huge heart. You’ll barrel through pages filed with pulse-pounding adventure, unexpected twists, and a glowing core about family loyalty and love.”
| | | |
---
🔑 🐲 Another great dose of fiction. Other than multiple mentions of slaying dragons (an occupational hazard based on my callsign), I enjoyed this international thriller. It was written by an Army friend and colleague from my time in Iraq.

📣 I especially appreciated the first paragraph of his Dedication: “I dedicate this book, first and foremost, to my grandmother, Ethel Leibfried, who believed in me when others did not. When my elementary school labeled me ‘mildly retarded’ and said I would never learn to read, she refused to accept that. She devoted her spare time to teach me – patiently and lovingly – until the words came alive. After one summer with her, I returned to school reading two grade levels ahead. Her belief in me changed the course of my life and instilled in me a love for reading and writing that continues to this day.”
|
---
🔑 I am honored to be a contributor for such an incredible compilation of leadership expertise.📣 Over 3,000 years of combined United States Air Force leadership experience, from 100 Generals and Chief Master Sergeants in 500-word chunks. The output is outstanding!🔥 And all proceeds are being donated to the Air & Space Forces Aid Society! ** _PLUS Posts for the Month_**
| | | |
---
| [ Considering Our Ways
(Jan 3rd)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGgDxOqkiYEbCY0JLxDU/90ZAaTk7ukIa)
---
| [ A Previously Empty Section of the Stadium (January 10th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGn5PXfhtiO5INJ3KFnk/ke2m9BxreYPG)
---
| [ Field Goals, Fireworks, and Fight Songs (Jan 17th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGtwrgUf4sXZOCbnIYO0/LeQ5aZtR-lTe)
---
| [ Resist and Rejoice, Rejoice, and Rejoice (Jan 31st)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDhYHcZvsAP4JMNKzgWGO/KBU8-_dBNic2)
---
| | | **_Blast from the P_**** _ast_**
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsE9szp0KEGKEZQCiofFyS/1yxV2zH95faK)
---
|
---
Fulfilling a promise about my NBA free agent story!
A few months ago, I shared about my visit to NBA headquarters. It was an incredible time, and in the post, I promised: “At some point I need to share with you all how I was once officially declared an NBA free agent.” I got a lot of feedback that people were interested, so here it is ...
As a USAF lieutenant, I enjoyed being the young guy in the squadron (Lts are sometimes known as having all thrust and no vector). I also watched a lot of ESPN at the time, and was always amused when some high schooler would have a small press conference and declare themselves eligible for the NBA draft. I always wondered, what makes someone eligible to do such a thing? I decided to find out!
I wrote a letter to NBA Commissioner David Stern declaring myself eligible for the draft.
Three weeks later, I got the following back from the NBA staff asking for a bit more information (April 20th). I didn’t have a lot to include in the questionnaire about my basketball history. But one prompt asked: “In the space provided below (or attach another page), please provide us with any statistics and any other relevant information relating to your basketball playing history.” I responded with a simple response: “I am currently a fighter pilot in the U.S. Air Force, a job requiring a large amount of strength, endurance, and skill.”
I got the following response back a few weeks later (May 21st). As you can see, I wasn’t qualified for the draft. Importantly though, I was designated an indefinite free agent.
In case you were wondering, no NBA team has ever reached out to tap into my skillset!
| [ The Hard Power of Security Cooperation](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsEcDi1QiaMFOpU26ddzgW/ZULWExOzgokZ)
---
Flashback commentary in _War on the Rocks_ from March 2022! A broad and trusting network of allies and partners is a unique American advantage that provides hard power to meet U.S. objectives.

🎙️ “International relationship-building among allies and partners is more than a soft-power activity. Yes, these activities build collegiality, credibility, and trust. But they also facilitate the hard power of combat effectiveness by fostering interoperability, building a portfolio of complementary weapons systems, and demonstrating success in combined operations through training and exercises.”
** _Rejoin Opportunities_**
| [ GraceWay Baptist Church](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsF4YQDr6wSAZ5XrUScjOa/6bVCVu3QBhg1)
---
I’ll be preaching at GraceWay Baptist Church on Sunday, February 8th. Check out our new property in Eastern Market in D.C., and I hope to see you there.
| [ MINEXCHANGE Conference](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsFWt8QHVIY5jLbgsHbT6e/_lebV3SUXtKf)
---
I’ll also be at the MINEXCHANGE Conference in Salt Lake City at the end of the month and would love to rejoin with you if you are at the conference or in the area.
**_Closing Thought_**
[ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsFzDqchtee0tbfWG6aCoi/dwwGwrQBVTFh)
A quick point to ponder based on an old ski jacket!
_**Dad Joke of the Month**_
I have a strange mental block and can only reliably remember 25 letters of the alphabet.
I don’t know Y.
| | | |
---
| | | | **Teichert in the Trenches**
---
| Washington, DC
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
| You've received it because you've subscribed to our newsletter.
---
| [View in browser](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/mr/sh/SMJz09SDriOHUOWhOt45QHGsupy4/zX6T8aw7kPfm)| [Unsubscribe](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/un/v2/sh/SMJz09a0vkbXqU0NAdDsZ4A0AXaC/6ZhUJsbelzen)
---

subject: TFVC Tuesday: Preparing for the Primary
body:
| |
---
Round 4 of TFVC Recommendations | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTc4Mzg4NDc5OTI4OTYwMjg5LFwiclwiOjE3ODM4ODU1NjUxNDg1NDc1NH0iLCJzIjoiNjcyZjczYTdiNzA3OWQ3MiJ9)
| | | [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTc4Mzg4NDc5OTM3MzQ4OTAwLFwiclwiOjE3ODM4ODU1NjUxNDg1NDc1NH0iLCJzIjoiMjM0MWI3MzA3YjQ0M2VkNiJ9)
---
|
# Preparing for the Primary
---
| |
---
| This year, TFVC has had the fortune of being **overwhelmed with responses** to our candidate survey, with everyone from federal and statewide candidates to precinct chairs **eager to be recommended by TFVC** to our supporters. Medical liberty has become a wedge issue for Texans, and candidates recognize the **importance of prioritizing vaccine choice, now more than ever!** Our survey is now closed, and we are so proud to add the following Republican Primary candidates to our previous recommendations:
---
| |
---
| **Be on the lookout for our complete Voter Guide coming soon! ******
---
|
# News
---
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTc4Mzg4NDc5OTQ3ODM0NjY2LFwiclwiOjE3ODM4ODU1NjUxNDg1NDc1NH0iLCJzIjoiNTUyYmM3ZjlhZGE2NGNlMyJ9)
---
|
## Delegate Resources for the RPT Convention
|
---
Whether this will be your first or fifteenth RPT State Convention, TFVC has compiled all the information you will need to **successfully navigate the delegate process** and maybe have a little fun along the way...

---
| | [ Delegate Resources ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTc4Mzg4NDc5OTUzMDc3NTQ4LFwiclwiOjE3ODM4ODU1NjUxNDg1NDc1NH0iLCJzIjoiYWRmZmRiMDQ3ZjBkZTE0ZCJ9)
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTc4Mzg4NDc5OTU4MzIwNDMxLFwiclwiOjE3ODM4ODU1NjUxNDg1NDc1NH0iLCJzIjoiODkyNzViYjZjYTY5ZDcxNSJ9)
---
|
## ICYMI: Shot Callers
|
---
TFVC Outreach Director Carrie Bigford recently joined Moms for Liberty Academy in D.C to participate in a rhetoric debate on vaccine mandates. Catch the replay as **an example of respectful, principled discourse that is the foundation of liberty and heart of TFVC.**

---
| | [ Watch HERE ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTc4Mzg4NDc5OTY1NjYwNDY2LFwiclwiOjE3ODM4ODU1NjUxNDg1NDc1NH0iLCJzIjoiYTZjMTRiYTUyNWU0MTNiMyJ9)
---

name: Team Granite Solutions
subject: Why Judge Dan Will’s Confirmation Matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
This is the moment when grassroots voices matter most.

| | | | | [](https://www.joesweeneynh.com/town-council)
---
| | Derek,
Judicial confirmations should never be about politics.
They should be about qualifications, integrity, and respect for the Constitution.
Judge Dan Will embodies those principles. He is a qualified, constitutional conservative who has consistently applied the law as written—putting the rule of law above politics and personal opinion.
---
[](https://action.granitesolutions.org/)
---
| Governor Ayotte nominated Judge Will because she trusts his judgment, experience, and commitment to our constitution.
This is the moment when grassroots voices matter most.
If you haven’t already, please take a moment today to contact your Executive Councilor and respectfully ask them to support Judge Will’s confirmation.
👉 **Email your Executive Councilor here:**
[ https://action.granitesolutions.org/](https://action.granitesolutions.org/)
A fair and impartial Supreme Court depends on judges who respect the Constitution and exercise restraint. Judge Will is exactly that kind of judge.
Thank you for taking action.
— **Team Granite Solutions**
---
| | Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman.

Former Navy SEAL and GOP Rep. Derrick Van Orden **[dropped a truth bomb on Stephen A. Smith](https://substack.com/redirect/7964331b-229a-4189-9394-5c9bb75ffab1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a tense interview, exposing the hate-fueled mainstream media for what they really are.
"A 37-year-old woman decided to go out and weaponize her car against federal agents. How did that happen?" Van Orden pressed Smith. "Because she has heard over and over again that Trump is a Nazi and these ICE agents are Gestapo, and its gotta stop!"
## [WATCH: This was cold...](https://substack.com/redirect/7964331b-229a-4189-9394-5c9bb75ffab1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7964331b-229a-4189-9394-5c9bb75ffab1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7964331b-229a-4189-9394-5c9bb75ffab1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with ZBiotics](https://substack.com/redirect/7c130530-3e6b-4e99-bb5d-e75fc9796ecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[A Smarter Way to Protect Tomorrow Morning](https://substack.com/redirect/7c130530-3e6b-4e99-bb5d-e75fc9796ecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7c130530-3e6b-4e99-bb5d-e75fc9796ecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**A good night out shouldn 't derail the next day.** Planning ahead is a small shift that makes a real difference, especially as we get more serious about our time and productivity.
That's where **[ZBiotics Pre-Alcohol Probiotic Drink](https://substack.com/redirect/7cbfabde-a5bd-4651-b639-379fd0781f2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** comes in. It's the world's first genetically engineered probiotic, developed by PhD scientists to help prevent rough mornings after drinking.
**Here 's how it works:** When you drink alcohol, your body converts it into a toxic byproduct in the gut. It's the buildup of this byproduct--not dehydration--that's largely responsible for feeling lousy the next day. ZBiotics Pre-Alcohol produces an enzyme that breaks this byproduct down, helping your body process alcohol more efficiently.
**The routine is simple:** Make Pre-Alcohol your first drink of the night, drink responsibly, and give yourself a better chance at a productive morning.
If you want to try it, go to **[zbiotics.com/brawl](https://substack.com/redirect/7c130530-3e6b-4e99-bb5d-e75fc9796ecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **and use code **BRAWL** at checkout for 15% off your first order. It's backed by a 100% money-back guarantee, so there's no risk.
[Try it now](https://substack.com/redirect/7c130530-3e6b-4e99-bb5d-e75fc9796ecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Anti-ICE protests in Minnesota funded by dark money from China, billionaires**
An estimated 15,000 left-wing activists marched in Minneapolis on Friday demanding an end to ICE operations, but the "grassroots" protest**[was actually backed by megadonor networks](https://substack.com/redirect/3aae6800-6f69-4229-9c20-c44ac11cdd05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** including China-based millionaire Neville Singham and billionaires George Soros and Hansjorg Wyss.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3aae6800-6f69-4229-9c20-c44ac11cdd05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Why it matters:** Extreme Communist groups funded by Singham's network are now marching alongside mainstream organizations like the American Federation of Teachers and the Ford Foundation -- a troubling development that signals "self-policing on the left seems to be disappearing," influence expert Scott Walter told The NY Post.
**The money trail:** Key protest groups have received massive funding including Indivisible ($7.6 million from Soros' Open Society Foundation, $6.5 million from Wyss), Sunrise Movement ($2 million from the Arabella network), and Unidos Minnesota (funded through grants from Arabella, Amalgamated Charitable Foundation, and McKnight Foundation). Singham's People's Forum and Party for Socialism and Liberation promoted the protests through social media.
**The big picture:** The protests were organized under the 50501 network, a mysterious group founded immediately after Trump's second inauguration by an anonymous Reddit user called u/Evolved_Fungi. House Oversight Committee Republicans are investigating whether Singham's financial support violates the Foreign Agents Registration Act and constitutes Chinese Communist Party propaganda efforts. "If it was organic, you would see multiple protests going on simultaneously, but you don't see that," foreign affairs expert Ian Oxnevad said, noting the coordinated nature of demonstrations.
* * *
# **Federal immigration agents in Minneapolis to wear body cameras after fatal shootings**
Every federal immigration officer in Minneapolis **[will now be equipped with body cameras](https://substack.com/redirect/a1c5b959-14f2-4194-9901-795904ad6e54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** following two recent fatal shootings of anti-ICE protesters, Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem announced Monday after consulting with border czar Tom Homan.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a1c5b959-14f2-4194-9901-795904ad6e54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Why it matters:** The decision comes after Border Patrol agents fatally shot Alex Pretti and ICE agents killed Renee Good, sparking national controversy and leading Trump to replace Border Patrol Commander Gregory Bovino with Homan. Body-worn cameras have become central to Congress' battle over DHS funding.
**What 's next:** Noem said the body camera program "will be expanded nationwide" as funding becomes available, with DHS planning to "rapidly acquire and deploy body cameras to DHS law enforcement across the country." Trump, who appeared unaware of the decision when asked by reporters, said he supports it because cameras are "generally good for law enforcement" since "people can't lie about what's happening."
**Flashback:** Video released days before Pretti's fatal shooting showed him kicking the taillight of a federal vehicle, spitting on an officer, and raising his middle finger before agents wrestled him to the ground and released him with a broken rib. Pretti appeared to have a gun in his waistband as he walked away.
* * *
# **Anti-ICE activists assault latino reporter, set up vigilante checkpoint in Minneapolis**
Masked anti-ICE activists **[assaulted Daily Caller News Foundation reporter Jorge Ventura](https://substack.com/redirect/b3ee4d08-a17a-4c02-826f-8deff3ae3c54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Monday while he was covering a road blockade they set up on 32nd and Cedar Ave. in Minneapolis to stop federal immigration agents from entering a neighborhood.
## Watch:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5ea63f30-98f8-441c-bd20-5a030abb34f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**What happened:** Demonstrators used traffic cones, wooden materials, and furniture to regulate traffic, checking vehicles' license plates against a database to identify ICE agents. Two activists demanded Ventura leave, swiped at his phone, pushed him into a vehicle, and one person knocked his phone out of his hand while he filmed. Throughout the incident, activists were seen questioning or following suspected ICE drivers on foot.

clean_body: | We have some huge news, Peter: We’re officially on the air — our campaign’s very first TV ad launches today! = = | = While working for President Obama, Wiley saw that real leaders don’t just talk about change. They fight for it. From his time as a state Senator to his service as a United States Congressman, Wiley has spent his entire life in public service fighting for justice. He defended voting rights, protected abortion access, and worked hard to keep guns from violent offenders. Now, he’s running for Wake County District Attorney to take on corrupt politicians, support public safety, and protect us from Trump’s attacks on our communities. Wiley’s never backed down from a fight, Peter, and he’s not going to start now. | | Friend,Tonight is caucus night in Minnesota.At **7:00 PM this evening** , Republicans across the state will gather for their **2026 precinct caucuses** — and your participation matters more than ever. Caucus night is where grassroots conservatives take the first real step in the endorsement process. It’s where you can **volunteer to be a delegate to your local county convention** , help shape the direction of the party, and make sure America First conservatives have a strong voice moving forward.If you believe in fighting for conservative leadership, **tonight is when that fight starts**. **Here’s what to do right now:**
---
* Plan to attend your local caucus **tonight at 7:00 PM**
* Volunteer to be a delegate to your **county convention**
* Encourage friends and neighbors to attend with you

---
You can find your **exact caucus location** here:
---
[ **Sign up at Commit to Caucus →** ](https://links-iterable.finstadforcongress.com/s/c/P2hXnIU06h6oye9R1vcXhChBzs53xgHrlxt7yKEoz-ZWx60dwH7QlzHzebSZ_M2srRiprxtZqfpueTDSGUfVlOdJ6ibeOnZ26I_lvCEVdRI-h9y_qjx2WXczni1ZFtDA5y2vnT1haGniTSg2OEmzo7ehuU0bSpvn9dq_ct8H4ztC5pyTFEgsieYT5ak1EZyB5mPkUqXhSRQ_3rApn2W-Py4jAgFy1ZJvmGNG-w6l6dhhpjjaJbyaGwZs5sgzAGFpe3BRIT4GvkPc1pAHbsN4Tc4bqUIdldWp2lc-F8aXxVjONUxESGuCRhffzFJofj23Bnk2QG8EnD_yh8UPIIREyjRk9Z-8VujAe2grhyT43jTHs4g_5O8ANQRkxPO8TMAt7yhJJgh7Hg20NzYtwpYfwBKpQbNs3ToE08oil6lGJ0SUWqJoYdxLqAA8WrFbNQRfd6oA9Im0rlTL4SaTCwdw_DXsA6TbsBs8qF8tzW2hadjs-VVdExxFrs8ADz1zdgkrM4MSvoJfsHVyS3opbdpnbMcyxvClJ4WR92jkncBFPA/d2h4l84t0DQjCkGGYL-lcAxicfTV3Nv5/17)

This is a bottom-up process. Showing up tonight ensures main street conservatives like you drive the endorsement process in the months ahead.We hope to see you there.— **Team Finstad**

| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e08f0c8a-8932-45a1-908a-bcb7f8df7d59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The [X post from @amuse](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c232126b-af35-4c08-b84e-962ec7c7c118?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), dated around late 2025, features a photo of Donald Trump speaking at a podium with the presidential seal. It makes a bold claim: "BREAKING: Trump plans to audit the $14 trillion in federal funding that has gone to NGOs since 2000.

"The post lists dozens of non-governmental organizations (NGOs), primarily focused on refugee resettlement, immigration aid, family planning, and international relief, along with alleged cumulative federal funding each has received since 2000. Prominent examples include:

* Planned Parenthood:**$9.3 billion**
* International Rescue Committee: **$11.9 billion**
* Church World Service: **$2.1 billion**
* HIAS (Hebrew Immigrant Aid Society): **$3.5 billion**
* World Relief Corporation: **$1 billion**
* U.S. Committee for Refugees and Immigrants: **$1 billion**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.z_HPf71dJCsTWxT_uT_pyc8eZNyP-fCISpvVIkgBeHk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=186739092)

Other organizations are listed with smaller but still substantial amounts, such as Lutheran Immigration and Refugee Service ($1.4 billion), Catholic Charities entities (hundreds of millions each), Save the Children ($800+ million), and many more involved in migration, humanitarian aid, or health services.

The list emphasizes groups tied to refugee programs funded by tax dollars from the U.S. State Department and Health and Human Services.

The post presents these figures as evidence of massive taxpayer funding flowing to NGOs over 25 years, culminating in a stated total of "$14 trillion." It implies this spending has been unchecked and that Trump's planned audit will address waste, abuse, or misalignment with national priorities.

In context, the post aligns with 2025 political discussions around the Trump administration's actions on NGO funding. Early in his second term, Trump issued executive memos and orders directing federal agencies to review grants and contracts to NGOs, with some programs terminated or defunded--particularly those related to foreign aid, migration support, and certain domestic nonprofits. This led to significant disruptions, including cuts affecting refugee resettlement agencies like the International Rescue Committee (which reported losing hundreds of millions) and broader scrutiny of government-dependent nonprofits.

However, the central claim of "$14 trillion in federal funding" appears to be a significant error or misrepresentation. No official government data, budget analyses, or credible reports support $14 trillion in direct federal payments to NGOs since 2000.

Total U.S. federal outlays since 2000 are roughly $100-120 trillion, with major categories like Social Security, Medicare, defense, and interest dominating. Annual government grants to nonprofits (domestic and international) are estimated in the hundreds of billions at most--e.g., around $300-900 billion in peak recent years across all grants and contracts.

The $14 trillion figure closely matches estimates of total assets held by the U.S. nonprofit sector (approximately $13.8 trillion as of recent data), including endowments, hospitals, universities, and foundations--not federal funding received. This suggests the post likely conflated sector-wide assets with government disbursements.
Amuse says, "the $14.12T figure matters because it forces a reckoning. A sector this large is no longer ancillary to the American economy or polity. It is central. And central institutions require rules commensurate with their power. To pretend otherwise is to confuse sentiment with governance."

Individual NGO figures may have some basis: Planned Parenthood has received roughly $10-15 billion cumulatively in federal reimbursements and grants since 2000 (mostly via Medicaid and Title X). Refugee agencies like the IRC, HIAS, and Church World Service have collectively received billions through State Department contracts for resettlement. But aggregating even all such funding falls far short of trillions.

Overall, the post highlights real concerns about taxpayer-funded NGO activities, especially in migration and aid, amid Trump's 2025 push for accountability. Yet the exaggerated $14 trillion total undermines its accuracy, turning a critique of billions in spending into an implausible claim.

_Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer._

| | Friend,
Running for office is a two-way street.
I’ve got my opinions, but you have yours as well – and it’s very important that I know exactly where you stand on some of the most important issues.
Our job in 2026 is to stick together and beat the Left, and so I’m reaching out for feedback from some of the most committed donors and activists we’ve got on our side.
_**And you’re up next.**_
[**I’m not sure when we’ll be circulating another one of these, so please act now while this is live.**](https://eot.cameronforkentucky.com/f/a/lcRF_P1jc3mCtqeTR9dceg~~/AAAHURA~/wAf-ebdGZahdOl539EOLG2UFmGbT689ho_Aq18glK2hc5L-xRPtOTD5Ya9x_1bx7xZvBGHEFSd89C75WtmES6I2mAa16Lpzkt6tU3J0UbsYG_wFpWDoVxMnU3P7D_StywS3LWvYl-vpm9-YY8So5dxDp1kYHxrbJDgl0F4wxEseXQk1RpdTDQk1Mff-q8MTLNxXPtjbZImgQ3XhBXRwCqzBkm3sYAn5bsp2hakCaoKR0NN2tMebW-zIkVFz7ir25YQncLUR-uYZT064bbIr9QleELj5ZEXBIMi9rTyGPD1g~)
Thanks for everything.

subject: Your support means everything to me.
body:
Peter, it's Marsha Blackburn!
I know my team and I have been reaching out a lot lately, but your support truly means more than you know. To show just how much it means to me, I am coming just to you with an exciting opportunity today.

| Monetary Metals So now you own gold. It was a great decision, one rooted in freedom, independence, and protecting your purchasing power from the chaos of fiat. But until the day you need it, what’s your gold doing? If it’s just sitting there, vaulted or buried, it’s not helping you today. And in a world of rising costs, endless printing, and financial overreach... that’s a missed opportunity. Here’s the question most gold owners never ask:
**Why not put your gold to work?** That’s the opportunity [**Monetary Metals®**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) unlocks. Monetary Metals built an innovative gold leasing platform that allows gold owners, like you to [**earn up to 4% annually, paid in gold**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?), without selling or giving up ownership. ✔ Your gold is leased to vetted businesses that use it productively
✔ You earn passive income, paid directly in more gold No fiat. No speculation. No Wall Street shell games.
Just sound money doing what sound money _should_ do: serve the people who own it. [Monetary Metals](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) has already helped thousands of gold holders turn passive metal into productive income, all while aligning with the same principles that led them to buy gold in the first place: **personal responsibility, freedom, and independence from a broken system.** Owning gold is a hedge.

name: Niki Conforti
subject: Early Voting Begins Thursday, 2/5, in DuPage!
body:
Early Voting Begins Thursday, 2/5, in DuPage! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d04d542a21df/conforti-for-congress-10612834?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

It is so important to get out to vote this Primary Election! Be sure your voice is heard and cast your vote!

Early voting for the March 17th Primary begins February 5th in DuPage County, and March 2nd in Cook County!

To find your local early voting polling place, click on the county where you reside:
[Cook County](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=44f565642c&e=25f4fa3311)
[DuPage County](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=31e788d61d&e=25f4fa3311)

All precinct polling places will be open on Election Day, March 17th.

Stay Safe! Stay Strong!

Can you help support the Conforti for Congress campaign's efforts to beat Casten? Your contribution will go a long way in helping us win! You can click the link below to make a donation today.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=a88bfa4f6e&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District

name: Del. Elizabeth Guzman
subject: The Guzman Gazette, Vol. 3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | **Happy Black History Month!** This is a time to honor the profound and enduring contributions of Black Americans to our nation's story. This month serves as a vital reminder of stories that some seek to downplay or erase. By celebrating loudly and proudly, we affirm an essential truth: **Black history _is_ American history!**
* * *
**On January 27th, we celebrated MS Awareness Day.** For many, multiple sclerosis is an invisible part of daily life. Today, we make it visible. Ask questions, show support, wear orange. A little awareness goes a long way!

* * *
**I am so excited to announce the passing of[HB 414](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SNYHID0cgDJeR88MOfSMubWmFrQGh8oe8KiutzIjz4Abpo2fkqWaHWR8C6u4U0Vbqw81-GwHLoAqjaU30C9xzkNKrTWfqQaTGYmerkBmahffK9oxReMbi006RsGONe_yYUkVeKegr1qw5KTzSgou_CoMivgVredKW09h8wHTq6tjKONoJfwFN20ETA0oBfKEF8f0G9x9FVVkHEp_h7xKXjbPnNqmL5kZmFXnK1vTMQki5phT7lofio_jmDswxXZ9agfGNLfIaAtNMzN64nlASPYGH-J-_pf7VJAoid1GlUo/4nu/tuzaca8iTBiDh-ins2pCWw/h0/h001.wf-UQsujEQPx_iW-P4CHzlLvTycZVqoiQvZ9TayBk9c)****in the House of Delegates!** This is a huge bipartisan step toward making college more affordable and accessible. [**View the Floor Vote Here**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtQVZ5r8Up3q5RcNy-JVjpXxitSmabYUUYF2HJyV1WzO-FXdkz4Tbb-eLmXm6tTjTyK1Yqtfjc1lI7vePbSkdKm8en6ry0bcyMyK_GPz3D_EKH1sfyoLRY6gMPG1aXTVW8bCJ89sbT9cBr6NYsQk5VkYvrjbZRqtRKJmTWnxjMyklN3qR8skXOo5QPrtRq05ksATXfZroLWoxIsQxj3NAy1gWI5p2TllDfmKk1YrYyPSh3AN70XgPx_zAOnMA2yoM4cIrIZa5lMqcyJ0hyS-Ejca39jYDVifI5q15umrdnIX-sval5Q8QMfp1cniWdpDXTHHFaCMcKa44Pj_1UQdXl25GRUN-0hxq4AzJIEeNcv9ss0rZdeoxkhrlempzcZP2ZPt9XshibrNB87qnjsjqE--ReAA_OYknFuHA1_98eb35SAHjGsN7guFe4rmn7qVAMA/4nu/tuzaca8iTBiDh-ins2pCWw/h1/h001.-TYTCdbbsP7z28tFYpHt9r9MlyWNUYg7lZLs-0S6aaM)
* * *
**I am proud to update the status of my bills this session:** [**HB 416**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SNYHID0cgDJeR88MOfSMuRFAavReYV4KnBA2gO_2BZQMW3j6X7ZB6qbpfYrxy3mqIv8ndxgtxQ-Mc1_k9wH2Bg185qLenkwGyQnLP2O_Lex5yKnT1_8SKEACKS93n4i95WJkWwIyBzCXGzEt4vp3Ty0jmrYYGNk583RLwthM5AjMpXHSLBA8i2rjMOOz5w4tyRzChD4iskCECPlfDyTqwwLD-ewleLZmKXrjVvMEpF2_JSlGLm3Xn2qSDAzc2EaoQiSlIBZSIg8aRKbP-cyi5Yt8BkvWY6xWtbekczVCymlEcbg2JwV_t7FOzk-buH8S/4nu/tuzaca8iTBiDh-ins2pCWw/h2/h001.yz8Dc2XjmlsGVReCnuYA8HmkHkLBXiT4fnHoPl4bWkM) passed in the K-12 Subcommittee and the Education Committee and has been heard a Second Time on the House Floor. This bill ensures that school divisions remain financially whole and protected from claims, also reducing administrative inefficiencies. [**View the Subcommittee hearing**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtQVZ5r8Up3q5RcNy-JVjpXxitSmabYUUYF2HJyV1WzO-FXdkz4Tbb-eLmXm6tTjTyK1Yqtfjc1lI7vePbSkdKm8en6ry0bcyMyK_GPz3D_EKFXvxzsAW2LV_pxAmWYzEi_yhing5oxiG1_S0NLX2ey54tJ7mVGSBmzE13GY4YKN-pfiURf4l4SWdgliQYyVj2T8LKL7vPk6uauPt60jEGNyYDH8OJ-266NrvmHWD5JcyN8p5z6J3C1EO-IeWoihTbgt9Q9aEW0GLI2zxnhxNzyV0jcacaWjorBxAfPiAmX4ZsHWXMjz_oVGF7vh2utW9vTP_qv0lOfI351pOIyoFnrVlef76WKeNsqOnROTfva9bRNwne1RFaVbHTXFNCmGXpbo7us175XUjkO3yHkpjmxAZnHtAstVpVYoALRtVZcGUj-9_EMK-oxq5DQT9EUhfTA/4nu/tuzaca8iTBiDh-ins2pCWw/h3/h001.kAb-82bOvkFWZSVYy9z1ubHnjvjE-lUuuqJQ79hv77U) [**HB 494** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SNYHID0cgDJeR88MOfSMubWmFrQGh8oe8KiutzIjz4Abpo2fkqWaHWR8C6u4U0Vbq_TrGKTGUBx_SGfl5cc1dRxC8stp0lx6rC8C5UR6GHVeeqRsVDvIbFD5xZO-mQhqH8rfgqlkVc4cnfeZnpi-G_I3NL1TJjhzm3N0Q-Y4GL3nWR3ZbGedC3w7WjzwCQjrw45PbUleqeCqv2upeqI1Nwzh-2lR8oikxK9QUCoRqfJA7IGDEA1_COQ_MJTN2_qAXMn3f2eNo-oXCDWDTxa20TX3SEyEBWHpxiJ91KupVCI/4nu/tuzaca8iTBiDh-ins2pCWw/h4/h001.FpCoWQZ8Wrqoe1YibIWS_L-YDJz2-ZjuWMFM6CoajCk)also passed out of the subcommittee for Professions and Occupations. It establishes a hiring preference in state government for any person from the Commonwealth who has been terminated from a federal government position due to DOGE cuts. This bill will be before General Laws committee today (Tuesday). [**View the Subcommittee hearing**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtQVZ5r8Up3q5RcNy-JVjpXxitSmabYUUYF2HJyV1WzO-FXdkz4Tbb-eLmXm6tTjTyK1Yqtfjc1lI7vePbSkdKm-gNoGXh_SyWmBfX6d35bS9elry12uos0RbMtHcGxULDO0_clRb_7479eTLJXDB2LRt3IMLXNfQ9ozcFXG8Pzz11agEbJEfjaTzpTMzoZ-_stwxKEhT9wMD1ZiN6-9GNKbAlFKRBE-J3XOSfSrPHw1l01SzEJ_FDK4d9dI42gyN-XnrdAOFdAqmvFqAqWgiqmlpADnjNViluQRIJBGsXsHWdUKSfZDqagekxba9YVyC0Sf1gW9YwPKnDS3sBhSadjuAl45GoqnD0qqui2-QkC4bmFPHR5W43ZW3KK7AuchUkM3rJ1eudf5ewrFRLuIUwWI7AY4yPu9pOp01q9CS0JWrDkNCgzUKBUH626_fmkQS7g/4nu/tuzaca8iTBiDh-ins2pCWw/h5/h001.LRPDU9lrOurw9zvWufklE0e5kVQnCq_6Hh0GS6Ta-T4) [**HB 1404**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SNYHID0cgDJeR88MOfSMubWmFrQGh8oe8KiutzIjz4Abpo2fkqWaHWR8C6u4U0VbN5DSEXqaM4E6ehwTIQgEIVSAmsDWE5K7ND96q0R6Pyc_1Vh_SdVKloxU_TK5OeEgaLdDaT4LZUHlkBTfV9kcjO_b75Xd_NhuCJVA3pGBzEpsSa6qEkDc4r9Em416A_PlVLoTBxGi0sl4EOxA1cc0zanRSdPv8AHbdNUJX_b8NsqJEDkLgojzUy720P06Q3v4blg7Y0DpLFP0Vz-I00S2bD4uvVqSlHRrOdh6iNTNdg0/4nu/tuzaca8iTBiDh-ins2pCWw/h6/h001.HbDTcnWfpOWKBoPQtSOOBVx62ogZ2YkIvxaw_0SsJvA)**** passed in the Counties, Cities, and Towns committee and is heading to the House floor. This bill creates a youth representative position on school boards, giving students a chance to have their voices heard, be more engaged in their communities, and advocate for their needs. [**View the Subcommittee hearing**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtQVZ5r8Up3q5RcNy-JVjpXxitSmabYUUYF2HJyV1WzO-FXdkz4Tbb-eLmXm6tTjTyK1Yqtfjc1lI7vePbSkdKm-gNoGXh_SyWmBfX6d35bS9SXfmW7IXSDOJjCgmzdOoblkrMgQlfQBGLZn8WxLFdMXG578P514ObagbrjCw8rn7kF0-Nj7ru-wUlJkckv9WTw6qA-aiLFQUBHxJzC63TgmnpKw1Pm6CiUG0KplRBWDJQSVO61OK4LSw8J-lhZf2NaIY7rVDBxRvO6GzT3q4FXEN_lvGeLEEM3SeKH-0xG9zicMx2FzGfp4PZY8CXYVwjBJ9TjFSnfDffaw-SGB_Ys29jXhC8zUog2BBH5bjGuy3AVcb1tk760UkCizUTXxHhP8lqMYJH5bODsRvvfMI2QiCijdV4EMIpxcFMX7l8iKBxOHqiGf_26OO7nIQFY-Wfg/4nu/tuzaca8iTBiDh-ins2pCWw/h7/h001.ZPyuqufk9dY673zjbIskcjTj3zBottLAKU3g_AXWf24)
* * *
[****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtQVZ5r8Up3q5RcNy-JVjpXxitSmabYUUYF2HJyV1WzO-FXdkz4Tbb-eLmXm6tTjTyK1Yqtfjc1lI7vePbSkdKm-gNoGXh_SyWmBfX6d35bS9SXfmW7IXSDOJjCgmzdOoblkrMgQlfQBGLZn8WxLFdMXG578P514ObagbrjCw8rn7kF0-Nj7ru-wUlJkckv9WTw6qA-aiLFQUBHxJzC63TgmnpKw1Pm6CiUG0KplRBWDJZnCaQmTW0r8fli1ZtmrhuziFDwJbjrUqi7HIyGCa1squRAw-ZAX8012GIPRPJo_Zs4Uden73SofIn2f8kjN0zDY2OCy9fcqbunoN9ui-0-zDERkuLzvVCNaLMj7kS4VoIMTywcfz6ac-E0gMeKFeZrdhsCT5YbZfziO1wBVJJ5eSaE4lnbfEgGEjSEv-ZzGJX0YvS-UInDCgE8bcsKTMhQ/4nu/tuzaca8iTBiDh-ins2pCWw/h8/h001.u-7YcazCd16AghgnUFFgQ7rMqxB4_srXdmr1IoPlnac)**I introduced three budget amendments this week:** **Budget Amendment 368** provides the final $2.5M for the Bristow Manor sewer system. This state investment resolves a public health crisis and delivers a long-term solution for the people of Prince William County. **Budget Amendment 291** provides a solution for Virginians while the White House creates policies that leave people without coverage and drive up everyone’s medical costs. The 7-year Medicaid bar forces a devastating reality: when people can’t see a doctor, treatable conditions turn fatal because of bills they can’t afford. **Budget Amendment 78** ensures that Electoral Secretaries salaries are tied at a 7.6% rate of the General Registrar of each locality. This ensures that those in smaller localities, where Electoral Secretaries play a vital role in the election processes, will be compensated fairly. This is a much needed raise after Virginia extended its early voting to 45 days.

* * *
**I am so excited to share with you some of the great groups I met with this week:****** **I was happy to meet with the Centreville Immigration Forum.** What makes CIF unique is its commitment to worker empowerment, leadership development, and democratic decision-making. Thank you for stopping by! **I was honored to introduce the National Domestic Workers Alliance and Dreamers Mother in Action on the House Floor.** ****I stand with their tireless commitment to empowering the community through collective action on the issues that directly affect their lives. [**Here is the link to the Instagram post.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg45SazHS1oc_qQtS2Cx_PDantfjS78Tkm0oUG3TBTnli60cl-5_gsd-BIbVbh665MA0lzQfFlwz7o__LfpJtUwgISM7_9Nmwzsta8NiJrTM4mFXK-UyUFOu3G92PKE7hlhP9_pvvJv_Hfmjx6L3xDZxUVGXt2vGoDhov9BiTyyV8_8ys26fvOCdNGxboKFmDL0yk-IP9tQa0dHmmDCgexDq3rswTtxeymQUaag7qPODPvy3hBZvgdoIRTuss-wMwvHs/4nu/tuzaca8iTBiDh-ins2pCWw/h9/h001.NmSdVhzVFPwmK62nqLN0mkWFdCEpBbOhPVBUonR7_Ns)
* * *
**The most important part of my job is to listen.** This weekend, Rep. Suhas hosted a great town hall, and I was honored to participate. Sincere thanks to every constituent who shared their thoughts and stories. We had important conversations about data center accountability and their impact on our community. This information is invaluable in helping me make the best decisions for the people of Prince William County.
* * *
[****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg45SazHS1oc_qQtS2Cx_PDantfjS78Tkm0oUG3TBTnli60cl-5_gsd-BIbVbh665MA0lzQfFlwz7o__LfpJtUwgIWq14N9GKRVjq5k0vowN2Rd40wl7LYxLKDeDUKQTFbheLONiSTA9QKuo7hjJkq-VcR7BRxx1_etEDSUm9HGnv3oCBCohxdAVVhutRTrMKcpD2pNll_pbt-50jUp6T4mA4ZU4RzgJpiRivouOkfftXCGH-Glob0QTTW9qOfy9OhPI/4nu/tuzaca8iTBiDh-ins2pCWw/h10/h001.UZ51RsJfQeztPIeBcXSllgUEOSCC8gutAMHqC3gBH5U)**We’re featuring excellent individuals and small businesses in the 22nd District in our newsletters!** If you’d like to nominate someone or have your business be considered, please email: [deleguzman@house.virginia.gov](mailto:deleguzman@virginia.house.gov). ******Today, we’re giving a shout-out to********Nankar Peru**! **Nankar Peru brings the bold flavors of Peruvian cooking to Gainesville, VA.** You can find them at **13938 Estate Manor Dr, Gainesville, VA 20155** , where they serve food that feels real, warm, and true to Peru. Their kitchen focuses on quality, using fresh and local ingredients that help them prepare every dish with care. They want you to enjoy a casual visit where good food, good energy, and simple comfort come together.
* * *
**Need help with an issue as a member of the 22nd District?** Contact us and ask for Constituent Services at (804) 698-1022, and we will make sure you are properly assisted. If you’d like to come testify in support or opposition of any bills or resolutions, please contact our office at (804) 698-1022, and we will make sure your voice is heard. clean_body: | | | Happy Black History Month! This is a time to honor the profound and enduring contributions of Black Americans to our nation's story. This month serves as a vital reminder of stories that some seek to downplay or erase. By celebrating loudly and proudly, we affirm an essential truth: Black history is American history! On January 27th, we celebrated MS Awareness Day. For many, multiple sclerosis is an invisible part of daily life. Today, we make it visible. Ask questions, show support, wear orange. A little awareness goes a long way! I am so excited to announce the passing of the House of Delegates! This is a huge bipartisan step toward making college more affordable and accessible. I am proud to update the status of my bills this session: passed in the K-12 Subcommittee and the Education Committee and has been heard a Second Time on the House Floor. This bill ensures that school divisions remain financially whole and protected from claims, also reducing administrative inefficiencies. passed out of the subcommittee for Professions and Occupations. It establishes a hiring preference in state government for any person from the Commonwealth who has been terminated from a federal government position due to DOGE cuts. This bill will be before General Laws committee today (Tuesday). passed in the Counties, Cities, and Towns committee and is heading to the House floor. This bill creates a youth representative position on school boards, giving students a chance to have their voices heard, be more engaged in their communities, and advocate for their needs. introduced three budget amendments this week: Budget Amendment 368 provides the final $2.5M for the Bristow Manor sewer system. This state investment resolves a public health crisis and delivers a long-term solution for the people of Prince William County. Budget Amendment 291 provides a solution for Virginians while the White House creates policies that leave people without coverage and drive up everyone’s medical costs. The 7-year Medicaid bar forces a devastating reality: when people can’t see a doctor, treatable conditions turn fatal because of bills they can’t afford. Budget Amendment 78 ensures that Electoral Secretaries salaries are tied at a 7.6% rate of the General Registrar of each locality. This ensures that those in smaller localities, where Electoral Secretaries play a vital role in the election processes, will be compensated fairly. This is a much needed raise after Virginia extended its early voting to 45 days. I am so excited to share with you some of the great groups I met with this week:**** I was happy to meet with the Centreville Immigration Forum. What makes CIF unique is its commitment to worker empowerment, leadership development, and democratic decision-making. Thank you for stopping by! I was honored to introduce the National Domestic Workers Alliance and Dreamers Mother in Action on the House Floor. I stand with their tireless commitment to empowering the community through collective action on the issues that directly affect their lives. The most important part of my job is to listen. This weekend, Rep. Suhas hosted a great town hall, and I was honored to participate. Sincere thanks to every constituent who shared their thoughts and stories. We had important conversations about data center accountability and their impact on our community. This information is invaluable in helping me make the best decisions for the people of Prince William County. ’re featuring excellent individuals and small businesses in the 22nd District in our newsletters! If you’d like to nominate someone or have your business be considered, please email: mailto:deleguzman@virginia.house.gov. **Today, we’re giving a shout-out to****Nankar Peru! Nankar Peru brings the bold flavors of Peruvian cooking to Gainesville, VA. You can find them at 13938 Estate Manor Dr, Gainesville, VA 20155 , where they serve food that feels real, warm, and true to Peru. Their kitchen focuses on quality, using fresh and local ingredients that help them prepare every dish with care. They want you to enjoy a casual visit where good food, good energy, and simple comfort come together. Need help with an issue as a member of the 22nd District?** Contact us and ask for Constituent Services at (804) 698-1022, and we will make sure you are properly assisted. If you’d like to come testify in support or opposition of any bills or resolutions, please contact our office at (804) 698-1022, and we will make sure your voice is heard. If you have lost power during this storm and are having trouble getting in touch with any utility company, please reach out. Looking forward to hearing from you and representing you in Richmond! Best, The Honorable Elizabeth R. name: Brian Lenney
subject: Idahoans over illegals
body:
RE: Event today @ 4:30pm

| |
---|---|---
|
# Idahoans over illegals
### RE: Event today @ 4:30pm
| | | [Brian Lenney](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
| Feb 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
The first time I ever had to speak publicly on politics was in 2021...
I had no clue what to say and got stuck going after Theo Wold.
For everyone in the room it was like listening to Mozart play the piano only to be followed by a middle school recorder recital.
_It was an absolute travesty!_
So today myself, Representative Dale Hawkins, and Theo are rolling out a comprehensive plan to cleanse our state of illegal invaders and those who aid and abet and welcome them.

**These are REAL solutions that put Idaho first.**

Theo's headlining.

If you can make it, please join us.
Cheers,
Brian
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f5b134a1-75b7-434d-8fc6-0175201a1f4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
(C) 2026 Brian Lenney

[](https://substack.com/redirect/18f022f2-6f9b-47f8-8160-06e5e3907871?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..phbA_0n6RwophwdloJ6n6v_drtZz5KJPm4OkYEJO3Gg?)

subject: Swearing in of TX Dem shrinks GOP House majority to 1 vote

body:
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yoJxvHBFYbHXpmsLKfmRvTfQPpUFjG-XUYogrT_wOAMKeLapW5RlOcRh3d11nX877xYas8JGU6sObbijZP779t7jhFcWPYr5udN6xcgF0wS_eppNQyLVFrs3VtjgOcRAkMK8Ad_utaJlE4DpJcDyCmQaMIa656PIRFVtAw6JEU54yi46d2Os0r6LLrsVB2aES8axhX3nEPO3Rl3EIYnYx-tG5-13CK1k&c=KzR8305h9qOi6r8195Rv2P_81Z9OsTVF-SL0JdUMVRUeS02R7lEFzg==&ch=EBJ_jfo2sUcxpnBOGjSi428P7dEWiD2JhXyS2fA9zUxe1ib43zMPZQ==)
---
Peter,
The GOP grasp on power within the House of Representatives is crumbling before our eyes.
Following the swearing in of Democrat Christian Menefee, the GOP House majority is now officially just a 1 vote majority.
That isn't even accounting for Congressman Massie, who although still a Republican, is in a war with the President, and has voted with Dems on key issues such as releasing the Epstein files.
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yoJxvHBFYbHXpmsLKfmRvTfQPpUFjG-XUYogrT_wOAMKeLapW5RlOcRh3d11nX877xYas8JGU6sObbijZP779t7jhFcWPYr5udN6xcgF0wS_eppNQyLVFrs3VtjgOcRAkMK8Ad_utaJlE4DpJcDyCmQaMIa656PIRFVtAw6JEU54yi46d2Os0r6LLrsVB2aES8axhX3nEPM6XxWj2uYhzHK8dqG04tFw&c=KzR8305h9qOi6r8195Rv2P_81Z9OsTVF-SL0JdUMVRUeS02R7lEFzg==&ch=EBJ_jfo2sUcxpnBOGjSi428P7dEWiD2JhXyS2fA9zUxe1ib43zMPZQ==)
---
Republicans are panicking.
Just yesterday, MAGA moved to pack the Utah Supreme Court with the addition of two new far-right justices to ensure that the Court does not block their illegal attempt to redistrict Utah's 4th District where a Democrat is poised to win in the upcoming midterm elections.
MAGA is also continuing to press forward with attempted redistricts in Missouri (+1 seat), Florida (+5 seats), and Indiana (+1 seats), and when the Supreme Court announces their ruling on the Voting Rights Act, the GOP is expected to redistrict every majority black Congressional district and take as many as 25 seats.
If these efforts are successful that's up to 31 new GOP seats \- enough to make their hold on the house bulletproof. We cannot let MAGA get away with cheating their way out of the blue wave that's coming for them. We must pursue blue state redistricts of our own starting with Colorado to counteract the seats they are stealing.
Colorado Draws the Line is pressing ahead with the ballot initiative that will erase between 3-4 red seats off of the CO congressional map (including Lauren Boebert's district CO-04) turning them deep blue.
Victory is within arms reach and we can't let MAGA cheat their way out. [Please can you make a donation to support Colorado Draws the Line's effort to redistrict Colorado and ensure MAGA can't rig the midterms? Our average donation is $30, many give more, some give less, the amount doesn't matter because the donations will add up.](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yoJxvHBFYbHXpmsLKfmRvTfQPpUFjG-XUYogrT_wOAMKeLapW5RlOcRh3d11nX87zMOzNKdH5osBXMRv3ha197Ucb_vDzKCXDon4qepLIbIJ_SlRyc3q1uUdoBluJIs0b62Ov562bhpjDaxOmqnfIYUUH_k-5N78eXt1IAI3igPEbGbM3jlTO1xw_s0n3_6UCMkcYGsJyHOn3WBTI6Bafy-Q_fDXudalyIfdmV55xv0=&c=KzR8305h9qOi6r8195Rv2P_81Z9OsTVF-SL0JdUMVRUeS02R7lEFzg==&ch=EBJ_jfo2sUcxpnBOGjSi428P7dEWiD2JhXyS2fA9zUxe1ib43zMPZQ==)

clean_body: | | | | | == Peter, The GOP grasp on power within the House of Representatives is crumbling before our eyes. Following the swearing in of Democrat Christian Menefee, the GOP House majority is now officially just a 1 vote majority. That isn't even accounting for Congressman Massie, who although still a Republican, is in a war with the President, and has voted with Dems on key issues such as releasing the Epstein files. | == Republicans are panicking. Just yesterday, MAGA moved to pack the Utah Supreme Court with the addition of two new far-right justices to ensure that the Court does not block their illegal attempt to redistrict Utah's 4th District where a Democrat is poised to win in the upcoming midterm elections. MAGA is also continuing to press forward with attempted redistricts in Missouri (+1 seat), Florida (+5 seats), and Indiana (+1 seats), and when the Supreme Court announces their ruling on the Voting Rights Act, the GOP is expected to redistrict every majority black Congressional district and take as many as 25 seats. If these efforts are successful that's up to 31 new GOP seats \- enough to make their hold on the house bulletproof. We cannot let MAGA get away with cheating their way out of the blue wave that's coming for them. We must pursue blue state redistricts of our own starting with Colorado to counteract the seats they are stealing. Colorado Draws the Line is pressing ahead with the ballot initiative that will erase between 3-4 red seats off of the CO congressional map (including Lauren Boebert's district CO-04) turning them deep blue. Victory is within arms reach and we can't let MAGA cheat their way out. == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Thank you for standing with us in this important fight. -- Colorado Draws the Line | | | | == | | == | Donate by mail: Colorado Draws the Line == == | Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line. clean_body: Peter, President Trump wants to abolish President Trump wants to abolish DST and make Standard Time permanent so that there is more daylight in the morning. Others prefer making DST permanent for more daylight in the evening or continuing to change between DST and Standard Time. How we keep time affects you personally, so you MUST make your voice heard. Abolish DST \- Make DST Permanent \- No Change \- More daylight in the morning year-round for our circadian rhythm, more daylight in the evening year-round for recreational activities, or no change? President Trump has already revealed his plans, so now it's your turn to share your thoughts and represent your area. name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: Big mistakes people make before retirement
body:
| Hi Peter,
---
It's not just what you do in retirement that matters. It's the decisions you make _right before_ that can shape everything.
* Saving too little, too late.
* Claiming Social Security without a strategy.
* Ignoring long-term care until it becomes a crisis.

These are just a few of the common mistakes people make in the final stretch... and many wish they could go back and do things differently.
---
|

name: Colleen Davis
subject: [Read] “My security staff had to intervene.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
Most recently, someone approached her at a NO...| | |
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124626368/599203376/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_260203Whaley_N_CD_NO_17_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MmM3YzA3LTExMDEtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpRmSPy0cjJggOEoL4zIHoOrUCnnV8afSZL_8Ux98I8=)
---
Hi Peter,

We are enormously proud to announce our latest endorsement for the 2026 cycle: Joanna Whaley, candidate for the Michigan House of Representatives - District 2.

**While we try to keep these endorsement announcement emails joyful and celebratory, especially since Whaley is truly an extraordinary person and candidate, we want to make sure you understand the dynamics of this race and why it’s so important that we rush support to Joanna today. We’ll explain below...**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124626371/599203392/-1423737804?refcode=EM_F_260203Whaley_N_CD_NO_17_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MmM3YzA3LTExMDEtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpRmSPy0cjJggOEoL4zIHoOrUCnnV8afSZL_8Ux98I8=)
---
Joanna has shared with us that she’s experiencing harassment and death threats ever since she launched her campaign. The situation has become so intense that Joanna has made a practice of hiring armed security when she attends campaign events. She updated that **her team has budgeted at least $500 per month _just for security_** , depending on the threats and types of events she is attending.

The dynamics: If elected, Joanna will be the first openly transgender woman in the Michigan state house. While this district leans liberal, Joanna knows her candidacy is not well-received by everyone. In fact, one of her primary opponents voiced that, "this area won't elect a transgender woman,” and more recently started calling her “** __a he/she__** ” in front of voters.

If this is the behavior of her _Democratic opponent_ – a man who is currently in public office, we can only imagine the harassment she has been experiencing from the general public. At Her Bold Move, we believe no one should endure harassment and threats just for running for political office.

This is, of course, a way of intimidating formidable candidates out of running for office. We know Joanna can win this race – but, due to her security costs and other safety considerations she’s had to make along the way, she will have a more expensive campaign than her white, cis, male counterparts.

We want to help her pay that security bill.

[**This is going to be a TOUGH race. Joanna has tough, hateful, dangerous opponents in both her primary and the general. Will you rush a split $20.26 today to help pay for Joanna’s security detail from now until November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124626374/599203396/-1423737804?refcode=EM_F_260203Whaley_N_CD_NO_17_G_N_L1&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MmM3YzA3LTExMDEtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpRmSPy0cjJggOEoL4zIHoOrUCnnV8afSZL_8Ux98I8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Joanna Whaley:_ | | [**$20.26 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124626380/599203400/-1423737804?refcode=EM_F_260203Whaley_N_CD_NO_17_G_N_EB20.26&express_lane=true&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MmM3YzA3LTExMDEtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpRmSPy0cjJggOEoL4zIHoOrUCnnV8afSZL_8Ux98I8=)
---
** ** | | [**$50 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124626395/599203415/-1423737804?refcode=EM_F_260203Whaley_N_CD_NO_17_G_N_EB50&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MmM3YzA3LTExMDEtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpRmSPy0cjJggOEoL4zIHoOrUCnnV8afSZL_8Ux98I8=)
---
| [**$100 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124626411/599203438/-1423737804?refcode=EM_F_260203Whaley_N_CD_NO_17_G_N_EB100&express_lane=true&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MmM3YzA3LTExMDEtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpRmSPy0cjJggOEoL4zIHoOrUCnnV8afSZL_8Ux98I8=)
---
** ** | | [**$250 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124626421/599203458/-1423737804?refcode=EM_F_260203Whaley_N_CD_NO_17_G_N_EB250&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MmM3YzA3LTExMDEtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpRmSPy0cjJggOEoL4zIHoOrUCnnV8afSZL_8Ux98I8=)
---
| [**$500 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124626426/599203502/-1423737804?refcode=EM_F_260203Whaley_N_CD_NO_17_G_N_EB500&express_lane=true&amount=500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MmM3YzA3LTExMDEtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpRmSPy0cjJggOEoL4zIHoOrUCnnV8afSZL_8Ux98I8=)
---
** ** | | [**OTHER »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124626433/599203513/-1423737804?refcode=EM_F_260203Whaley_N_CD_NO_17_G_N_Other&refcode2=other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MmM3YzA3LTExMDEtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpRmSPy0cjJggOEoL4zIHoOrUCnnV8afSZL_8Ux98I8=)
---
As a community advocate, Joanna is not new to threats.

Before getting into politics, she received a death threat while getting ready to speak at a church in Michigan – the suspect threatened to blow up the church and shoot people.

She has also faced many threats and terrifying moments since declaring her candidacy. Most recently, someone approached her at a NO KINGS rally with a MAGA hat and a gun. As he got more threatening and the situation escalated, her security staff had to intervene, and local police got involved. We are so grateful that she had security in place to protect her during this scary moment.

**She shared that she receives threatening messages and comments online _daily._**

[**Let’s be clear - most down ballot candidates do not need to hire armed security. This cost puts Joanna at a disadvantage in this race, despite being the better and stronger candidate. Help us take this expense off her plate by chipping in a split $20.26 today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124626438/599203576/-1423737804?refcode=EM_F_260203Whaley_N_CD_NO_17_G_N_L2&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MmM3YzA3LTExMDEtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpRmSPy0cjJggOEoL4zIHoOrUCnnV8afSZL_8Ux98I8=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124626442/599203580/-1423737804?refcode=EM_F_260203Whaley_N_CD_NO_17_G_N_P2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MmM3YzA3LTExMDEtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpRmSPy0cjJggOEoL4zIHoOrUCnnV8afSZL_8Ux98I8=)
---
**The status quo politician isn’t working anymore.** This district – and the entire country – demand leadership that will defend its constituents every single time. Community advocates like Joanna did not just enter politics for power; they do it to better their community.

**Two brothers have collectively held this seat since 2014... This district is tired of the status quo. What this district needs is strong leadership to finally address infrastructure issues, mitigate cost-of-living increases, and protect civil rights.**

[**We can’t let security costs get in the way of Joanna winning this race. Will you join us in supporting Joanna for the Michigan House of Representatives by rushing a split $20.26 or more contribution today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124626446/599203585/-1423737804?refcode=EM_F_260203Whaley_N_CD_NO_17_G_N_L3&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MmM3YzA3LTExMDEtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpRmSPy0cjJggOEoL4zIHoOrUCnnV8afSZL_8Ux98I8=)

Onward,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move

P.S. In light of the attack against Ilhan Omar last week, we are working to create a safety training program for all of our Her Bold Move candidates and electeds. Please stay tuned as we prepare to share more about that program.
---

name: Josh Hawley
subject: I hope you'll pray with me this morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
Do you pray?| | | [](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=e470a6fad5a0439ba48ebac120ac8029&_e=T0S-uf4D2t2rTNoOdMnPUEHFPi2_e4AXtVhg_l15xQk9pWZKPVD94L2-Im_NXxCld891BEi6ScM17WxFZRwYS9q9bpnrNyEUups_guguyZkCKOc-qVNG9-I9sxqpmgpK5INGTRu-5caW6_BnNk1MUERfw_PKNhGLJYy_Ai3Ct8VrVmF9tHkfaVgym7Oibsn8jGV1Xb0ZmDEMibjOya_aXu1bZCfkXelXAHXy4qHgePPYJ64cVCcAueQWl4lHUo68pltjeIVsSDqhFpDLY3cmaBtYwKr0vEkHQBd97ARAgL5hVr8Gb8HtFHzribMbH_TJONTN_Qk5NVMKiJHsvmsviKgITn5GRKVkujuxyv7HXgoRBVkQYw17t9-AIw9IO8NIJy_9e-ihB6kOxsCjL6J0t-FDjDRqiqMWt1D6UQaSFi0%3D)
---
This is important, so I’ll get right to the point.

Do you pray? **Because I do. **

Praying is a vital part of my life, and right now, there’s a whole lot that needs prayer, including America. I’m praying that America returns to our Christian roots, and fast!

**The radical Left attacks and mocks my faith, and they hate my movement to bring God back into the government. **

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.4jjee64CtpbrI8_7Jr-_XrVcdLqY6Eg6NbDjyb1WlRc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=186568865)
[Help support shows like this!](https://substack.com/redirect/895c1444-340b-410c-88f2-6e9391e3a016?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
The debut episode of **CounterStory Perspective** launched with clarity, urgency, and a palpable sense of momentum. Host [Melissa Corrigan, she/her](https://open.substack.com/users/13839118-melissa-corrigan-sheher?utm_source=mentions) opened the series by naming its core mission: to _audit the narrative_ --especially the stories and power structures that too often go unexamined. For a first episode, there was no more fitting topic than Christian nationalism, and no better first guest than [Tim Whitaker](https://open.substack.com/users/196063406-tim-whitaker?utm_source=mentions).
From the outset, the show struck a chord. The production looked and sounded great, the audience showed up in force, and the live chat was buzzing throughout--clear evidence that this is a conversation people are hungry to have.
Rather than collapsing Christianity into caricature, Corrigan and Whitaker modeled something far more productive: a serious, informed discussion that clearly distinguishes between personal faith and a political ideology that seeks power, exclusion, and control.
Whitaker, who once lived inside the world of Christian nationalism himself, brought both credibility and compassion to the conversation. He spoke candidly about how the movement operates, why it is not shaken by scandal or hypocrisy, and how it has embedded itself deeply within American political life. Corrigan, drawing on her own experience growing up in conservative evangelical spaces, guided the conversation with precision--asking the questions many viewers have but rarely hear answered clearly.
Together, they unpacked how Christian nationalism functions less as a theology and more as an identity and power project, one reinforced by media ecosystems, church networks, and selective biblical interpretation. Importantly, the episode did not stop at diagnosis. It offered language, frameworks, and historical context that help viewers understand how to counter Christian nationalism--without attacking faith itself or dismissing those who are still finding their way out.
The result was a smart, humane, and deeply necessary conversation--one that set a high bar for what _CounterStory Perspective_ aims to be. If this first episode is any indication, the show is poised to become essential viewing for anyone trying to understand the forces reshaping American politics, culture, and democracy.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.4jjee64CtpbrI8_7Jr-_XrVcdLqY6Eg6NbDjyb1WlRc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=186568865)
* * *
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=186568865&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NTY4ODY1LCJpYXQiOjE3NzAxMzEyMTEsImV4cCI6MTc3MjcyMzIxMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LiK62Lw3Z-jzP5aCM-5aAJH6J3GaQQuozk_c1FAM0q0)
* * *
### Key Takeaways from the Conversation
1. **Christian nationalism is not Christianity.**
The episode clearly distinguished between the teachings of Jesus and a modern political ideology that uses religion to justify hierarchy, exclusion, and state power.
2. **Scandals don 't weaken Christian nationalism--power sustains it.**
Whitaker explained why moral hypocrisy, corruption, or even abuse revelations rarely move the movement's base: access to political power matters more than ethical consistency.
3. **The Bible is used selectively as a tool of control.**
Concepts like "motivated literalism" help explain how scripture is interpreted rigidly when it serves power--and ignored when it challenges wealth, nationalism, or patriarchy.
4. **Empathy itself is under attack.**
The discussion explored how "toxic empathy" rhetoric is used to train followers--especially women--to suppress compassion for immigrants, marginalized communities, and victims of state violence.
5. **Resistance already exists --and it's older than this moment.**
From Black liberation theology to progressive Christian movements, the episode emphasized that faith-based resistance to authoritarianism has long been part of American history.
6. **Countering Christian nationalism requires sustained storytelling.**
There is no single fix. Undoing decades of propaganda and conditioning requires consistent, clear, and courageous conversations--exactly the kind this show promises to deliver.

Melissa Corrigan will be back **every Monday at 2pm ET** with new episodes of _CounterStory Perspective_ , continuing to challenge dominant narratives and elevate the stories that matter most.
