body:
Special Elections continue, Georgia's legislative session heats up, and more
| | | | | [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oM-qE-yWzKd5Fnv7wtKcGfYxuHFMIQTTYyPLfCQqLNKYodnCwB393Ulej7g34CqyOZAKNEyPZlmsiW0nvN8zlwP7MRVRwwJqxDpLXedYOkvG3w5NCUNWB7S00G2jsGET3kVrtv01WqacXpRU4GFxFkNsUWud66Lg&c=O4BO3PMIcRfprbYSa21JjNLiGdPxXqB6L-ftyfiOM3OnwXoDyZevqQ==&ch=ywUW2NogBB0Yrai_jgBwcvgnsrU0FPv_TugbHQ0ZCBd4nEJO_mC7ZA==)
---
| Greater Georgia Newsletter February 2025
---
| A New Year. A New Session. A Greater Georgia.
As we kick off 2026, one thing is clear: this is a pivotal year for Georgia's future.
With the legislative session underway, special elections on the calendar, and major accountability fights continuing, Greater Georgia is entering the year focused on what we do best: registering voters, informing them about today's top issues, and expanding citizen engagement across the state.
Here's what you need to know as we start the year.
---
| |
---
|
## ICYMI: 2025 End of Year Report
---
| | [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oM-qE-yWzKd5Fnv7wtKcGfYxuHFMIQTTYyPLfCQqLNKYodnCwB393SWLe_pf1Uxn_btlEuLZZDXYYUwYHxf0gubfdgdhWAnWj1Lf5yhwyEUKod47_6qhcz2c_nEgI60qLMolIj1XsPYO6ILp5lVogAR8g_fQvb7izU3sZip2MWQSe3HeJQe9TGNYyUQ22nA6&c=O4BO3PMIcRfprbYSa21JjNLiGdPxXqB6L-ftyfiOM3OnwXoDyZevqQ==&ch=ywUW2NogBB0Yrai_jgBwcvgnsrU0FPv_TugbHQ0ZCBd4nEJO_mC7ZA==)
---
| [👉 2025 Year End Report](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oM-qE-yWzKd5Fnv7wtKcGfYxuHFMIQTTYyPLfCQqLNKYodnCwB393SWLe_pf1Uxn_btlEuLZZDXYYUwYHxf0gubfdgdhWAnWj1Lf5yhwyEUKod47_6qhcz2c_nEgI60qLMolIj1XsPYO6ILp5lVogAR8g_fQvb7izU3sZip2MWQSe3HeJQe9TMylQqK0SMZn&c=O4BO3PMIcRfprbYSa21JjNLiGdPxXqB6L-ftyfiOM3OnwXoDyZevqQ==&ch=ywUW2NogBB0Yrai_jgBwcvgnsrU0FPv_TugbHQ0ZCBd4nEJO_mC7ZA==)
---
| This organization was founded to be run like a business with efficient use of resources and a high return on investment, whether that's donors' treasure or volunteer's time.
With your help, we spent 2025 building lasting conservative infrastructure:
* Record voter outreach across key regions of the state
* Thousands of new conservative voter registrations
* Continued leadership on election integrity and transparency
* Strategic conservative policy advocacy

Thank you for helping make this work possible.
---
| |
---
|
## Final Stop: Statewide Education Tour
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| For our [final stop of the Statewide Education Tour](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oM-qE-yWzKd5Fnv7wtKcGfYxuHFMIQTTYyPLfCQqLNKYodnCwB393RPobs7lX5flYLafneSE5edecC12PCMeD-r6jJgeZ3wKHgAwy3RRK4wafvpmoXgML9rM4KJQ1RRF_MxYqASqA_aXjyo0C5FM9o0ZWwZkKRMY1_TxJoKs3mzrtP-JRJRs1RkGdI0m3AOXPCBPkHBLruEnQ40Bu6Q46TDNzOVBYGlf&c=O4BO3PMIcRfprbYSa21JjNLiGdPxXqB6L-ftyfiOM3OnwXoDyZevqQ==&ch=ywUW2NogBB0Yrai_jgBwcvgnsrU0FPv_TugbHQ0ZCBd4nEJO_mC7ZA==), Speaker Jon Burns joined business and community leaders for a forward-looking discussion on the issues expected to shape the 2026 legislative session.
Speaker Burns outlined the House's policy areas of focus during the 2026 Legislative Session, including:

* Property tax reform
* Expanded access to affordable healthcare
* Improving literacy and education outcomes

---
| |
---
|
## Election Integrity: 2026 Legislative Session
---
| As the legislative session moves forward, Greater Georgia is closely watching how lawmakers address election integrity measures ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.
Most importantly, we are tracking the effort to eliminate QR-codes from Georgia's voting system. You can read our [letter to the General Assembly here](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oM-qE-yWzKd5Fnv7wtKcGfYxuHFMIQTTYyPLfCQqLNKYodnCwB393RPobs7lX5flEP3KJpHa8cqDULZdTl-sZuXF_nXyK1VWOmlgIn-TnNsKh10sUfBRxvH8z5wZXKE5rNYoKtzC1RHPWosmiDY1xfMpWJOcAKKbKoqJcvL7hNB7baRdgkZ5hQubD5EF2HaOLEkCNG4P0vO0jbhKY0LmrVlizCMcmW-KKVqBaPzB9U0eYiiFVJHgtw==&c=O4BO3PMIcRfprbYSa21JjNLiGdPxXqB6L-ftyfiOM3OnwXoDyZevqQ==&ch=ywUW2NogBB0Yrai_jgBwcvgnsrU0FPv_TugbHQ0ZCBd4nEJO_mC7ZA==) which outlines our three non-negotiables:

* A realistic timeline and full funding
* Human readable ballots and transparency
* Proper time for election officials to prepare and implement a new system

---
| | [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oM-qE-yWzKd5Fnv7wtKcGfYxuHFMIQTTYyPLfCQqLNKYodnCwB393RPobs7lX5flKzJz8iegZHAYLt0RGCcfIN2wJzjXDssxBnzqsNYx1jW--h2ApOeq5I4U-w4nukO2gs99-OizfCxHBxQfOW9zsVlxdzCXvbYtvDLz4CTSGGmbH2rTgRI1nYS6N6S2GKf5Nn_1RJFasVoKrDlrfPfGgA2zsZz7cQd1mJa6ec5q6fh0PnkB6hvX95oa3j4ntI88qAMHgohUgdjMp7TSOOG5vM_oo806Du5yJyvC_g_L21pF7jQEHEOkPplfl2nLqTvS8WrVHDdglUQkDJar8-eIlEyIjEJDFatj89obn-ETqb2BKT1khvAkoJD7QN5VmhQA2kQdYxObyWFyun2xfaZhyA-F3K3dgKKb0w_QAhrsd-N-iH_hXtVwkWHdToLZB9pOPPGML6Fcot0V7k_OmMgSjQ==&c=O4BO3PMIcRfprbYSa21JjNLiGdPxXqB6L-ftyfiOM3OnwXoDyZevqQ==&ch=ywUW2NogBB0Yrai_jgBwcvgnsrU0FPv_TugbHQ0ZCBd4nEJO_mC7ZA==)
---
| |
---
|
## 🚨 Special Election Results and Reminders 🚨
---
| ✔ House District 23 -- In the special election to fill the seat recently vacated in Cherokee County, Republican Bill Fincher emerged victorious, maintaining conservative control of this key House district.
✔ Senate District 18 -- The special election in Central Georgia produced a runoff matchup between Democrat LeMario Nicholas Brown and Republican Steven McNeel, following the top-two vote getters advancing from a competitive field. Voters will vote again in the upcoming runoff scheduled for Feb. 17.
Upcoming special elections will be held on March 10 in Congressional District 14, Senate District 53, and House District 94, and House District 130.
---
|
---
|
## Frontline Policy: Launching Frontline HQ
---

| We're excited to highlight the launch of Frontline HQ, a new leadership development initiative designed to identify, equip, and connect the next generation of kingdom-minded leaders called to serve in the public square. Frontline HQ, an initiative of [Frontline Policy Institute](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oM-qE-yWzKd5Fnv7wtKcGfYxuHFMIQTTYyPLfCQqLNKYodnCwB393RPobs7lX5flOjTtq0zxaeCGqzk2RRbuNcWQH4pYqH78XRPOxcP94gm2XN_LU2FyfyBYr0piIhxyOcKTPDDwsysK_muknmOKDEou7GbUpcKk&c=O4BO3PMIcRfprbYSa21JjNLiGdPxXqB6L-ftyfiOM3OnwXoDyZevqQ==&ch=ywUW2NogBB0Yrai_jgBwcvgnsrU0FPv_TugbHQ0ZCBd4nEJO_mC7ZA==), will recruit talented leaders aged 20-25, convene its inaugural cohort for a training intensive at Foxhall Resort in Summer 2026, pair participants with experienced mentors, and help place them in careers and positions influence across Georgia.
[Applications for the first cohort are now open](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oM-qE-yWzKd5Fnv7wtKcGfYxuHFMIQTTYyPLfCQqLNKYodnCwB393RPobs7lX5flmtxp_CgT_1iwDl_bZJbiTtESm6ITBJNE43klZyR0mKlHDYc0dQJnVLf7_KKmEDAGBJUbBe2kt7ATnKfvW5j3tfL4nW4gUziZZXQHLHipqetEjtUIUjwxqdReelrZs7umSWTeCZmPcCZbYR8eGkUYmAseh6HX4IqOznh4rGQMe0-s3TBz2FkORkp02UjKFVvoj2pyjziGvvGVwRDQrS1ImBRHcBhSrp3KqPQXEMkc6nJW5JwZpn1mSa-GDtRMI5TtoRG37o8TH-a_vSJpjGnS1v8XTpoJ4B-IFMZcSnW2AVhh-63dThqvsLfzvAACryBIYXE5Y8Hmv_zmtVYGwFS7ZDDVyl_AUFUx1E5uBFqLCdNQUgned0af4V_RxohyCaw4BMPPsef8HMBB45eg0d-bJ2v5bDy0qouEHoAz9aSEvLGUe5qdIwQcZba75MEke6j3sVc9Z94S0cyirhW1EZSet_IsikDoZFBqUCy_1HjWuSl6cwtZjRKo2W94H51sxSzfk9r4eHrzoaMAZ6GiB-xNcfMlNM7UEn3aaA00ZbIwrEpVJMF3BSmOUxAA9oxnHHKEm-HNcGeisEbt1oYuIiaKRcosvCxRi0qGzRcmUeekSJRE3sRYyVv2jtggj-jOWBtUJxgLDFXlPWNs-a_saJfHkBamFnTjgvy1X__N5cgHuEHZhPrWfIXDBnlveqQKliG3FaYQM-ebASU6eQWsQKexrpZhGcaWALV3Cvi6ARv-bxA=&c=O4BO3PMIcRfprbYSa21JjNLiGdPxXqB6L-ftyfiOM3OnwXoDyZevqQ==&ch=ywUW2NogBB0Yrai_jgBwcvgnsrU0FPv_TugbHQ0ZCBd4nEJO_mC7ZA==), with opportunities also available to serve as mentors or partners in this program.

subject: Cold, hard revenge
body:
Remember this – if we lose, our majorities vanish

|
---
Peter,
The war on President Trump started the instant he stepped off that golden escalator in 2015 and promised to put America First.
**The Democrat Machine, their media pawns, and entrenched Deep State bureaucrats declared total war with no rules and no mercy.**
They hit him with the **Russia hoax** that dragged on for years, costing hundreds of millions and tearing the country apart.
When that collapsed, they pivoted straight to the **impeachment fraud** – a manufactured crisis built on lies, designed to nullify your vote and remove a duly elected President.
And even after they lost, they didn’t stop. They kept coming – _**more investigations, lawfare traps, endless smears, corrupt indictments and convictions.**_
Through all this and worse, President Trump survived, persevered and prevailed – winning a stunning comeback for a second term to help save this country we love so dearly.
**_But the radicals never quit. They’re still burning with rage._**
**And now, Alexander Vindman – the man who helped to orchestrate the entire failed impeachment hoax and nearly killed MAGA – is back. And he's out for cold, hard revenge.**
**He just launched a campaign to hijack Florida's critical U.S. Senate seat in one of this year’s biggest special elections. And within 24 hours, liberal donors pumped in an eye-popping $1.7 million with much more on the way.**
**This is no longer a normal race._It is straight, personal revenge politics._**

clean_body: Remember this – if we lose, our majorities vanish | | | | | | | Peter, The war on President Trump started the instant he stepped off that golden escalator in 2015 and promised to put America First. The Democrat Machine, their media pawns, and entrenched Deep State bureaucrats declared total war with no rules and no mercy. They hit him with the Russia hoax that dragged on for years, costing hundreds of millions and tearing the country apart. When that collapsed, they pivoted straight to the impeachment fraud – a manufactured crisis built on lies, designed to nullify your vote and remove a duly elected President. And even after they lost, they didn’t stop. They kept coming – more investigations, lawfare traps, endless smears, corrupt indictments and convictions. Through all this and worse, President Trump survived, persevered and prevailed – winning a stunning comeback for a second term to help save this country we love so dearly. But the radicals never quit. They’re still burning with rage. And now, Alexander Vindman – the man who helped to orchestrate the entire failed impeachment hoax and nearly killed MAGA – is back. And he's out for cold, hard revenge. He just launched a campaign to hijack Florida's critical U.S. Senate seat in one of this year’s biggest special elections. And within 24 hours, liberal donors pumped in an eye-popping $1.7 million with much more on the way. This is no longer a normal race.It is straight, personal revenge politics. I was honored to be appointed to fill Florida’s U.S. Senate seat once Marco Rubio joined the Cabinet. And now, with President Trump’s complete and total endorsement, I’m running to win it outright. It will be one of the biggest and most expensive special elections of the year, but I’m committed to defending President Trump and the America First Agenda that we all voted for. Remember this – if we lose, our majorities vanish, our agenda stalls, and the country we fought for is lost. We are not allowing that. Are you in? The line is drawn, and it's time to bury the endless vendetta against our President and our movement. Thank you for your commitment. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/812ac29e-5ed7-4207-869d-cb0485c55ee7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Recommendation - SUPPORT**
**SB2646:** This bill requires state agencies to email all legislators notice of proposed administrative rules and to include the economic impact statement with that notice.
### **Full Analysis**
_A vote for this bill is a vote to increase legislative awareness and economic transparency around new regulations without adding new mandates on the public._
#### **Key Provisions & Tradeoffs**
* Requires agencies to email all members of the Legislature at least 25 days before adopting a rule.
* Mandates that the economic impact statement be included in the proposed rule notice.
* Leaves existing public notice, comment, and oral proceeding provisions intact.

#### **Liberty Analysis**
This bill is a modest procedural reform within the state's Administrative Procedures Act. It does not expand regulatory power or create new mandates on private individuals or businesses. Instead, it changes how notice of proposed rules is distributed: agencies must now email all legislators and must include the economic impact statement in that notice. From a limited-government perspective, this slightly strengthens the legislature's ability to oversee and, if it chooses, challenge or cabin agency rulemaking, which is generally positive.

From a free-market and sound-money lens, requiring the economic impact statement to be included with the notice pushes agencies to keep economic consequences front and center. While it doesn't itself cut spending or deregulate, it makes it easier for lawmakers to spot rules that impose significant costs, distort markets, or create unfunded burdens. Any added administrative cost to agencies is very small and confined to internal government process, not shifted onto taxpayers via new fees or onto businesses via new compliance rules.

There are no new penalties, surveillance authorities, or constraints on civil liberties, property rights, or parental rights. The bill simply improves transparency and communication between the executive branch and the legislative branch over delegated regulatory power. Overall, it nudges the system slightly toward greater accountability and economic awareness without meaningful downside, warranting a modestly positive rating.

subject: A judge will hear Mark’s case against Hegseth today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friend, we’ll get right to the point.
There’s a hearing today in Mark Kelly’s case against Pete Hegseth, and we need you to help us show him that this team has his back.
If that’s all you need to hear, use this link and chip in.
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/2-03-26**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-feb26.6dv2ri&refcode=em260203-1-90&t=1&akid=6355%2E6688874%2EtB2e21)
But if you need to hear more, will you give us a chance to explain?
Late last year, after a lifetime of service, the Trump Administration came after Mark.
For speaking the truth and supporting the Constitution, the President of the United States said Mark should be hanged. The Secretary of Defense threatened him with court-martial, censured him, and is trying to reduce his retirement rank and pay.
But Mark isn’t going to back down. He’s suing Pete Hegseth, and today a judge will hear his case.
That’s why we’re writing. It is absolutely critical that patriotic, liberty-loving Americans make a stand now to support Mark. So, if you’re ready, please:
[**Contribute $3 to Mark Kelly and help him fight off these relentless attacks from Trump and Hegseth.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-feb26.6dv2ri&refcode=em260203-1-90&t=2&akid=6355%2E6688874%2EtB2e21)

name: Tim Walz
subject: It’s retaliation
body:
Peter,
When I demanded transparency and accountability for what’s happening in Minnesota, the Department of Justice turned its attention to me.
That’s not a coincidence. It’s retaliation.
This is how authoritarian politics work: overwhelm your critics, weaponize the justice system, and make the cost of speaking up so high that people stop doing it.
I won’t stop, because Minnesota believes in the rule of law. We believe in dignity. We believe real public safety comes from trust and cooperation — not fear, chaos, or political theater.
But fighting back against this kind of retaliation is expensive by design. And that’s why I’m asking for your help.
If you’re able, please contribute $25 to our Legal Defense Fund and Real Texas today so we can keep standing up for Minnesotans, defending the rule of law, and pushing back against this abuse of power. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp_2026_dga?refcode=partner_ms_tw_em_20260203_realtexaspac]
I'm grateful,
Tim Walz

If you’re able, please contribute $25 to our Legal Defense Fund and Real Texas today so we can keep standing up for Minnesotans, defending the rule of law, and pushing back against this abuse of power. [] I'm grateful, Tim Walz [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to DGA and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

What happens when women are told they must accept men in spaces meant exclusively for them - even when they feel unsafe? On this
week’s podcast, we’re joined by Tish Hyman, a Grammy-nominated songwriter turned women’s safety activist. After her viral videos
at a Gold’s Gym in Los Angeles, Tish speaks out about safety, privacy, and the fight to protect female-only spaces. This is an
honest, eye-opening discussion about courage, common sense, and the importance of standing up when women’s rights are at stake.
Like, subscribe and share.

Keeping Kids Safe Online and in Your Community

Do you know how to recognize a predator? It can be more difficult than you think. For one thing, we know that they are everywhere:
schools, public places, government agencies, even churches. The horrors are so far beyond what any of us can imagine. More than
two million people, many of them children, have been enslaved by modern-day sex traffickers.

Protect your sons and daughters with awareness of these tried-and-true pedophile practices. Here are six steps often used to
victimize children and ways to protect yours before it happens.

clean_body: Our guest on the Moms for America Podcast this week brings an eye-opening conversation about her experience of men in the women's locker room. Would you have the courage to say something? Plus, how to protect kids online and in your community. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] February 3, 2026 • Newsletter Why Are Men in Women’s Locker Rooms? Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] What happens when women are told they must accept men in spaces meant exclusively for them - even when they feel unsafe? On this week’s podcast, we’re joined by Tish Hyman, a Grammy-nominated songwriter turned women’s safety activist. After her viral videos at a Gold’s Gym in Los Angeles, Tish speaks out about safety, privacy, and the fight to protect female-only spaces. This is an honest, eye-opening discussion about courage, common sense, and the importance of standing up when women’s rights are at stake. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Keeping Kids Safe Online and in Your Community Do you know how to recognize a predator? It can be more difficult than you think. For one thing, we know that they are everywhere: schools, public places, government agencies, even churches. The horrors are so far beyond what any of us can imagine. More than two million people, many of them children, have been enslaved by modern-day sex traffickers. Protect your sons and daughters with awareness of these tried-and-true pedophile practices. Here are six steps often used to victimize children and ways to protect yours before it happens. Become a Member to Acess Our Blog (It's Free!) [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2026 Moms for America, All rights reserved. body:
Let me make something clear to the president: I will not be intimidated. I swore an oath to the Constitution, and I will honor it—no matter what threats Trump makes or who he sends after me.
Peter, Donald Trump is doubling down on his attacks against me. And I’m not backing down.
Over a month ago, several of my colleagues and I released a video restating the law and a simple truth: When you serve our country, your oath to the Constitution comes above all. Above politics. Above power. Above any one man.
That was enough to send Trump into a meltdown. He called for my arrest. He called for my hanging. He called for me to go to jail. **Now he’s sent the DOJ after me.**
This is lawless, unhinged behavior—and it’s exactly what you’d expect from a bully who can’t stand being challenged.
Let me make something clear to the president: I will not be intimidated. I swore an oath to the Constitution, and I will honor it—no matter what threats Trump makes or who he sends after me.
**[I will keep doing my job for the people of Western Pennsylvania, and I will keep standing up for our democracy against any attack or pathetic threats. If you’re with me in this fight to stand up to this bully and defend our Constitution, chip in to Heartland Patriots and me right now and help me keep fighting →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99762?refcode=em20260203-10020&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10020%2E614464%2E0rI4OI)**
**[Donate →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99762?refcode=em20260203-10020&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10020%2E614464%2E0rI4OI)**
The oath to the Constitution is sacred, and it binds us all to the rule of law.
I first swore that oath in the Naval Academy when I was just a teenager. I swore it again when I was elected to represent Western PA in Congress. It’s not an oath I took lightly, and I intend to keep it—no matter what.
I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump. I won’t back down from doing my job. And I won’t be bullied into silence by the president and his political enforcers.
**[I’m standing up for our democracy, our Constitution, and our country—because America is worth fighting for. If you’re with me, I hope you’ll consider making a split donation today between Heartland Patriots and me to support my fight and help me continue taking on Trump every chance I get →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99762?refcode=em20260203-10020&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=10020%2E614464%2E0rI4OI)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Chris Deluzio and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99763?refcode=em20260203-10020&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=10020%2E614464%2E0rI4OI) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99763?refcode=em20260203-10020&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=10020%2E614464%2E0rI4OI) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99763?refcode=em20260203-10020&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=10020%2E614464%2E0rI4OI) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99763?refcode=em20260203-10020&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=10020%2E614464%2E0rI4OI) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99763?refcode=em20260203-10020&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=10020%2E614464%2E0rI4OI) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99763?refcode=em20260203-10020&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=10020%2E614464%2E0rI4OI) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99762?refcode=em20260203-10020&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=10020%2E614464%2E0rI4OI)

name: Eliza Walton
subject: TAKE ACTION: Tell Oregon Lawmakers to Make Polluters Pay
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/b4AxG89Zp0K9NbQDGo3MWg2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/b4AxG89Zp0K9NbQDGo3MWg2]
Peter,
For decades, out-of-state corporations have dumped climate pollution into our air and water while we bear the costs. We are losing homes and even people’s lives to wildfires, floods, and extreme heat. These polluters always knew this was happening, but continued to do it while piling up massive profits with no accountability.
Oregon lawmakers have the power to hold these mega corporations accountable – adding your voice is critical to ensure they hear us [https://secure.everyaction.com/b4AxG89Zp0K9NbQDGo3MWg2] .
SB 1541 would create the Climate Resilience Superfund to ensure the largest out-of-state fossil fuel polluters pay their share for our safety and recovery from climate disasters, rather than Oregonians. For too long, taxpayers and our local governments have footed the bill for these corporations.
Can we count on you to take action now and tell legislators to shift the cost to these out-of-state corporations? [https://secure.everyaction.com/b4AxG89Zp0K9NbQDGo3MWg2]
Imagine an Oregon where it’s big polluters who pay to protect our homes from wildfires instead of us footing the bill. Where financial assistance is available to install energy-efficient cooling and air filters to protect against heat and smoke. Where our utility bills, home insurance, and local tax burden see some relief, because wildfire prevention and disaster recovery are paid by out-of-state polluters, not Oregonians.
Use this tool to submit written testimony [https://secure.everyaction.com/b4AxG89Zp0K9NbQDGo3MWg2] to the Senate Natural Resources & Wildfire Committee and tell Senators to support SB 1541 today.
Submit your testimony [https://secure.everyaction.com/b4AxG89Zp0K9NbQDGo3MWg2]
If you want one-on-one support in crafting your testimony please drop into any of the following office hours. There’s no registration required, simply use this Zoom info to join [https://us02web.zoom.us/j/88429394362?pwd=vp4Z3qqjpRODCLJbBaPhtrsbgpNtbZ.1] .
* Tues 2/3 1-3pm & 6-7pm
* Weds 2/4 10-11:30am & 3-7pm
In solidarity,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Eliza.png]
Eliza Walton (she/they)
OLCV Coalition Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ReVeUSnqh0mAa9rjhFdl7A2?unsubscribedata=mLq2v%2FZ0HUD6yxmlZeWYRYk%2BKcQRNcZgA4ORhkFRI0ID21%2BTCP6KAqzgG0sFuoUCL5PVmXYSO5lEZR4albwTBx%2FFnkpfnLTbH1%2BF4fuZb%2FkCLaO5Ft0ItbxWWYPt7vnmTV6kSlFEEjFImkwtUF4GnFRNDj8T7jyaZZDn9smT8ELQVWbMrbK8xMqeM%2FBS%2Fu8J1wu%2FQA%2B8MA1bH%2FtH1RgUKdc9JP2f%2Bdr3%2F8iUMBO6LZ8%2B7kf735hgzIFRxHNrPyCnzpsLH0X2jh8f0zxrf6dJcV7y3Ljuhw5v9iEPNCxkSKj68cPnQRGP6rlSuNfCLHfC8k%2FqhicqLw%2FjiAnP9eYXSH2k%2BLUsqQ%2FgnPcFltMHURLGofsBvxEXE2d6tPs9aI8OOi%2BsHhHopLaMhdznQJZTFMcwxctZRRgybbBotaZmdL4%3D .

name: Mark Teixeira
subject: Two weeks
body:
We're hitting on all cylinders

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=437eebd0b6&e=2814cf23ed)
| | Peter,
Early voting in the Texas Republican primary starts **two weeks from today** – on Tuesday, Feb. 17.
Our campaign has [incredible momentum](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=2e9671595a&e=2814cf23ed), and it’s because of supporters like you!
Patriots across TX-21 are block walking, putting up signs, and reaching out to friends and neighbors – and we need you with us in the home stretch.
[**Will you sign up now to VOLUNTEER with Team Tex**](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=ef70ef4788&e=2814cf23ed)**?**
---
[|
---](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=3087b4128d&e=2814cf23ed)
| | Last week, we had an [amazing rally](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=9fa1eac145&e=2814cf23ed) in San Antonio with Congressman [Jim Jordan](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=012ae83691&e=2814cf23ed). He’s one of President Trump’s strongest supporters in Congress, and I’m proud to have his endorsement.
We’ve also earned major endorsements from **Governor Abbott, the National Border Patrol Council, Riley Gaines, and 100+ conservative leaders across TX-21.**
As you know, there’s a lot at stake in this election. I’m running to defend President Trump’s America First Agenda, secure the border, and get our economy back on track.
With early voting just two weeks away, even [**a few hours of your time**](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=9a2cdef325&e=2814cf23ed) can make the difference!
Onward to victory,
**Mark “Tex” Teixeira** 🇺🇸 America First ConservativeTexas’ 21st Congressional District

name: Defund Oligarchs via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Defund the Oligarchs. Fund the People.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

As families struggle to keep up with soaring housing costs, medical bills,
and grocery prices, Donald Trump has turned the White House into a
billionaires’ slush fund – transforming our government into a personal ATM
for himself and his cronies.

Big tech execs, deportation billionaires, and fossil fuel barons are
seeing staggering returns on their political investments. Trump’s personal
fortune has nearly TRIPLED – from $2.3 billion to over $6 billion. This is
not democracy – it’s a hostile corporate takeover.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35035?source=email-20260203&t=1011&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]Headline: Trump's net worth nearly tripled since returning to White
House

That’s why Our Revolution, together with Rep. Rashida Tlaib, just
introduced our Defund the Oligarchs, Fund the People resolution in
Congress. It calls on Congress to end all corporate tax breaks, subsidies,
and federal contracts for billionaire-backed companies that buy political
influence – and reinvest every dollar in healthcare, housing, education,
and good jobs for ordinary people.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35035?source=email-20260203&t=1012&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]Momentum is building as additional members of Congress like Pramila
Jayapal and Delia Ramirez sign on. Will you add your name as a citizen
co-sponsor and call on your representatives to sign on right now?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35035?source=email-20260203&t=1013&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]ADD YOUR NAME

Billionaires RUSHED to pour in money to help elect Trump and his MAGA
backers, knowing the investment would pay off. And they were right. Fossil
fuel billionaires spent $443 million to elect MAGA – and are now
collecting $153bn in new subsidies, tax breaks and royalty giveaways – a
34,437% return on investment. Tech titans spent at least $72 million to
curry favor with Trump – and over the last year tech CEOs like Zuckerberg
and Jeff Bezos have seen their combined net worth soar by $494 BILLION.

Meanwhile, regulatory agencies that are supposed to protect us have been
gutted or turned into profit machines for the powerful. One thing is
clear: the “Trump economy” means rules for the rich and scraps for the
rest.

Enough.

The Defund the Oligarchs resolution is our action plan to take back power
from the billionaire class. It lays out a straightforward principle:
Congress must stop rewarding billionaire-backed companies who buy
political influence – and instead give that money back to the PEOPLE. The
resolution has just been introduced, but now we need to get even more
members of Congress on board. Each citizen co-sponsor gives us more
leverage to demand real action and expose the politicians choosing
oligarchs over their own constituents.

As Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese wrote with Rep.
Tlaib in their recent op-ed: “It’s time to defund the oligarchy and invest
in the American people.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35035?source=email-20260203&t=1014&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]Headline: It's time to defund the oligarchy and invest in the American
people

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35035?source=email-20260203&t=1015&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]Together let’s take a stand against corruption, profiteering, and
unchecked corporate power. Add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of
our resolution, and call on your representatives to sign on today.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35035?source=email-20260203&t=1016&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]ADD YOUR NAME

As Rashida said on our Defund Oligarchy live national call last night:
"This resolution is an organizing and education tool to name the truth:
our democracy is being sold to the highest bidder. If we want our freedoms
to survive, we have to act with urgency and break oligarch control."

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20260203.wotvSf&t=1007&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20260203.qRZWz2&t=1008&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20260203.gHdBHv&t=1009&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20260203.Egteo4&t=1010&akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=10163%2E5885482%2EwYvuNx

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as

Will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor and call on your representatives to sign on right now? [ ]ADD YOUR NAME Billionaires RUSHED to pour in money to help elect Trump and his MAGA backers, knowing the investment would pay off. And they were right. Fossil fuel billionaires spent $443 million to elect MAGA – and are now collecting $153bn in new subsidies, tax breaks and royalty giveaways – a 34,437% return on investment. Tech titans spent at least $72 million to curry favor with Trump – and over the last year tech CEOs like Zuckerberg and Jeff Bezos have seen their combined net worth soar by $494 BILLION. Meanwhile, regulatory agencies that are supposed to protect us have been gutted or turned into profit machines for the powerful. One thing is clear: the “Trump economy” means rules for the rich and scraps for the rest. Enough. The Defund the Oligarchs resolution is our action plan to take back power from the billionaire class. It lays out a straightforward principle: Congress must stop rewarding billionaire-backed companies who buy political influence – and instead give that money back to the PEOPLE. The resolution has just been introduced, but now we need to get even more members of Congress on board. Each citizen co-sponsor gives us more leverage to demand real action and expose the politicians choosing oligarchs over their own constituents. As Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese wrote with Rep. Tlaib in their recent op-ed: “It’s time to defund the oligarchy and invest in the American people.” [ ]Headline: It's time to defund the oligarchy and invest in the American people [ ]Together let’s take a stand against corruption, profiteering, and unchecked corporate power. Add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of our resolution, and call on your representatives to sign on today. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME As Rashida said on our Defund Oligarchy live national call last night: "This resolution is an organizing and education tool to name the truth: our democracy is being sold to the highest bidder. If we want our freedoms to survive, we have to act with urgency and break oligarch control." When we organize, we win, Our Revolution [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

name: Campaign Wheeler
subject: TRAINING INSTRUCTIONS: Thank you for Signing up to use Numinar Phone/Door App for Mike Wheeler For Congress
body:
Here is the VIDEO TOUR of our NUMINAR APP from Team Wheeler (12 minutes):
https://youtu.be/ckb6VKHVnaA or Numinar Website FAQ
<https://help.numinar.com/en/>

If you signed up please look for email from contact@numinar.com titled
"Join Mike Wheeler for TX-21 on Numinar" to set up your App on your Phone.
Please save your password.

Below is our 'Script' or 'Guide' on how it works and Phone/Door Script.

Tim
Team Wheeler for Congress
Text/Voice: 210-965-5785
mikewheelerforcongress@gmail.com

----------------

SCREENSHOTS of Numinar On your Phone:

[image: image.png]

[image: image.png]

----------------

REMINDER, make the SCRIPT your own style.. There is no one way to 'make
friends' -- we are only calling Republican voters. So they should be HAPPY
to talk about our Conservative Agenda. Make whatever 'style' or script work
for you! You do not have to read this line for line. It's just an idea!

Numinar Phone Script: Mike Wheeler for Congress
1. The Introduction (The Hook)

"Hi, is [Voter Name] available?

Hi [Voter Name], my name is [Volunteer Name]. I’m a local volunteer calling
because President Trump’s 'America First' agenda is officially on the
ballot in the upcoming Republican Primary.

We only have [__#____] days until early voting begins on Feb 17, and we
want to make sure our district sends a proven fighter to DC in March 3 GOP
Primary like my Friend Mike Wheeler"
2. The Connection (The Bridge)

"While President Trump isn't on the ballot, his agenda is being carried
forward by my friend Mike Wheeler for Congress.

Mike is a former Trump Appointee and has been leading the charge right here
as Kendall County GOP Chair. He’s a true conservative who knows how to get
things done."
3. The Engagement (The "Ask")

"Do you plan on voting in the Republican Primary on [FEB 17 – 27 Early
Voting or ON primary date March 3 2026

We want to make sure we have a strong turnout for our conservative leaders
Mike Wheeler. Can we count on you to vote for the Conservative Team like
Mike Wheeler?"

-

If YES: "Great! It's critical we show up for Mike Wheeler"
-

(Proceed to Survey / Thank you to remind them to vote for Mike)
-

If NO/UNSURE: "I understand. This year is especially important for
[Topic like Border/Inflation]. Would you be open to hearing why Mike is
running to fix these issues?"

4. Survey & Data Collection

"If you don't mind me asking...

1.

What is the biggest issue facing your family right now? (e.g., The
Border, Property Taxes, the Economy?)
2.

Have you heard of Mike Wheeler before today?
3.

Based on this– can Mike count on your vote to protect Trump agenda in
Congress?"

5. The "Closer" (Value Proposition)

Use these if the voter is undecided or wants more info:

-

The Fighter: "Mike Wheeler worked directly in the Trump Administration
this year on those very issues—bringing jobs back to the U.S. . He served
on here locally as GOP Chairman and Trump Appointee working to onshore
American jobs + is a America First conservative."
-

The Expert: "We need someone who understands the economy. Mike was a
high-level Financial Executive who led global teams. He knows exactly how
to stop our dependence on China and reshore American manufacturing."

6. Wrap Up

"Thank you so much for your time, [Voter Name].

-

Closing: We’ll see you at the polls! You can learn more at [
MIkeWheelerForCongress.com <http://mikewheelerforcongress.com>]. Thanks
for Early Voting Feb 17-27 or Primary Day March 3 2026!"

Pro-Tips for Volunteers:

-

Keep it Local: Remind the voter he’s a Local Precinct Chair, GOP Chair
before serving as a Trump Appointee.
-

Listen More, Talk Less: If the voter starts venting about an issue (like
the border), agree with them and pivot to how Mike worked in the Trump
Admin to solve it.
-

Smile while Dialing: Voters can hear the energy in your voice!

THANK YOU FOR HELPING MIKE WHEELER FOR CONGRESS!

QUESTIONS CONTACT OUR STAFF CONTACT:

Contact the Campaign: Text/Voice: 210-965-5785

info@mikewheelerforcongress.com

subject: ALERT: Trump goes SCORCHED EARTH

name: Trey Trainor for Texas
subject: Big Win in Kendall County – CKKC Endorses Trey!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TREY TRAINOR FOR TEXAS
body:
Grassroots conservatives in Kendall County stand with Trey to defend our Constitution, secure borders, and fiscal responsibility.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us10.campaign-archive.com/?e=4d3fe76c62&u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=91997d4b20)
---
[|
---](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=870936284d&e=4d3fe76c62)
| | | | | | Peter,
I’m thrilled to share some great news from right here in the Hill Country: **Conservative Key Kendall County (CKKC)** has officially endorsed my campaign for Congress in Texas’ 21st District!
CKKC is a dedicated grassroots group based in Boerne and across Kendall County, focused on delivering truthful information to voters and educating our communities on the vital importance of conservative values and the U.S. Constitution. Their mission aligns perfectly with why I’m running: to defend the principles that make Texas strong and keep our nation on the right path.
---
[|
---](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=224e1c272d&e=4d3fe76c62)
| |

Co-Chairs Andra Haney and Susan Bell released this powerful statement in their endorsement:
_“With his proven track record as a Trump-appointed former FEC Chairman, lifelong defender of election integrity, and staunch conservative fighter for border security, fiscal responsibility, and America First principles, Trey Trainor is exactly the principled leader our Hill Country communities need in Washington to uphold our values without compromise.”_
I am deeply honored by their trust and support. Kendall County is home to some of the most engaged, values-driven conservatives in TX-21, and having CKKC stand with us means a lot as we build momentum toward the March 3, 2026, Republican Primary.
This endorsement reinforces what I’ve always fought for:
* Securing our southern border
* Restoring election integrity
* Slashing wasteful federal spending
* Defending life, the Second Amendment, and the Constitution
* Putting America First – every single day

Together, with the backing of groups like **Conservative Key Kendall County** , we’re sending a clear message: TX-21 wants a fighter in Washington who will never back down.
Thank you to Andra, Susan, and the entire CKKC team for believing in this campaign. Let’s keep the energy high—early voting starts February 17, 2026. I humbly ask for your vote so we can win this seat and deliver real conservative representation for the Texas Hill Country.
Visit [**trey4tx.com**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=2be8f47a11&e=4d3fe76c62) to learn more, [**volunteer**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=835dd95093&e=4d3fe76c62), [**donate**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=1ed3b5ddf9&e=4d3fe76c62), or stay updated.
Together, we’ll keep TX-21 red and America strong!
For TX-21 and America First,
**Trey Trainor**
Husband, Father of 6,Proven Conservative Fighter for TX-21
---
| [Donate Today](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=86357eabb0&e=4d3fe76c62)
---
|
---
| |

subject: Georgia deserves better
body:
| | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below.

| [Unsubscribe](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001TiGr7G8G0an2bTkrhnK17w==&ch=374622f4-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&ca=d4848ab2-2b8f-4108-ba3c-ebf97493dc07) | [Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?ch=374622f4-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&t=001RGDrAu7uYL-dxOEaocPT7Q==&lang=001FCSs65SMrsI=&m=001TiGr7G8G0an2bTkrhnK17w==&p=oo&ca=d4848ab2-2b8f-4108-ba3c-ebf97493dc07) | [Constant Contact Data Notice](https://www.constantcontact.com/legal/customer-contact-data-notice)

| Friend, this race wasn't supposed to happen.
But here we are -- in a special election that will determine who speaks for Georgia's 14th District at a moment when our democracy, our economy, and our basic sense of decency are all under strain.
I'm running because I've spent my life in service -- not chasing headlines, not serving special interests, but standing up for people who've been ignored for far too long.
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l__z9T6Cad92OeZX3VqNpSq2SnPRAoEExeKECcKeFf0Yo2F38iaZ1rWPhRNMHIIsDwf6EpBhgA653y-pIYV9DzUl-jqxbc0k_oXhRFCricTggdkWuAY4m06I37HFCT07B0K_PCxUZoPBPbkst3fpQeELy2pmQPYm8FOvq1hOD2JLDjkJ2SI8sSMC1fDfVYeFo7N249cccrt7NdMZFgDp-yHI2iMcaBKFO3fd4j1j9-e6S4uiD8aoqMfVJ_jc_-rI&c=USvWAFOjZH493z7ceBqQaVi8kLYNFUJDF1BHxq_J18j8Q6Gsvlrjng==&ch=d2E7cxgfmL-TVTDNeNv7F12J6Gh1QC-KtZv-FqcVpLYzSzFJRjDZFA==)
---
| And right now, too many families in Northwest Georgia feel like the system is stacked against them.
They're not wrong.
Across the country, we're watching extremist politics create chaos -- from reckless federal crackdowns that terrorize immigrant families, to politicians who stoke fear instead of solving problems. And too often, districts like ours are treated as afterthoughts while Washington games get played.
Georgia deserves better.
This special election is our chance to send a different kind of leader -- someone who believes government should protect people, not punish them; someone who understands that working families need opportunity, stability, and respect.
But special elections are fast. They're expensive. And turnout is everything.

[That's why I'm asking: can you chip in $10 today to help us compete, organize, and win this race? Your support helps us to reach voters who don't usually get a knock on the door, fight back against extreme voices trying to drag Georgia backward, and build a campaign rooted in service, fairness, and real results. >>](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l__z9T6Cad92OeZX3VqNpSq2SnPRAoEExeKECcKeFf0Yo2F38iaZ1rWPhRNMHIIsDwf6EpBhgA653y-pIYV9DzUl-jqxbc0k_oXhRFCricTggdkWuAY4m06I37HFCT07B0K_PCxUZoPBPbkst3fpQeELy2pmQPYm8FOvq1hOD2JLDjkJ2SI8sSMC1fDfVYeFo7N249cccrt7NdMZFgDp-yHI2iMcaBKFO3fd4j1j9-cuOl0s9M8vu6BMXVc59GeK&c=USvWAFOjZH493z7ceBqQaVi8kLYNFUJDF1BHxq_J18j8Q6Gsvlrjng==&ch=d2E7cxgfmL-TVTDNeNv7F12J6Gh1QC-KtZv-FqcVpLYzSzFJRjDZFA==)

name: Maxine Dexter
subject: Dismantle ICE and impeach Trump

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q1?refcode=x_260203_teargassingprotestors_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q1?refcode=x_260203_teargassingprotestors_actrs]
Masked ICE agents tear-gassed, attacked, and kidnapped Oregonians while they protested peacefully.
This is an escalation of Trump’s reign of terror on our communities. His agents hide their identities while conducting warrantless and illegal searches and seizures. They attack peaceful protestors. And they’re denying illegally detained individuals access to legal representation, their families, members of Congress, and proper medical care.
As long as Trump’s ICE exists, I will not vote to fund a single dollar. We need to dismantle and defund ICE and all of Kristi Noem’s illegal operations.
I already brought articles of impeachment against Noem, but we need to impeach Trump and dismantle ICE before more Americans are harmed or killed at ICE’s hands.
Congressional Republicans are just a rubber stamp for Trump’s inhumane agenda—they proved they’ll stand in the way of justice, and that’s why we need to build up our base and vote them out.
If you agree that we need to dismantle ICE and impeach Trump, please pitch in $26 today to build a movement to flip the House and Senate. 2026 is the year we can take back the majority and hold the MAGA extremists accountable for their cruelty. name: Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska
subject: Dahlstrom Responds to the Governor's PFD Proposal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor
body:
For Immediate Release| | |
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Monday, February 3, 2026
CONTACT: [press@nancyforalaska.com](mailto:press@nancyforalaska.com "press@nancyforalaska.com")

** **Nancy Dahlstrom Responds to the Governor's PFD Proposal in his 2026 Fiscal Plan** **EAGLE RIVER, AK** – Nancy Dahlstrom, Alaska's lieutenant governor, is the only 2026 candidate for governor to release a plan to secure the PFD for future generations of Alaskans. In response to Governor Dunleavy's fiscal plan last week, Dahlstrom released the following statement: "I applaud the Governor for releasing a plan to safeguard and protect the dividend that so many Alaskans depend on each year. But I believe that it must be taken further and also voted on by the people of Alaska.
We cannot let Juneau politicians treat the Permanent Fund like a piggy bank, and the plan I put forth in November would eliminate this dangerous practice." Dahlstrom's comprehensive plan includes a condition that puts Alaskans in the driver's seat: _**Nothing happens without a direct vote of the people. The Legislature can’t touch a dime unless Alaskans say yes at the ballot box. This isn’t about politics or Juneau games. It’s about giving families certainty: a dividend you can actually count on every single year — no more $1,000 surprises, no more last-minute fights.**_
Her full plan can be read _[**here**](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=649742f5fbf642d7bb1e40d9203d0c16&_e=QqG3WzcduzzZ4eXlmEqlq1hztKSmhY2Bw-quC6fmkcMkbAD_cZ5lvgqzZPj8iYXCwdIAXHRKOSL9yy-Agx9CJWjO_SK_m-TSD7-zOuKwBK9eRWUuSN-G3ED6Vl57zwJ9YxarzA2h6-pjfbuWHKva498z16jfcK_mrx9FEhBlwog7jvIPvdUlc3HigF6QSXKWUMnJtWFavjmfjCwinwsmuTuh44l7qxFvu3D5WGorapAy4aRLHuIzJg3B-zSAYkLYaMi6avfjhjfudY-oGh2ME6TOBSNPVWrDIQSmpwiZNtn-VYmTIvZ8-24dFQEx1yKmYAJC2gFEgWQHWlzgEJRnRzwgg9ozP0SC6g3TKBSLA0X4hzZEOEtwuq-FNXG1Xeog1PSKljuOUCHx-drHXoVVXI7luMJsWvNX62xPpQ-OHokId_EVY0ePoTil2HRYzPgYd2ovG5xfli0M8iIhrzgYZalJBRVrSh8WzzwM12wLKEM%3D)_.

clean_body: For Immediate Release| | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Monday, February 3, 2026 CONTACT: mailto:press@nancyforalaska.com "press@nancyforalaska.com" Nancy Dahlstrom Responds to the Governor's PFD Proposal in his 2026 Fiscal Plan EAGLE RIVER, AK – Nancy Dahlstrom, Alaska's lieutenant governor, is the only 2026 candidate for governor to release a plan to secure the PFD for future generations of Alaskans. In response to Governor Dunleavy's fiscal plan last week, Dahlstrom released the following statement: "I applaud the Governor for releasing a plan to safeguard and protect the dividend that so many Alaskans depend on each year. But I believe that it must be taken further and also voted on by the people of Alaska. We cannot let Juneau politicians treat the Permanent Fund like a piggy bank, and the plan I put forth in November would eliminate this dangerous practice." Dahlstrom's comprehensive plan includes a condition that puts Alaskans in the driver's seat: Nothing happens without a direct vote of the people. The Legislature can’t touch a dime unless Alaskans say yes at the ballot box. This isn’t about politics or Juneau games. It’s about giving families certainty: a dividend you can actually count on every single year — no more $1,000 surprises, no more last-minute fights. Her full plan can be read . | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Roy Cooper
subject: One month out from the NC primary
body:
Are you with me? Let’s do this.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
Hey, Peter, it’s Roy Cooper. Is your calendar marked? One month from today, North Carolina will vote in the primary election. But the truth is we don’t have a full month to prepare — **North Carolinians will start casting ballots in the primary next Thursday, February 12th.** **[That means we have a matter of days left to spread our message and bring folks into the campaign. It also means _I need your help right now._ Can you pitch in before early voting starts?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5273?t=7&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5273?t=8&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
---
Peter, national Republicans made it clear they're ready to open their wallets and make this the most expensive U.S. Senate race in American history.
It’s no secret as to why: They know we have what it takes to flip this Senate seat blue for the first time since 2008, so they're lining up mega-donors and PACs ready to pour money into North Carolina to try to defeat us. My opponent, Michael Whatley, has the entire Republican establishment behind him — including the president — and they're not going to hold anything back.
But here's what I know: _We can win this race._
**I've won tough statewide campaigns here in North Carolina before, and I know how to do it again: with grassroots supporters like you stepping up to power us to victory.**
When you and your neighbors head to early voting sites next week, we need to be ready. We need to finish this primary strong and head into the general election with the momentum and resources to take on everything the far-right will throw at us. Thousands of Democrats just like you have already stepped up.
**[I'm asking you to join them, Peter. Please, pitch in anything that fits in your budget, whether it’s $5 or $50, to help us win this primary and prepare for the fight ahead.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5273?t=9&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5274?t=10&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5275?t=11&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5276?t=12&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5277?t=13&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5278?t=14&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5279?t=15&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
---
Thanks so much,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5273?t=16&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=17&akid=479%2E124072%2E9jDZvn)

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: just want to say thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
We must keep building strength and support.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124645974/599254701/-109627149?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2026-02-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzhkOWRlMi0yMzAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_lD0GALfp3ew11UaJvtx-M6yqm5FGOVFu0k8HDSAfA=)
---
| Peter,

I know you hear from me a lot, but I wanted to take a moment today to say thank you.

We did well in January. We hit important early goals and started the year with real grassroots energy. That momentum matters. It shows we can fight back when we stand together.

But the election is getting closer every day, and the opposition is not slowing down. Trump and House Republicans are intensifying their attacks on our communities and our rights. That is exactly why we must keep building strength and support.

name: Senator Sean McCann
subject: just a note to say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SEAN MCCANN
body:
we have momentum right now, and it’s because of you

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124646039/599254806/510768709?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTIzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjE5ZGEwMy0yNDAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=95jsyNyvws9U1cK3aXiBI5rCELOqQ4vPKfPgWkVapgw=) Team, I just wanted to reach out and say thank you. Our campaign has built up incredible momentum, and it wouldn’t have been possible without supporters like you powering us every step of the way. To quickly recap all that’s happened:
* Michigan leaders like Gov. Gretchen Whitmer, Secretary of State Jocelyn Benson, and Congresswoman Hillary Scholten all endorsed our campaign.

* Polling showed us closer to defeating Huizenga than anyone would have guessed — with just a 2% margin and over 10% of voters undecided — before we’ve even run a single ad.

* Analysts upgraded our chances of beating eight-term MAGA incumbent Bill Huizenga and flipping MI-4 blue.

* Our major competitor for the Democratic primary bowed out of the race, allowing us to focus 100% of our efforts on the general election.

* After an initial fundraising slowdown to start the year, our small-dollar army came roaring back late in January — allowing us to hit our goal with the help of _over 1,000 grassroots donations last month._

**If you know me, you know that unlike so many other politicians, I’m not some billionaire mouthpiece or trust fund kid who can write themselves a giant check. And I’m proud of that — but it means that this campaign lives and dies on the strength of our small-dollar fundraising.** So when we came to our grassroots supporters at the end of January and said we needed more help — and our supporters responded by stepping up and giving what they could — I truly can’t express how much it means. **I know you and your neighbors are putting your trust in me, that you’re counting on me to not only beat Huizenga and win this race, but make a difference for you and your family when I get to Washington.** I’m going to work day and night to do exactly that — and I can’t thank you enough for standing with me as we take on the hard work ahead. With gratitude, Sean | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124646040/599254807/819412648?amounts=5%2C10%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500&amount=15&refcode=email_020326_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTIzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjE5ZGEwMy0yNDAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=95jsyNyvws9U1cK3aXiBI5rCELOqQ4vPKfPgWkVapgw=)

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Delivering for Eastern Washington — and gearing up for 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
Delivering for Eastern Washington — and gearing up for 2026

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | |

I want to give you a quick update on what we’re doing — both in Congress and on the campaign trail.
Towards the end of January, I had a great time connecting with grassroots conservatives from across the state at the **Roanoke Conference in Ocean Shores**. As usual, it was a great conference, with more than 500 activists, volunteers, elected officials and policy experts attending in the dead of winter. The energy, ideas, and commitment I saw there reminded me why this fight matters so much — and why 2026 is already shaping up to be a big one.
---
|
---
| |
**My opponents are lining up to defeat me** Seven candidates have already filed to run against me next year. Some are Democrats, some claim to be Independents, but they all want to flip this seat. National Democrats are watching closely, and they think a freshman Republican in Washington state is an easy target.
They’re wrong — especially when we’re delivering real results.
Already this year, I voted for appropriations bills that **cut $2 billion in spending** while securing **over $6 million in extra funding for Eastern Washington communities** , including jail upgrades, water and sewer improvements, and critical investments at **Fairchild Air Force Base**. That’s what a conservative, taxpayer-first approach looks like.
But results in D.C. only matter if we can keep this seat.
If you’re able, please consider [chipping in **$25, $50, or $100** today](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=8cf48c7c09&e=5a45b9550e) to help us build the organization we need to take on a crowded field and win again in 2026.
---
| [DONATE](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=e8688fc640&e=5a45b9550e)
---
| |
**Help Wanted!** And one more note: **our campaign is hiring a Campaign Coordinator** as we continue to grow. If you — or someone you know — might be interested, please contact **Anitra@VoteBaumgartner.com** for the official job description and details.
Thank you for standing with me and for everything you do to support conservative leadership in Eastern Washington.
Michael Baumgartner
---
| | Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www.votebaumgartner.com

Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203
---

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.
