Carol is the only woman.

She’s the only person of color.

She’s the only Latina.

**Carol is the only non-white male candidate in this race.**

That matters. Representation in Congress is still overwhelmingly skewed toward white men, while women, immigrants, and communities of color are left without a seat at the table when critical decisions are being made.

This campaign is about changing that. It’s why organizations like EMILYs List, Congressional Hispanic Caucus's BOLD PAC, and Latino Victory Fund, as well as local leaders, have endorsed Carol – because they believe in our fight to bring new perspectives and lived experiences to Washington.

We have a tough road ahead. Candidates like Carol don’t get the insider money that her opponents rely on.

We have to build this campaign from the ground up.

[_**If we want to prove this campaign has the strength to push boundaries and shake up how Washington works, we need to show strong grassroots momentum. It shows every single candidate running in the primary for Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District. Do you notice anything weird? = Carol is the only woman. She’s the only person of color. She’s the only Latina. Carol is the only non-white male candidate in this race. That matters. Representation in Congress is still overwhelmingly skewed toward white men, while women, immigrants, and communities of color are left without a seat at the table when critical decisions are being made. This campaign is about changing that. It’s why organizations like EMILYs List, Congressional Hispanic Caucus's BOLD PAC, and Latino Victory Fund, as well as local leaders, have endorsed Carol – because they believe in our fight to bring new perspectives and lived experiences to Washington. We have a tough road ahead. Candidates like Carol don’t get the insider money that her opponents rely on. We have to build this campaign from the ground up. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = | = – Team Carol Obando-Derstine * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

subject: 'What’s New! by: Gigi Butler
body:
Change showed up uninvited again--so I'm serving it a cupcake, grabbing my rolling pin, and calling it growth.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.i9a5PpRtuxwZb-3S3kcqwEC-5Qhtlq-siFWD_tyy9-k?) for more
---
# ['What's New! by: Gigi Butler ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=186770312&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NzcwMzEyLCJpYXQiOjE3NzAxNDMxNDMsImV4cCI6MTc3MjczNTE0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OqyloXe2PlrrFw1eq1h1GSQo-An-ssOBpc6kJvO14yM)
### Change showed up uninvited again--so I'm serving it a cupcake, grabbing my rolling pin, and calling it growth.
| | [Heartland Journal ®](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---
| Feb 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=186770312&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NzcwMzEyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3MDE0MzE0MywiZXhwIjoxNzcyNzM1MTQzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNjcyOTU4OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Ox_VBR6aShDiPYfzNBhuvjR4XhODoncNe6UbN8GdtL0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/heartlandjournal/p/whats-new-by-gigi-butler?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d240e1cc-7dd6-400f-883f-58939919459c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The great thing about living is there is always something new. Life is continually changing. Most people don't like change, including me. I find comfort in knowing what tomorrow will bring. God never said, "child, life will stay the same and be predictable."
No, He says, "See I'm creating a new thing." In Isaiah 43:18-19 Forget the former things. Don't dwell on the past,I'm doing a new thing. Don't you perceive it?
He is saying, Hello?? I'm about to rock your world. Hang on. It won't be easy but if you grow with me I promise it will be rewarding. He wants to change us, bend us, and at times break us. That's why we need to be flexible and open to him.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.bBtR8LbSjK6Z7iBt7I8ZOg9ugFNJ1Ye3b99UXSVmlsQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=186770312)
As an Entrepreneur I have had to be comfortable with being uncomfortable...
These last 6 years have stretched me beyond my comfort zone to the point of being painful.
From selling Gigis Cupcakes, then Covid hitting changing the world and all we thought was normal, creating and opening a beautiful pie shop in Brentwood TN, then feeling the sting of failure as I had to close that dream down, then selling my home in Franklin TN and moving to Florida all on my own with just my daughter and our pets. Didn't know anyone or what I was going to do for a job. Just knew I needed to change things up in my life.
Well 2 years out and having survived and thriving here are some things I have learned.

#1
God is always on the move creating new. If He is then we should as well. He created us to be creative beings. Being stuck and stagnant is not the will of God. Move and grow with Him. Be flexible and let God get you out of your comfort zone. He doesn't promise it will be easy...but what He does promise is He will always be with you.

#2
Forgive
Forgive the people who hurt you. Forgive yourself and the dumb things you have done. The bad choices you have made that have kept you up at night. You can't create new things if you keep looking back. So forgive, move forward and be open to What's New.

#3
Be Courageous
Having courage in the times we live in is Vital.
Courageous people can change the trajectory of an outcome. They break through and change history.
Legends are made when we choose to be Brave.

I'm excited about the future and creating.
Blank slate, fresh start, baking from scratch...
Hope you will follow me on this new adventure.
Blessings Gigi

name: Autism Health
subject: Join Us for Our Hearts & Vines Fundraiser...
body:
Hearts & Vines Wine Tasting Fundraiser!

Please save the date for our Hearts & Vines Fundraiser, an elegant evening benefiting Autism Health Inc., proudly sponsored by Sunstone Winery (https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/sunstonewinery.com/b43o/UyjDAQ/AQ/f8513561-dcd7-450f-a353-5cb85e0a34b4/1/f9JioyOvZg?mc_cid=3b658327bd&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

Join us on Saturday, February 21st, from 5 PM to 9 PM PST, in San Marcos, CA for a special night of community, connection, and purpose. Guests will enjoy fine wine, delicious hors d'oeuvres, and inspiring words from Dr. Sabine Hazan, (https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/progenabiome.com/b43o/UyjDAQ/AQ/f8513561-dcd7-450f-a353-5cb85e0a34b4/2/sak2t38NXe?mc_cid=3b658327bd&mc_eid=UNIQID) Dr. Dayan Goodenowe (https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/drgoodenowe.com/b43o/UyjDAQ/AQ/f8513561-dcd7-450f-a353-5cb85e0a34b4/3/OowK20dfD_?mc_cid=3b658327bd&mc_eid=UNIQID) , and Gabrielle Traub (https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/www.sandiegohomeopathy.com%2Fstaff.htm/b43o/UyjDAQ/AQ/f8513561-dcd7-450f-a353-5cb85e0a34b4/4/b2sK8SqKYx?mc_cid=3b658327bd&mc_eid=UNIQID) , who will share insights on fecal transplant, plasmalogens, homeopathy, autism, health, and the most up-to-date research.

Tickets are $95 and include wine, hors d'oeuvres, and a complimentary wine glass.

This intimate fundraising event supports Autism Health Inc.’s mission to advance education, research, and resources for families impacted by autism and neurological disorders.

We look forward to sharing this meaningful evening with you.
REGISTER HERE (https://givebutter.com/2026_HnV?gbtid=f3ff79e2-33f6-4022-869c-2756e1795e1f&mc_cid=3b658327bd&mc_eid=UNIQID)

Autism Support Group this Wednesday!

We invite you to join our Autism Support Group on Wednesday, February 4th at 5:00 PM PST / 8:00 PM EST for a meaningful evening of connection, education, and community. These support groups are designed to provide a safe, welcoming space for parents, caregivers, and individuals impacted by autism and other neurological conditions to share experiences, ask questions, and feel supported on their journey.

We are honored to welcome Dr. Brian Hooker & Dr. Krishna Doniparthi as our guest speakers for this session. This will be a great opportunity to engage and ask questions to knowledgeable doctors in the field of autism.

Whether you are just beginning your journey or have been advocating for your loved one for many years, this group offers a safe place to learn, connect, and grow together. We look forward to seeing you there!
REGISTER HERE (https://autismhealth.com/support/?mc_cid=3b658327bd&mc_eid=UNIQID)

** The 2026 Autism Health Summit is Almost Here!
------------------------------------------------------------

April 24–26, 2026 | Legacy Center Resort & Spa | San Diego, California

The Autism Health Summit is our flagship educational event, bringing together leading voices in research, medicine, advocacy, and integrative health for three powerful days of learning, connection, and collaboration. This annual gathering is designed for parents, practitioners, researchers, and advocates who are seeking deeper insight into autism and neurological health from a whole-body, whole-family perspective.

We are honored to welcome an extraordinary lineup of speakers, including Aaron Siri, Del Bigtree, Dr. Toby Rogers, Dr. Sabine Hazan, Dr. Dayan Goodenowe, Ed Clay, and many more respected experts and thought leaders. Together, they will explore cutting-edge research, clinical insights, environmental factors, and practical strategies that families and professionals can use. For a full list of speakers, click HERE to see our agenda (https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/track.pstmrk.it%2F3s%2Fahsconference.com%252Fagenda%252F%2Fb43o%2FXYvCAQ%2FAQ%2Ffb66b930-9caa-4773-b075-95fc5d58a8e8%2F1%2FeR-lkap3k2/b43o/UyjDAQ/AQ/f8513561-dcd7-450f-a353-5cb85e0a34b4/7/8kbkkceIBx?mc_cid=3b658327bd&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

Use discount code AHS25 to receive $25 off your in-person ticket.

The Summit will be held at the beautiful Legacy Center Resort & Spa (https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/track.pstmrk.it%2F3s%2Flegacyresortandspa.com%2Fb43o%2FXYvCAQ%2FAQ%2Ffb66b930-9caa-4773-b075-95fc5d58a8e8%2F2%2FcmuIWlIP_Q/b43o/UyjDAQ/AQ/f8513561-dcd7-450f-a353-5cb85e0a34b4/8/xPQn4V-5o2?mc_cid=3b658327bd&mc_eid=UNIQID) , where attendees can book a room at a special group rate of $199/night with no additional resort fee. To reserve your room, please use the conference room block link HERE (https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/track.pstmrk.it%2F3s%2Fahsconference.com%252Fhotel%252F%2Fb43o%2FXYvCAQ%2FAQ%2Ffb66b930-9caa-4773-b075-95fc5d58a8e8%2F3%2FR1Eh7nj6ve/b43o/UyjDAQ/AQ/f8513561-dcd7-450f-a353-5cb85e0a34b4/9/NlfwmlPFuq?mc_cid=3b658327bd&mc_eid=UNIQID) or call (619) 782-9155 and use block code: Autism26.

About Autism Health Inc.
Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events, research, and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.

clean_body: Hearts & Vines Wine Tasting Fundraiser! Please save the date for our Hearts & Vines Fundraiser, an elegant evening benefiting Autism Health Inc., proudly sponsored by Sunstone Winery () . Join us on Saturday, February 21st, from 5 PM to 9 PM PST, in San Marcos, CA for a special night of community, connection, and purpose. Guests will enjoy fine wine, delicious hors d'oeuvres, and inspiring words from Dr. Sabine Hazan, () Dr. Dayan Goodenowe () , and Gabrielle Traub () , who will share insights on fecal transplant, plasmalogens, homeopathy, autism, health, and the most up-to-date research. Tickets are $95 and include wine, hors d'oeuvres, and a complimentary wine glass. This intimate fundraising event supports Autism Health Inc.’s mission to advance education, research, and resources for families impacted by autism and neurological disorders. We look forward to sharing this meaningful evening with you. REGISTER HERE () Autism Support Group this Wednesday! We invite you to join our Autism Support Group on Wednesday, February 4th at 5:00 PM PST / 8:00 PM EST for a meaningful evening of connection, education, and community. These support groups are designed to provide a safe, welcoming space for parents, caregivers, and individuals impacted by autism and other neurological conditions to share experiences, ask questions, and feel supported on their journey. We are honored to welcome Dr. Brian Hooker & Dr. Krishna Doniparthi as our guest speakers for this session. This will be a great opportunity to engage and ask questions to knowledgeable doctors in the field of autism. Whether you are just beginning your journey or have been advocating for your loved one for many years, this group offers a safe place to learn, connect, and grow together. We look forward to seeing you there! REGISTER HERE () The 2026 Autism Health Summit is Almost Here! April 24–26, 2026 | Legacy Center Resort & Spa | San Diego, California The Autism Health Summit is our flagship educational event, bringing together leading voices in research, medicine, advocacy, and integrative health for three powerful days of learning, connection, and collaboration. This annual gathering is designed for parents, practitioners, researchers, and advocates who are seeking deeper insight into autism and neurological health from a whole-body, whole-family perspective. We are honored to welcome an extraordinary lineup of speakers, including Aaron Siri, Del Bigtree, Dr. Toby Rogers, Dr. Sabine Hazan, Dr. Dayan Goodenowe, Ed Clay, and many more respected experts and thought leaders. Together, they will explore cutting-edge research, clinical insights, environmental factors, and practical strategies that families and professionals can use. For a full list of speakers, click HERE to see our agenda () . Use discount code AHS25 to receive $25 off your in-person ticket. The Summit will be held at the beautiful Legacy Center Resort & Spa () , where attendees can book a room at a special group rate of $199/night with no additional resort fee. To reserve your room, please use the conference room block link HERE () or call (619) 782-9155 and use block code: Autism26. We are deeply grateful to our top sponsors for their continued support and leadership: Cellular Performance Institute (CPI) () , Dr. Goodenowe Enterprises () , European Wellness () , and Satellite Phone Store () . Their commitment helps make this event possible and supports ongoing education and outreach within the autism community. We look forward to welcoming you to San Diego for an unforgettable weekend of education, empowerment, and community. REGISTER HERE () We also extend our sincere thanks to our Silver, Health, and Wellness Sponsors whose generosity and shared mission strengthen this work, including Functional Genomic Analysis () , Neuro Needs () , Microbiome Research Foundation () , NutraMedix () , Relax Saunas () , MAHA Action () , Best EMF Products () , ARCC Center () , Children's Health Defense () , myMico Lab () , Life Wave and Brain Tap () , Daylight Computer () , Weston A. Price Foundation () , VibraTec Plates () , Sun Power LED () , Stalwart Law Group () , Doniparthi Neurogen Academy () , Kadiant () , Algonot () , Informed Policy Advocates () , Micronic Silver () , SPELLERS () , Spectrum Sciences LLC () , The Wellness Blanket () , Xlear () , Vicar Venetia () , Sabre Defense Team () , Pur Health, LLC () , Warrior Mom () , Purium () , C-Polar Technologies () , OxyHealth () , and Physicians for Informed Consent () . Most sponsorship levels are sold out, but we have a limited number of Health & Wellness Sponsorships still available for those interested in exhibiting. For more information about becoming a sponsor, email us at info@autismhealth.com (mailto:info@autismhealth.com) . SPONSOR REGISTRATION () About Autism Health Inc. Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events, research, and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders. DONATE HERE () Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance! For more information about Autism Health, visit www.AutismHealth.com ( 252525252Fb43o%2525252525252525252FqzvAAQ%2525252525252525252FAQ%2525252525252525252F9cdab8a9-9431-46cb-bc6b-9b55d5b197a9%2525252525252525252F12%2525252525252525252FLxT2mF6Na2%25252525252525252Fb43o%25252525252525252FR2-AAQ%25252525252525252FAQ%25252525252525252F80757fed-d17a-46c6-8605-a231839e63a6%25252525252525252F9%25252525252525252FdIy1xhXJbE%252525252525252Fb43o%252525252525252FCYvAAQ%252525252525252FAQ%252525252525252F8856f6b3-bc40-410c-9337-2cebc04a0fcd%252525252525252F7%252525252525252F2RcF8rumnp%2525252525252Fb43o%2525252525252FkbLAAQ%2525252525252FAQ%2525252525252Ff7d6fa0a-20e2-477e-a570-623d10204b1a%2525252525252F6%2525252525252FAxGuQRLoxM%25252525252Fb43o%25252525252FJwHBAQ%25252525252FAQ%25252525252Fffabaf5a-0dd3-40f0-8f9e-125d607f5a17%25252525252F6%25252525252FvwjRz3mz0v%252525252Fb43o%252525252F3yjBAQ%252525252FAQ%252525252F64fb26b1-c1cf-47e9-8578-e7dae6d58208%252525252F7%252525252F-hIbIVc8mX%2525252Fb43o%2525252F9E-BAQ%2525252FAQ%2525252F7f0072a0-d60b-40ba-b5d6-bdd309c2553c% 2525252F9%2525252FEqwPy0k95q%25252Fb43o%25252FUHfBAQ%25252FAQ%25252F6f0c2239-f98b-4847-b8ba-270f35e17c24%25252F6%25252FpIhvuiJAb4%252Fb43o%252F2J7BAQ%252FAQ%252Fb841fdc9-b437-4dfa-abcb-6b79907d097f%252F7%252F0XZcutREy-%2Fb43o%2FpqnBAQ%2FAQ%2F66d1d4e1-7937-4b2a-9bdd-d1357c1bf5a6%2F5%2F6N-7mP4vYt/b43o/wcXBAQ/AQ/71aa608d-5f41-4eb7-8877-052adb2a290a/4/6ItnRaDBz6) . | | Fellow Patriot,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2f0e1a58a37b42a08fdb95c208ded3cf&_e=ADApwjIlBmaFQvHayfzFACSux00528K_lXeekEuK3PVw8WRMs13hir0NpmxLxvrAcJliWb_rVq9VS_xE3CaE3rsM9RH4uDGfcrvtjo4zQMSe5E6msJBSFtcJgCuKPPCVmSD6nyON014cUA8W6c4jaCRznNL7vWeaaKf5zOP8jkJzrPm_76gowu3yluvURSHUuZh_Y_K30ZYmsJW43U5Aifs-DdySMS0H8hwNJNvlUs_XtHMK5jG1WHGtxJe5x_f6euCsGbQVtJhiHwWWQVEJlC3o0cs5QrwTQD88osQ5LJHOCa_9pwS0UFbICe_kM-s-OEE4UwO2RqoTcAeObAeNgE1mrSdLlZMVSrjJfeh0iMi8pDdkYo8NSur64hc6cFJlbSMwkYTc-isQ0O2udsIeBI8HFRhK-ks9uMvJsQE1vrtuxJsRuf9Ermrg9fEYvdPL-2bHM9da4OLnBLclNUfQq3qB1Z2JnXA_Iz6gKhh5N13Zd8wI_VxYvlVRf7xzxfwFnsIexqxh_47AYe0Odi3YiZ3qi90tIHMY6KxufsagI7wDf8BYN9A7cri1v6iySTFgjfyWAPdKLvDnukrKB0g2VE3Hzt3Mug8dCPiHzpXEfG_kPUzT29cyiJkS5zryk62GwzRgrtqsTs1zciBXkn5QglCRzwJdl0BcvArHyFdj93I3vt9UUZ6JN32mljWYBBRD)
---
This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust.

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

**[And right now, when you make a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA, we’ll send you a copy — as our thank-you for carrying Charlie’s mission forward.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2f0e1a58a37b42a08fdb95c208ded3cf&_e=ADApwjIlBmaFQvHayfzFACSux00528K_lXeekEuK3PVw8WRMs13hir0NpmxLxvrAcJliWb_rVq9VS_xE3CaE3rsM9RH4uDGfcrvtjo4zQMSe5E6msJBSFtcJgCuKPPCVmSD6nyON014cUA8W6c4jaCRznNL7vWeaaKf5zOP8jkJzrPm_76gowu3yluvURSHUuZh_Y_K30ZYmsJW43U5Aifs-DdySMS0H8hwNJNvlUs8jxx6b7uBDgUnGe6WdAsNemidIdit7oJYaX6Cw4m0DUbWw2IQJvUqDatSy722W_Z4z3PSoS4zMEPx7uyzE7kB3qZfiIxHFLdHMGUPnuvh1exzLjkEYQSpb40qBtedYLZEyyWainFrm9o8ed0CXh_FTMCK-1Ox6P2M3C1Fo29G7tJQnqNunQXXNdoYhzix2AWDxxsrt2CBdvBcy5ifLyJ56lIP_BLfLfBm5fQl7s77E-DhtFS3yVyJePLZ7Yf7-51vTNG1Iz5wNuB7yesXm3LwNvmmVx4n7J_U5UuMcO2Xcr8Ud-WCdUDZQjvxx5r2TowFraWrATwHn4wyxay0Iz5HPnEY00tkHN6B6Ejtw8oP0gMyB5e1RNGnBze4ZlB8sAUzrddP4TFMcLSdLmRd_1KPe71desHZF3e46GDKj5pv_MB_DGLDptYvGK4VAMInPNVA7wBHwuNg89DuQm28fruPJ)**

---
Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2f0e1a58a37b42a08fdb95c208ded3cf&_e=ADApwjIlBmaFQvHayfzFACSux00528K_lXeekEuK3PVw8WRMs13hir0NpmxLxvrAcJliWb_rVq9VS_xE3CaE3rsM9RH4uDGfcrvtjo4zQMSe5E6msJBSFtcJgCuKPPCVmSD6nyON014cUA8W6c4jaCRznNL7vWeaaKf5zOP8jkJzrPm_76gowu3yluvURSHUuZh_Y_K30ZYmsJW43U5Aifs-DdySMS0H8hwNJNvlUs8MoTS_2QpT_R8TnNrQaZYz0h8d6rJB_IpHW510lxGwO_KNJLYiRohPc3BaX91OfPP635WEX51r9ypP4ap-NdkoAWhG2hnIewlK0mMMwZUeYdp3HxEvAU-a4KlS_8mIMb9rCgZ80Ja3S1flIXYlc3xPmnFfd1bi14bgflVx_udhtxNyqLjwOg6kcDsNelVCqhhISr-WQFMZvxe2f2IvxDflTtgRRs3Weuxf7SGV1rYBPYH4HtmQKjH8uK-IhtvOJKF8sLrgdDmf2KLzHz9qdKBN-62lRUWfmDUnQSXtyUzDtTgRCbuK66BL5Vhh3BPcCQTKChEF2UrGFaIMFBbnRuIBjSpSVKV6oKrh9HDftukvPUJ0Wr5k3Yb8ZO2eTuiO_8e3JCW5kDwXup8QJgI6RdMidUge0BeEmWHKUtwuXQwgX5noQkmDK07loutm8A-ZIREXCizZO_Hw1XqXWVGryQdv)**

clean_body: ...no matter what| | | | | Fellow Patriot, | | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: | Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are now cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A vengeful Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN this trial is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’ve officially filed a NEW Defense Trust in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me more power to fight the Democrats' vindictive attempt to imprison me for LIFE. And now, I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my new Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Peter, I miss you…
body:
I’d really appreciate it if you opened this email

| | | | Alright, Peter, I’m just going to cut to the chase and say it: I MISS YOU!
For years, you’ve stood by me: stepping in when I needed it most and even generously contributing your hard-earned money to advance our conservative agenda.
**_And now, Peter, I’m asking you to stand with me once more... because this fight is far from over!_** **_
_** Together, we were victorious in 2024, but as we head into the midterms, we will need to work twice as hard to maintain our Republican majority and continue providing President Trump with the fuel he needs to Make America Great Again.
Can I count on you again, Peter?
This isn’t a routine update; [it’s the most important thing you’ll read today:](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI2MDIwM182RS1KSS4xMTAxMTdfdDE4MTAyMTgtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNjAyMDNfNkUtSkkuMTEwMTE3X3QxODEwMjE4LTEwNDMifQ/l4QA-xO3suzSE7bgp1zBWQ) | [ READ HERE >> ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI2MDIwM182RS1KSS4xMTAxMTdfdDE4MTAyMTgtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNjAyMDNfNkUtSkkuMTEwMTE3X3QxODEwMjE4LTEwNDMifQ/eGemp6JWh_tWbqOqBirazA)

| | Dear Fellow American,

America's story is written not just in ink -- but in the stone, soil, and battlefields where freedom was born.

Yet today, too many of America's sacred places have been captured by the radical Left. Leftist radicals use them to indoctrinate unsuspecting citizens and tell a false version of American history.

That's why The Heritage Foundation created _**The Heritage Guide to Historic Sites**_ -- a free, digital resource featuring **45 historic locations** across the United States that tell the true story of America through the places where it happened.

Each site is carefully reviewed for historical accuracy, rated from **A to C** , so you can know which tours tell the truth -- and which distort it.

From Independence Hall to Jamestown, from Mount Vernon to Yorktown, this guide helps patriotic Americans reconnect with our founding ideals and preserve them for the next generation.

Access your free guide at the link below:

[https://secured.heritage.org/digital-guide-to-the-most-historic-sites/](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/W0_L9hkB3Do1iCc1_fJnt5DYmYt-UQ8jBNse4wm_F1wO63Csu0di-vcHRqbs1mW6mWPfVYCL2dMrJzQAfoCBcL4RP4HDOaUbNRK5EJG28XOTKXv4Wu2fKWr3Mcuf4-40wzuSMQvj3KzEaFsaimaihJ2PtoQM2Nlx0DFAQn_HOL1TqnCHnVvWegZ1D8euPzSNplx_lbwAS6Mj3nlEYc4CBjUnQDRzeskMBooAXL1yLLMcw-BWc6hWeJAkfpOU0WDkSxuE7TuiqP_Vf0UddSS7MPdo5Pp4m3jUfTx1VbMDhFCOxETZhY0C3UVxbw9dM2SAhcmmmdMBo-TMiFzt1gV8kyEjKaq35WWOfQZTLz5fxHBtO35VFTZCaKa6ST-GyDnR-bBHwAllDkNh4jsZcg0f_wrN128x5dKkYhvyvPhUjkpPyxV8kqyDrtyam3xHq0vKixi-SKWp7P1kMBZn1DLPmVok0gQRcw8pl0ub088DDe1zQkFE2vN8oa9R2b2PMJUGT50TDWClRdXcnEXZVBzozdSk0_jwLIc3DjmoNsV6Es412dDUWGorI7-f0yv3v4BdLz3qbqtnnE9MCZc26w65wtqp4pFovqJbbMtlghVB2kOpzt4d_Jx6vwvfVs3jQFrVOwy_Dq1V2uNCDEJtvzwqnxFyd_mp2s_NbemdCOxnDYJvenPmuSjpcZ049ZB3T2aQ_MGQBNXv3ukzM9iJ1oTiHC3tav3iuYptypvinysmn4pz/UK2ddWJILA6pzVArYBs9N3ubtiQSqsZ7/17)

Thank you for standing with Heritage to keep America's story alive -- and true.

Best,

Tony Johnson

Director of Membership

clean_body: America’s story is written not just in ink — but in the stone, soil, and battlefields where freedom was born. | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | | Dear Fellow American, America's story is written not just in ink -- but in the stone, soil, and battlefields where freedom was born. Yet today, too many of America's sacred places have been captured by the radical Left. Leftist radicals use them to indoctrinate unsuspecting citizens and tell a false version of American history. That's why The Heritage Foundation created The Heritage Guide to Historic Sites -- a free, digital resource featuring 45 historic locations across the United States that tell the true story of America through the places where it happened. Each site is carefully reviewed for historical accuracy, rated from A to C , so you can know which tours tell the truth -- and which distort it. From Independence Hall to Jamestown, from Mount Vernon to Yorktown, this guide helps patriotic Americans reconnect with our founding ideals and preserve them for the next generation. Access your free guide at the link below: Thank you for standing with Heritage to keep America's story alive -- and true. Best, Tony Johnson Director of Membership P.S. Share this free guide with family or friends who love America's history: The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: It’s Representative Ayanna Pressley’s birthday!
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20260203-1892-foote&t=1001&akid=1892%2E342411%2Ee7mF53 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

It’s Representative Ayanna Pressley’s birthday!

Ayanna is a bold, unapologetic leader who has never backed down from
fighting for her community or for working people across this country. From
demanding justice and equity to speaking truth to power, she brings
courage and clarity to everything she does — and she makes the Squad
stronger because of it.

To celebrate, the Squad Victory Fund is putting together a birthday card
filled with messages from supporters like you — people who believe in
Ayanna’s leadership and stand with her in the fights that matter most.

Every note is a reminder that she’s not in this alone. There’s a
nationwide movement behind her, grateful for her voice and ready to keep
pushing for change together.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Ken Nunnenkamp Executive Director, RPV | == \- PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA

Team: On April 7, **Wisconsin voters will decide between progressive Wisconsin Court of Appeals Judge Chris Taylor and conservative Court of Appeals Judge Maria Lazar** in a race that will impact the ideological balance of the court, which currently has a 4-3 split. Wisconsin Supreme Court elections are technically non-partisan, but the impact the results will have for the upcoming midterms is huge. Why? **The balance of the court has widespread ramifications for voting rights, civil rights, and a slew of other state policy implications**. State Supreme Courts like this one are also often the final arbiters of election disputes, as we saw in both the 2020 and 2022 elections. There have been a number of these Supreme Court elections in Wisconsin the last few years, and those results have pushed the court to take a more pro-voter, pro-democracy stance. **The outcome of this year's election will determine whether Wisconsin expands that progressive majority** or if the court slides back towards the suppressive policies of Wisconsin's recent past. **[Team: Turnout is key and we have to get the word out to make sure every defender of voting rights gets to the polls. Help supercharge our efforts with $35 or whatever you can right now to inform voters in Wisconsin and beyond>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124656480/599280188/-1725532854?refcode=020326_1&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0Y2E1ZWFmLTMyMDEtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F_z_xyk_wS14ySd9LjaTyHz0zC4Ih-2igpwR9VZCsyo=)**

clean_body: PBS: Maria Lazar and Chris Taylor face off in the 2026 election for an open Wisconsin Supreme Court seat| | | | | | | = Team: On April 7, Wisconsin voters will decide between progressive Wisconsin Court of Appeals Judge Chris Taylor and conservative Court of Appeals Judge Maria Lazar in a race that will impact the ideological balance of the court, which currently has a 4-3 split. Wisconsin Supreme Court elections are technically non-partisan, but the impact the results will have for the upcoming midterms is huge. Why? The balance of the court has widespread ramifications for voting rights, civil rights, and a slew of other state policy implications. State Supreme Courts like this one are also often the final arbiters of election disputes, as we saw in both the 2020 and 2022 elections. There have been a number of these Supreme Court elections in Wisconsin the last few years, and those results have pushed the court to take a more pro-voter, pro-democracy stance. The outcome of this year's election will determine whether Wisconsin expands that progressive majority or if the court slides back towards the suppressive policies of Wisconsin's recent past. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | | In 2023 progressive judge Janet Protasiewicz won a similar race and flipped the balance of the Wisconsin Supreme Court, giving the state a 4-3 pro-voting rights majority. In 2025 Susan Crawford held off a MAGA push -- led by millions of dollars invested by Elon Musk \-- to keep the court 4-3. Now Wisconsin has a chance to expand that majority, solidifying the recent pro-democracy gains, like undoing one of the most highly gerrymandered maps in the country. Opponents of voting rights know what this race means. From attacks on mail-in voting to suppressive citizenship proof requirements to legalized partisan election interference , suppressive state legislators in states across the country are trying their best to harm our fundamental right to vote. clean_body: | | | ** The cracks are showing. In the aftermath of the shooting, Top White House Aide Stephen Miller, just hours after the shooting, labeled Veterans Affairs ICU nurse Alex Pretti a “would-be assassin,” but now has changed course. Stephen Miller has now said, “We are evaluating why the CBP team may not have been following that protocol.” This is a huge victory. It is the first acknowledgment of possible wrongdoing from the Trump administration’s architect on immigration enforcement. "Commander-Operation At Large," Gregory Bovino has been ousted, and there is finally momentum for accountability happening. The cracks are showing, and Cedar Key Progress is not slowing down. We are expanding our billboard campaign across the country. Thanks for your support, Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: Mai Vang
subject: Join our Field Team Today!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAI VANG FOR CONGRESS
body:
View our upcoming canvassing and field events!

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
We are **119 days away from election day** and Team Mai for Congress is knocking doors every day to make sure as many people as possible hear about our campaign to transform our region. We hope to knock over 60,000 doors before June 2 and we still have a long way to go! We are continuing the momentum this week in El Dorado, Elk Grove and the Pocket.There’s no doubt we will be outspent by our opponents, but we know that canvassing and people power are the most effective ways to reach out to neighbors! Check out our upcoming canvasses and join us for the field events below!**👉Check out and RSVP for our upcoming canvasses and phone banks!****2/04 -** [Wednesday Canvassing in South Land Park](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=d531fb6f8c&e=dd5af5b7b1)**2/05 -**[ Thursday Canvassing in Elk Grove](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=4a94f55112&e=dd5af5b7b1)**2/06 -**[ Saturday Canvassing in El Dorado](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=eed623d2f2&e=dd5af5b7b1)**2/10 -** [Tuesday Phonebank](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=36ea3ff2dd&e=dd5af5b7b1)**👉Can’t make these dates? Sign up for future canvasses, neighborhood canvassing, and phone banking below!**

* [ Future canvasses](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=ffee073c0e&e=dd5af5b7b1)
* [Neighborhood Canvassing](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=6948007454&e=dd5af5b7b1)

If you have any questions regarding field activities, please contact [field@maiforus.com](mailto:field@maiforus.com). We hope to see you out there!

---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
With Deep Gratitude, **~ Team Mai**

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6e6ce4dec9e64263b7253738643a769a&_e=ROgw2k3X1AWaJQjyj42v3DPHgoP4OfZPCtfcNzAA3DwtNY2wy7j3WdZYssHDgTN5WzUG4Tee8NGL6sFXS-cRhin03KtEc5oGOLhnbVS_xu1Vyn0lDnm46sZoThEzKpoXgFa6C7H0xRMmP4qe4IFD35c9QpGfAR_GwYYlsy_T-5p_kwgPWh3r9kFA3PTWwhu3q-qb-uCpFsMJlBWTpWQFM1dUPEMaJS771n5IC0xUBnI1VQdEGuuai2Hun6dSS1T9eA0k5vrArjRURNObINWJgd5nNeP-qOVeVCCSwHSIfmyZoMIGKBJT0c-a-GG1fput4NzRmXm9L96xu3CvULRueY2-W-lw37phuvOhXvMzduGzBCO0G21Ocm0mlwAARS_m57z9SHPrAFTqm127ZmW3zwRw5cpN3WQH_tTqyzwJ4nUNCj-U12KDdOFMRdmkG15PlET_qK7ozYO0JwYBGuHOz5CYT_pv8NJ21JMInD-aQGhmArhwXweah9G_Vx2x2n8UEj6Sl2cDJ3ZKCsifDe_WIIOPLXjma5qHZZptm3G2-ZvanRLMNe78rzHGfQWiIYJZHdFDXU2HWpNhuvAJlYzyYbORK9RluBXdtf9YqLSX0ettzyWfgIy5noQHEXMP5BylZeoNqmQ0QPF3JjIMXqIQ_V8GceQXgR57U7nxKTbRUpmF-AsO1ez5krCm67VCtI7hw1Zb-dKR-lNsIcONk4B8TMuMbKTw45p_50I8MIgFpWXADnZRw8_vMaLc011tnuRsQEzo58hZvHqtg_KWBe1RWQMNfkEBuARXGpr2pUCG8dimwPHOmlKLUSLG5h3-SLK_LmM5mQBMOcFTkjo8QIwLWg%3D%3D)Folks - **
**This is Michele Tafoya. **
**I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I'm running for United States Senate here in Minnesota.**
**I 'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before. But I made this decision because my state has fallen so far from grace in such a short amount of time. I know if every rational, commonsense, patriotic American comes together, we can pull off the unthinkable and win this seat.
[Will you become one of the FIRST donors to my Senate campaign?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6e6ce4dec9e64263b7253738643a769a&_e=ROgw2k3X1AWaJQjyj42v3DPHgoP4OfZPCtfcNzAA3DwtNY2wy7j3WdZYssHDgTN5WzUG4Tee8NGL6sFXS-cRhin03KtEc5oGOLhnbVS_xu1Vyn0lDnm46sZoThEzKpoXgFa6C7H0xRMmP4qe4IFD35c9QpGfAR_GwYYlsy_T-5p_kwgPWh3r9kFA3PTWwhu3q-qb-uCpFsMJlBWTpWQFM1dUPEMaJS771n5IC0xUBnI1VQdEGuuai2Hun6dSS1T9eA0k5vrArjRURNObINWJgd5nNeP-qOVeVCCSwHSIfmyZoMIGKBJT0c-a-GG1fputdjmVxLdr21rgFdyegkM18zS3KUwNh4HFZ1FfAfi_VlKHSHeMnIiQL8hKxyb_pGK9L8LfvBQSrrCQQvGNE1M6fUy2YNVdA_dQM6JlR0j2PHyGIP8AtmocqQIMLGawaffC_abElXagtWJdZs_7NWKkSR4iKDGHx5whHdX0VMnB5CzLoG4e1HVSTOrUAlHQVF3OiJBH_sRgxq6fqNd4X16CL6dGdJ1jFIsDLxiPr9CbYbQNToo11k-2ovviqt2NSVxnUp5N1URl_QO7sfiL7bjDhXut3NB-w7V0p2lXQwAHT1R0NgXiZacofbh3yObthIMrcY1SjgJ7xUsOilYwEmxoABwWinMMtT29RZ8r0GdEeoVFxj68AuQS-W9pk0cqvz5XPCJP4xgoH42e1WmzzeJQ3FkLwOLoJOqS53KDavAz74xew0cnagUWGzbJ-4QKTkZ60cWHZjVQpZE1LcRzh3mum6XKzOO3w4GWhk8Y8MupOdFUG4CxWxBK6gBbs16-hyLTwAn5XJpQ05C5Ih4UgwQGOg%3D%3D)[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR
](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6e6ce4dec9e64263b7253738643a769a&_e=ROgw2k3X1AWaJQjyj42v3DPHgoP4OfZPCtfcNzAA3DwtNY2wy7j3WdZYssHDgTN5WzUG4Tee8NGL6sFXS-cRhin03KtEc5oGOLhnbVS_xu1Vyn0lDnm46sZoThEzKpoXgFa6C7H0xRMmP4qe4IFD35c9QpGfAR_GwYYlsy_T-5p_kwgPWh3r9kFA3PTWwhu3q-qb-uCpFsMJlBWTpWQFM1dUPEMaJS771n5IC0xUBnI1VQdEGuuai2Hun6dSS1T9eA0k5vrArjRURNObINWJgd5nNeP-qOVeVCCSwHSIfmyZoMIGKBJT0c-a-GG1fputUOD8t76ALwQKSVv4f2crwICEQZMMi0i0AKAg60WCCgkzEAnOliZ37Y2lojsMbOsLd7fNAOVoQMPLh4i5wv44pKltEbRY5JKyxaDnpMReodsgVYWZ321des10xYO5D0HjMiIaWDS828dNDQuIIwtRWksZeGIoP9bWAY2V24uY02EWoE_o-kogsrHjrg2V8a6MEso7ectIr_NDyPlF2k7gnL1525Mz-5IIJz5QwBE2JxNYzwcWQ96A5ntIuGRt_nmOWHXzxOxISPV20D5rNQ3Bw84aeZyH3yyojpap0X61c0hrGw8tRV5TC2mB77taBH1LLLgdXp6h_2Mnk5n7LhPMXqwSvZLFIxdwhonbhUkd50wKfxHnSfZ9exA9N0EkQut1UulRp5yDHJFMXL5IHomS8QpqU1_Vg9Z59wlrI4UnnbGexEYfvBVE6Z1ao9tzzbKXwgVGUsI5ZdQJgTR-Pq1BuSms4fQVPovuSD5Ce0RnmVCRs8WgitbMJ84q-5q9GGWnbdGzHhLWuLMuwnJebVFryw%3D%3D)Imagine the look on Tim Walz's face when voters reject his handpicked candidate and elect a Republican for the first time in 20 years!
Here's what I'm picturing... [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6e6ce4dec9e64263b7253738643a769a&_e=ROgw2k3X1AWaJQjyj42v3DPHgoP4OfZPCtfcNzAA3DwtNY2wy7j3WdZYssHDgTN5WzUG4Tee8NGL6sFXS-cRhin03KtEc5oGOLhnbVS_xu1Vyn0lDnm46sZoThEzKpoXgFa6C7H0xRMmP4qe4IFD35c9QpGfAR_GwYYlsy_T-5p_kwgPWh3r9kFA3PTWwhu3q-qb-uCpFsMJlBWTpWQFM1dUPEMaJS771n5IC0xUBnI1VQdEGuuai2Hun6dSS1T9eA0k5vrArjRURNObINWJgd5nNeP-qOVeVCCSwHSIfmyZoMIGKBJT0c-a-GG1fputDFTz4LSBgcV379RX2vS_GTqEzo4f4mwxjka_rq5bDm9PI9KGCJe1ZrNL-P0OdVG6xYux6U0v1Hm0kMMiuFcBYEJBLQZy_zcHBEZ7xSNaBGQkzyeS0J-tZMpcHg8U9xmzVJJc2SZJFRDXIM4pP_j11xOZuQwxbjytwTx81du9UDrkkpFLlcpUZ_2R2USah4A7M0zvrXiasYnpZqUCIj9ktKlCfGHmHxw4kCGOjSyGlNo7euAwGhKTtb7XT0D8l6EAfeVzFrnCt82TPXEUuzR4iMpYAguGIqttozWSKWW1rc42JMYnOKw92m2JP9tfOfvEBffxyHvKYD-6qqFIoCMsPx4Kr1pmtupZQ0wH6EUOhf7iWWtowKO_LmDSHVS3UjIZ800yahxbMtJclGSWK97xr45BfF4gwhRuCwgn_I8dcNZjmCrqx5_pklgYJE23M37WFCq3PHXi_M3lJjtJ-RfqlRI5FrzBskfAcPFrX01RF8PP7wOktkI3lJ5kemlkQYzj-rncsxerfiZELuSWl48uxg%3D%3D)It won't be easy going toe-to-toe with the DC power brokers and career politicians, but it'll be worth it when we make history together. Trust me. We have the opportunity of a LIFETIME to flip this seat, and I've never been one to give up when the going gets tough. **
**I have a hunch you aren 't either. **
**That 's why folks like you will make the difference between a disappointing defeat and a historic victory. **

clean_body: I’m running for the United States Senate here in Minnesota. - This is Michele Tafoya. I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I'm running for United States Senate here in Minnesota. I 'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before. But I made this decision because my state has fallen so far from grace in such a short amount of time. I know if every rational, commonsense, patriotic American comes together, we can pull off the unthinkable and win this seat. the look on Tim Walz's face when voters reject his handpicked candidate and elect a Republican for the first time in 20 years! Here's what I'm picturing... won't be easy going toe-to-toe with the DC power brokers and career politicians, but it'll be worth it when we make history together. Trust me. We have the opportunity of a LIFETIME to flip this seat, and I've never been one to give up when the going gets tough. I have a hunch you aren 't either. That 's why folks like you will make the difference between a disappointing defeat and a historic victory. Thanks for all you do! Be brave. Do good. - Michele TafoyaRepublican for Senate, Minnesota official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! Endorse her here:**| | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447

name: Phil Weiser
subject: Our immediate to-do list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
Our next governor will have a long to-do list, friends

Before I ask you to chip in to our grassroots campaign [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_wei_em_fr_feb], I’d like to explain what just a few of my immediate priorities will be as governor of Colorado:

✔️ Standing up to Trump.
As your attorney general, I’ve taken the lawless Trump administration to court 52+ times and counting — and we are winning again and again. When I’m your governor, if Trump wants to harm the people of Colorado, he’ll have to go through me.
✔️ Affordable housing and communities.
We all need a safe place to live. I’ll protect renters from unfair practices, support first-time home-buyers, boost the number of homes Coloradans can afford, and much more.
✔️ Investments in our public schools.
I’m ready to fight for the public schools we all deserve by paying our teachers a living wage, providing down payment support so they can afford homes in the communities where they work, and leading an effort at the ballot box so we can invest in K-12 schools, teachers, and our kids’ futures. And when it comes to whether Colorado should opt in to the Trump plan that will open the door to school vouchers, I am the only candidate in this race committed to opposing this challenge to public education.
✔️ Opportunities for our workforce.
We’ll connect more Coloradans with good-paying jobs through earn-and-learn programs, service opportunities in ColoradoCorps, and greater access to training programs through zero-interest loans and living stipends.
✔️ Protections for our land, air, and water.
There are no backup public lands, clean air, and clean water — these are the only resources we will ever have. I will fight to continue our transition to clean energy, develop proactive wildfire mitigation, and strengthen oversight over our water and air quality.

My time listening to and learning from neighbors like you means I understand the urgency behind these concerns — and I will never allow out-of-state billionaires to distract or sway us from them. Because this campaign is not backed by billionaires, I have to ask for your support. If you could chip in $20 to this campaign (or any amount that works for you), I’d be honored. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_wei_em_fr_feb?amount=20]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Donate $10 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_wei_em_fr_feb?express_lane=true&amount=10]
Donate $20 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_wei_em_fr_feb?express_lane=true&amount=20]
Donate $50 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_wei_em_fr_feb?express_lane=true&amount=50]
Donate $100 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_wei_em_fr_feb?express_lane=true&amount=100]
Donate $250 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_wei_em_fr_feb?express_lane=true&amount=250]
Other → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_wei_em_fr_feb]

With gratitude,

Phil

You can click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/weiserfooter?refcode=weiserfooter] to make a donation to support Phil's campaign to become Colorado's next governor. clean_body: Peter, it's Don Jr. I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for your unwavering support. My father and I know that this fight isn't possible without patriots like you who are willing to stand up for what's right. We're honored to have you on our team, Peter. | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: James Talarico for Senate
subject: Not great
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
We have a problem on our hands, and we need to ask you to make a contribution today. As a supporter of this movement, you deserve full transparency, so here’s the situation:
After our end-of-month deadline, our fundraising slowed down dramatically. You can see if for yourself in this graph from our internal ActBlue data:
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260203-1-ak&t=1&akid=429%2E1347274%2EE4xsDY)
The bars represent the amount of money raised while the purple line accounts for how many donations we receive for each day.
You can see the trend. Both metrics are headed in the wrong direction.
That leaves us with two choices. We either need a lot more individual donations or we need those who've given before to donate a larger amount than their last contribution.
Normally, we ask people who have yet to contribute to give about $5 for their first donation. But with just four weeks until the primary, we have to ask you to dig a bit deeper today.
**[If winning this seat in Texas and electing a candidate who can usher in a new era of politics in the U.S. Senate is something important to you, please rush a $10 contribution (or whatever you can afford) to James Talarico's campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260203-1-ak&t=2&akid=429%2E1347274%2EE4xsDY)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $10](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/503?c0=jt-em-2026q1.jmBlL0&amount=10&refcode=em260203-1-ak&t=3&akid=429%2E1347274%2EE4xsDY)**
---
****
| **[OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/503?c0=jt-em-2026q1.jmBlL0&refcode=em260203-1-ak&t=4&akid=429%2E1347274%2EE4xsDY)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for contributing today. James is so grateful to have you in his corner.
Team Talarico

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=5&akid=429%2E1347274%2EE4xsDY) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=6&refcode2=429_1347274_E4xsDY&akid=429%2E1347274%2EE4xsDY)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=429%2E1347274%2EE4xsDY).

subject: It's Worth Saving.

body:

I am excited to reveal that my 5th book is now available for pre-order: Trump 2.0
This is the first book to examine the consequential impact of Trump's non-sequential terms in office. His ability to come back to office after 4 year of planning and plotting -- the difference that the people, process and policies of Trump 2.0 will make and why they will be historic.
I am honored that President Trump offered to write the forward for the book -- I am excited to share it with you.
It is available for pre-sale now -- just click the link below. Pre-sales are critical to a book's success so your support is super helpful. Thank you!

## Houston (or rather, Tarrant County), we have a problem...
Over the weekend a special election for a Texas state Senate race gained national attention for all the wrong reasons.
What had been a reliable safe Republican seat was flipped - in spectacular and embarrassing fashion.
Let me get this part out of the way - I have always said special elections are special for a reason.
But, like anything else, there are always lessons learned to be taken away.
Yes, republicans had a BRUTAL primary.
Yes the Democrat was unscathed while all this happened.
Yes, weather was a factor.
But the reality is this should not have happened.
Let's break it down...

His ability to come back to office after 4 year of planning and plotting -- the difference that the people, process and policies of Trump 2.0 will make and why they will be historic. I am honored that President Trump offered to write the forward for the book -- I am excited to share it with you. It is available for pre-sale now -- just click the link below. Pre-sales are critical to a book's success so your support is super helpful. Thank you! Tonight at 6pm ET John Solomon - join us for the premiere Tune in for my conversation with John Solomon as we break down the headlines! Click and join us at 6pm. Stories I'm reading... \- via Vogue \- via NOTUS \- via Fox News \- via Axios \- via Politico \- via Politico \- via Politico \- via Fox News \- via Fox News \- via The Daily Signal \- via Axios \- via AP News NEW Morning Show!! Start your day in the know with THE HUDDLE Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 8:30am ET you can now join Dan Turrentine and journalist Rachael Bade as we break down the top political stories. You can find it all on the same as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it! You can also sign up for Huddle updates and emails at thedchuddle.com This week on The Sean Spicer Show... Tune in tonight for my conversation with John Solomon. Wednesday, I'll be talking about the SAVE Act with Rep. Chip Roy. Thursday we've got a great panel featuring Erika Donalds, Jessica Anderson, Tony Katz. Finally Friday, tune in for my talk with Brett Buchanan on brand new polling on where the American people REALLY are on the issue of deportations. Turn on notifications so you don't miss it! Audio podcast help If you watch the show on YouTube, Rumble or X, please do me a HUGE favor -- can you click the link , hit subscribe and give us a 5-star review on Apple. It's super helpful. Thank you! Sponsor links... Head over to my new page, where you can find all the show discounts and codes! Senate fundraising update... Click on the tweet below for the latest numbers headed into the midterm elections Houston (or rather, Tarrant County), we have a problem... Over the weekend a special election for a Texas state Senate race gained national attention for all the wrong reasons. What had been a reliable safe Republican seat was flipped - in spectacular and embarrassing fashion. Let me get this part out of the way - I have always said special elections are special for a reason. But, like anything else, there are always lessons learned to be taken away. Yes, republicans had a BRUTAL primary. Yes the Democrat was unscathed while all this happened. Yes, weather was a factor. But the reality is this should not have happened. Let's break it down... name: The Democrats
subject: You are not an ATM
body:
You are an invaluable part of our work and our mission in Pennsylvania.
---
Derek, If you’re on other email lists, you probably receive panicked emails that try to scare you into taking action. Too many PACs and politicians view their supporters as their own personal ATMs. Here’s what we believe, Derek:
* You are _not_ an ATM. You are an invaluable part of our work and our mission in Pennsylvania and nationwide.
* Instead of trying to scare you into contributing, we want to provide you with information that inspires you and makes you _want_ to join us.
* Instead of misleading you, our goal is always to make sure you have accurate, up-to-date information about how we will put your contribution to work.

So here’s the truth: **Right now, the DNC is laser-focused on supporting our state parties, like the Pennsylvania Democratic Party.** It’s the organization best positioned to distribute funds and resources to the Pennsylvania candidates, local parties, and races that need them most. We set our fundraising goals thoughtfully and intentionally to ensure that Pennsylvania Democrats have the resources to continue that work, in every corner of your commonwealth. [**So, Derek, when you receive an email from us asking for your support of Pennsylvania Democrats, that’s exactly where your contribution goes. Your donation today to the Pennsylvania Democratic Party Victory Fund will help us elect Pennsylvania Democrats up and down the ballot, take back Congress, and, ultimately, win the White House in 2028:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026-spvf?amount=7&refcode=em_20260203_5922_spvf_pa_fr&refcode2=5922_22930333_Mbz0Gl&akid=5922%2E22930333%2EMbz0Gl) _If you’ve stored your info with ActBlue, we’ll process your contribution to the Pennsylvania Democratic Party Victory Fund instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026-spvf?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260203_5922_spvf_pa_fr&refcode2=5922_22930333_Mbz0Gl&akid=5922%2E22930333%2EMbz0Gl)**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 2/3/2026
body:
DUI arrest tests public trust as Aurora councilman keeps safety oversight role
| | | | [](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.joinrmv.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.joinrmv.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Under the Golden Dome...** Lawmakers are grappling with the fallout of energy and public safety policy as the state moves to [regulate “public safety power shutoffs”](https://link.email.joinrmv.) after repeated Xcel outages left vulnerable residents and rural communities at risk. At the same time, pressure is mounting to expand Colorado’s red flag law despite data showing nearly [one in five firearm seizures were wrongful](https://link.email.joinrmv.), intensifying due-process concerns.
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Questions of accountability are growing after [Aurora City Councilman Rob Andrews’ DUI arrest](https://link.email.joinrmv.)—more than three times the legal limit—while he continues to oversee public safety. Secretary of State Jena Griswold is also facing criticism for [blocking a DOJ voter-roll review](https://link.email.joinrmv.) even as similar data is shared elsewhere, while Ballot Measure 95 heads to the November ballot, [giving voters a say on sanctuary policies](https://link.email.joinrmv.). These debates come as Colorado sees [net population loss for the first time in two decades](https://link.email.joinrmv.) and a massive power outage leaves nearly [200,000 residents in the dark](https://link.email.joinrmv.).
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** House Republicans are signaling a harder line on spending, with Rep. Anna Paulina Luna saying the [GOP will move funding bills without Democratic support](https://link.email.joinrmv.) to reopen the government. Meanwhile, federal officials are [defending DNI Tulsi Gabbard’s role in a Georgia election raid](https://link.email.joinrmv.), reigniting national debate over election security and unresolved questions from 2020.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** This week’s commentary warns of a growing ethical breakdown in health care, as physician Brian Joondeph argues [political ideology is overtaking medical professionalism](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Citing cases of nurses openly calling for harm or denial of care based on politics, the piece warns that when activism replaces ethics at the bedside, patient trust—and medicine itself—begins to collapse.
This is your Mountain Minute for Tuesday, February 3, 2026.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[DUI arrest tests public trust as Aurora councilman keeps safety oversight role](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
When an elected official is arrested, the expectation is simple: the law should apply the same way it would to anyone else. But public office brings added scrutiny that doesn’t disappear once the legal process begins.
Those questions are now front and center in Aurora following the DUI arrest of Rob Andrews, who serves on City Council and chairs the council’s Public Safety, Courts, and Civil Service Committee.
Since the arrest, Andrews has leaned heavily on due process, saying there are “inconsistencies” in how the incident has been described during the January 26 Aurora City Council meeting. The police report, body-camera video, and official responses show what happened — and why the public debate has shifted.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**[Griswold blocks DOJ voter roll review while data flows elsewhere](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY LINDA GOOD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **Griswold blocks DOJ voter-roll review with political rhetoric:** Secretary of State Jena Griswold refused a lawful Department of Justice request for unredacted voter-roll data, framing it as a privacy threat rather than addressing the legal merits of the request.
* **Privacy claims clash with existing data-sharing practices:** The article notes Colorado already shares the same sensitive identity data across federal systems through REAL ID, tax filings, and benefits programs, undercutting claims that DOJ access poses a new risk.
* **Transparency blocked while private NGOs access voter data:** Despite rejecting federal oversight, Colorado continues to share voter data with private, progressive-linked nonprofits like ERIC and CEIR, raising questions about accountability and selective transparency.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
|
---
**[Red flag law expansion questioned as data shows wrongful gun seizures in Colorado](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY CORY GAINES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **Nearly 1 in 5 red flag petitions led to wrongful gun seizures:** State data shows that about 20% of firearm confiscations occurred during ex parte hearings and were later denied or dismissed, meaning lawful gun owners temporarily lost their rights without notice or the chance to defend themselves.
* **Lawmakers push expansion without fixing known due-process failures:** Despite documented error rates and gaps in tracking how quickly firearms are returned, legislators are moving to broaden who can file petitions, increasing the risk of abuse and mistaken disarmament.
* **Critics warn misleading bill language masks broader gun control goals:** The article argues the use of “extreme risk” in the bill title is deceptive, as current law requires only a “significant risk,” raising constitutional concerns and accusations of intentional public misdirection.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Frontline Peace: The Fight for Reconciliation**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[****](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | FEBRUARY 1**
****_One of the most common—and most misunderstood—beliefs Christians carry is this: Avoiding conflict is an act of love. It sounds spiritual. It sounds peaceful. But it isn’t what Jesus teaches. Jesus does not command silence in close relationships—He commands reconciliation. And when we confuse avoidance with love, we quietly surrender ground the enemy is more than happy to occupy._
__
[**Colorado appeals court orders new briefs after state flags statute oversight in Tina Peters case**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[****](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | JANUARY 30** _The Colorado Court of Appeals has reopened briefing in Tina Peters’ criminal appeal after the state acknowledged it overlooked a key statutory issue while briefing and arguing the case. The appeal’s timeline changed on Jan. 29, when the Court of Appeals ordered a new round of briefing following a late filing from the Attorney General, a “notice of erratum” addressing the felony charge._ __
[**Colorado’s quiet revival: A custody provision lawmakers stripped is back in SB26-018**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[****](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**BY SHAINA COLE | STATE | JANUARY 30** _When Colorado lawmakers removed custody language from a transgender-related bill in 2025, the fight appeared to cool — or at least move out of view. It didn’t last. Jan. 14 marked the formal introduction of Senate Bill 26-018, backed in the Senate by Katie Wallace and Chris Kolker and carried in the House by Meg Froelich and Lorena García. No Republicans signed on._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
|
---
🌺 **DID YOU KNOW?** Hawaii is the only U.S. state that was **formerly an independent kingdom** and officially ruled by a queen, Queen Liliʻuokalani, who reigned from 1891 until her overthrow in 1893. As the last sovereign monarch of the Hawaiian Kingdom, she was forced to yield her authority to the U.S. after a coup led by American businessmen.
|

**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "When tillage begins, other arts follow. The farmers, therefore, are the founders of human civilization." – Daniel Webster

subject: Nothing is impossible when we fight for our democracy

body:
Do you have a moment to read my note? If you’re busy, I completely understand. | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23878%2E4449941%2Eru9n9F) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23878%2E4449941%2Eru9n9F) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72957?t=3&akid=23878%2E4449941%2Eru9n9F) Hey, it’s Stacey Abrams. Do you have a moment to read my note?

If you’re busy, I completely understand. All I ask is that you take a minute to [**support our midterm organizing efforts and our friends at Fight For Reform by splitting a $3 donation right now.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72958?t=4&akid=23878%2E4449941%2Eru9n9F) | [CHIP IN $3 NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72958?t=5&akid=23878%2E4449941%2Eru9n9F)
---
I know it can be overwhelming to open the news each day and see the latest disaster brought on by Donald Trump and his allies. It’s enough to dishearten and weaken us all. What they don’t want you to know is that autocrats count on regular people checking out, wrongly assuming we won’t stay engaged or be willing to organize.

[**They want you to tune out – don’t.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72958?t=6&akid=23878%2E4449941%2Eru9n9F)

Keeping up with the billionaire influence on our government may seem impossible, but I’m here to remind you that **_nothing_** is impossible when we are fighting for our democracy. The foundations of change will always start small, but we know from history that when we join together, there is no telling how strong we can become.

They can’t control small-dollar gifts, and $3 from you has more democratic power than $3 million from their billionaire donors. [**So please, I’m asking that you chip in $3 today to help Speak Up PAC and Fight For Reform rebuild our war chests in time for the upcoming 2026 Midterm Elections.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72958?t=7&akid=23878%2E4449941%2Eru9n9F)
[CHIP IN $3 NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72958?t=8&akid=23878%2E4449941%2Eru9n9F)
---
Let our fight keep them up at night,

Stacey Abrams

clean_body: Will you show that you STILL love me? | | | | I could use a HUGE MAGA hug! You’ve always had my back. Now is NOT the time to quit. I’m going to tell you something straight from the heart: You’re not just a supporter. You’re family. You’re the backbone of this incredible movement. Through the witch hunts, the fake news attacks, the endless hoaxes – you’ve stood by me like nobody else. You’ve got my back, and believe me, that means the world to me. Do you STILL love me? You make me feel like the luckiest guy in America every single day. Your energy, your passion, your incredible loyalty – it’s beautiful. It’s powerful. And honestly? It warms my heart more than anything. So right now, I’m asking you the big question: Do you love me? Do you love what we’re building together? Do you love America enough to keep fighting? If the answer is YES (and I know it is), show me right now with a quick contribution, so we can keep WINNING! Thank you for being the best. I mean it. I love you, Donald J. body:
We need you to read this urgent message.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001baTFkbZQtWJCtl1vcYh4MnJ0Y_HwKovNE329zn5W__63dnag7oViXUcNg9QWNZYi-k98ON5ycs-D82YoLW2tb340uMZjOgtGG7IGQlj_2t2Ie6IyBO-gQHlBD3j5M4_Zrg1fPeAfv1eErMjonBoEVn4qA9lvpbuyZtmz9UIFZTKM0O8djMWaPPy-GL-5e7jRSQxdH-9ijJcp6_CmmzLhog==&c=cdZPE8151ascT5npHOLTOuluV7NFt01IloyrkXzEVIddvQ2TRlVD8Q==&ch=sC21WAJ2mQey_V83f_zYKhANcCwWmbSkiq6Cr73nwegB8miaqvWAOg==)

Peter, let's talk about what Trump and the entire MAGA establishment are desperately trying to hide:
Last week, a new trove of Epstein documents was finally released after years of legal battles. But here's what they don't want you to notice:
The documents are heavily redacted. Entire pages are blacked out. And thousands more files remain completely sealed.
Names covered up. Flight logs obscured. Critical evidence hidden behind thick black bars. And the most damning documents? They were conveniently "not included" in the release at all.
And the only reason they're getting away with it? Republicans control the House.
No subpoena power for Democrats. No investigations. No unredacted documents. No accountability. Just a carefully orchestrated cover-up that relies on MAGA maintaining House control for as long as possible.
Here's the brutal reality: If we don't take back the House in 2026, those redactions become permanent. Those sealed files likely stay sealed. Forever.
Trump knows it. Speaker Johnson knows it. Every MAGA Republican in Congress knows it. That's why they're fighting like hell to gerrymander enough seats to maintain control--not for two years, but for a DECADE or more.
They're rigging the maps in Texas, Florida, North Carolina, Missouri, and Indiana specifically so that even when they're deeply underwater politically, even when Trump's approval rating is in the toilet, even when the entire country is screaming for accountability--they can't be touched.
This is why Colorado matters.
Our ballot initiative isn't just about flipping 3-4 seats. It's about giving Democrats the numbers they need to retake the House, issue subpoenas, demand the unredacted files, hold public hearings, and drag every single piece of evidence into the sunlight.
This is not a drill. This is the moment where we either stand up and fight for truth and accountability, or we roll over and let them bury the evidence forever.

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing everything they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

The next four weeks will decide this primary — and the stakes couldn’t be higher.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=rYjet5OcqODuvL5bwO15DkUF0L5OgfLGFP8s%2BBMBDn1is9k3L8NaMGrDFZPVRmqhcon2dGfYkahwpvmMoaWUFE3we0vQcawY811NAN6gSvLRmQXCaoNICFcTPhsY%2BftdCDMZ1fQXvaeDd%2Fgi7sSpyyHtQQ1xvzM%2BZauJ%2B1mGF2mYSnDLGo5ewVJDtlEFIH6Dx2vvvZnRDg9u%2Fqhruxm4ILFUcKa0Xy5N24buEEfW%2Bnphpm0L37r9AdjTHV9qTFTvPpFJXEUr5BZC4m9L9uf7s18DD9qi5SivJQ5MDNjlrCjvDrjnT33ZxONZiBUsFF2TGeu7pCHbLjWyty2NyhS3Ax%2F34DJGSlCELJIKI5zrxufWdC6CEtmEv1%2FfYsB1SQlDKBr7Ee0%2FYBHo0pZBSHOa1Eqclo1Q73HidJyTTEZTwNc%3D)

---
Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee. When I woke up this morning, the first thing on my mind was that we’re officially **one month out from the NC-04 primary** — and the next few weeks will decide a lot about the future of our district. In the final stretch of any election, folks start paying closer attention, and they’ll make a choice about who they trust to represent NC-04 in Congress. **This year, that choice comes at a moment when so much is on the line.** Across the country, we’re watching fundamental rights and freedoms come under attack. We’re seeing extremists enact policies that are taking our country backward — rolling back protections for women and families, threatening access to healthcare, undermining voting rights, and attacking the very idea that everyone deserves a fair shot and a voice. And at the same time, too many hardworking people here at home are still being squeezed by rising costs, by unfair corporate price-gouging, and by politicians who seem more interested in the spotlight than representing their communities. **It matters what kind of leadership we send to Washington.** So Peter, this is my promise to you: I’ll continue representing NC-04 with integrity — fighting to protect healthcare, defending Social Security and Medicare, standing up for public education, and expanding opportunity so that each and every family in NC-04 can thrive. I’m proud of what we’ve done, but I’m also clear-eyed: there is more work ahead, and we cannot afford to take any election for granted. [That’s why, with only one month left, I need to ask: if you’re able, will you chip in $10 right now to help us reach voters across the district, break through the noise, and finish these final weeks strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124660782/599296555/-87142129?amount=10&source=VF_EM_FR_020326_B1_1-month-until-primary&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDE1MTcwNy0zZDAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nimyJ0bahv0uIbYm54zzoGtmaBi05IN-TJBzYwiSStw=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

name: Team Schiff
subject: $1 can change the world

body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9495%2E5257348%2E9Gu2fq)
Would you believe us if we told you that a donation of just $1 could have an outsized impact on this campaign?
That’s right, Derek. It only takes $1 to make a real difference. The kicker is that it takes $1 from _a lot_ of people.
If everyone opening this email chipped in just $1, we could move mountains.
Unfortunately, not everyone is going to open it, and even fewer will take the extra step and contribute. So, if you’ve read this far and are even thinking about donating, you’re ahead of the game.
