name: Roy Cooper for NC HQ
subject: There is a choice:
body:
Which candidate would get your vote?
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)
Peter, there’s a choice ahead of us, and we need to know where YOU stand: **[If the 2026 elections were today, who’d be YOUR pick for the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina?](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_TheChoice_020326/?source=em_RC_PET_TheChoicePETRESEND_020326&t=7&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)** [](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_TheChoice_020326/?source=em_RC_PET_TheChoicePETRESEND_020326&t=8&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj) | **[ROY COOPER (D)](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_TheChoice_020326/?source=em_RC_PET_TheChoicePETRESEND_020326&t=9&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)** | **[MICHAEL WHATLEY (R)](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_TheChoice_020326/?source=em_RC_PET_TheChoicePETRESEND_020326&t=10&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)**
---|---
In case you need a refresher, here’s what you need to know about the candidates 👇
**MICHAEL WHATLEY (R)**
💰 Former Big Oil lobbyist
🔴 GOP insider handpicked by Donald Trump
⛔ Supports BANNING abortion care
🩺 Supports the GOP’s agenda of SLASHING Medicaid
**ROY COOPER (D)**
✅ Former Governor trusted by North Carolinians
♀️ Strong supporter of the right to access abortion care
🩺 Proponent of health care access (passed Medicaid Expansion as Governor)
🗳️ Voting rights defender
♻️ Clean energy advocate
**One of these two candidates is going to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina. Peter, we need to know where YOU stand!**
**[Which candidate would get your vote?](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_TheChoice_020326/?source=em_RC_PET_TheChoicePETRESEND_020326&t=11&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)**
**[ROY COOPER (D)](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_TheChoice_020326/?source=em_RC_PET_TheChoicePETRESEND_020326&t=12&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)** | **[MICHAEL WHATLEY (R)](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_TheChoice_020326/?source=em_RC_PET_TheChoicePETRESEND_020326&t=13&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)**
---|---
Thanks for registering your input!
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=14&akid=480%2E124072%2ERskkqj)

# [The "Good Deal for Ohio" That Isn't: SB 190 Expands Government](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=186731733&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NzMxNzMzLCJpYXQiOjE3NzAxNTUzMjgsImV4cCI6MTc3Mjc0NzMyOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4SZEODziUvmC-mLkOKmEP9Mk6QYmNaJiGY50dOmtaew)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8fdf8014-c85d-45e8-a345-024fb4080cc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

I usually focus on Mississippi, but Ohio's SB 190 shows the same playbook nationwide, politicians dressing up bigger government to grab more of your money and your freedom. Politicians everywhere have learned an old trick: when you want to grow government, wrap it in something everyone likes. That is exactly what Senate Bill 190 does to Ohio.

On the surface, SB 190 looks like a "tax code clean‐up" paired with feel‐good benefits. It offers universal free school breakfasts and lunches, tweaks property and income taxes, sends more money to local governments, and sprinkles in popular sales tax holidays. Who could be against "free" meals and "relief"?

Look closer. This is not a bill about relief; it is a bill about permanent expansion.

First, SB 190 creates a new universal school meal entitlement for every student in public and chartered nonpublic schools, regardless of family income. That means a family making $50,000 and a family making $500,000 are both promised "free" breakfast and lunch--paid for by everyone else.

Feeding hungry kids is a moral obligation. But we already have targeted programs for low‐income families, along with robust networks of churches, nonprofits, and community groups ready to help. SB 190 replaces that focused safety net with a one‐size‐fits‐all state promise, moving the responsibility for feeding children further from families and voluntary charity and deeper into the hands of government.

When you separate consumption from cost, demand always grows. Once "free" food is guaranteed to all, the program's size, cost, and regulatory reach will only expand. Future legislators will be forced to raise taxes, cut other priorities, or borrow more to sustain it. That's not compassion; that's writing a blank check on our kids' future tax bills.

Second, SB 190 rewires major pieces of the tax code without giving most Ohioans what they actually need: lower, simpler, broad‐based taxes. Instead of cutting income tax rates or reducing overall spending, the bill reshuffles who gets what--adjusting property tax reduction factors, sales and use taxes, the commercial activity tax, severance taxes, and more.

Some narrow fixes are good, like phasing out special sales tax exemptions for big data centers. But those small anti‐crony changes are swamped by new, permanent commitments. SB 190 increases the share of state tax revenues automatically sent to the Local Government Fund and Public Library Fund, and alters dedicated funding streams for subsidized housing programs. Once those percentages ratchet up, they almost never come down. Government's claim on your paycheck hardens.

The bill even builds a special "expanded sales tax holiday fund" to stash surplus tax revenue and pay for periodic tax‐free weekends. Instead of using surpluses to cut rates or pay down debt, SB 190 treats extra revenue as a pot to redistribute on politically timed "holidays" that hide, rather than reduce, the real tax burden.

Finally, SB 190 tightens the leash between Columbus and your local property taxes. By rewriting homestead and property tax relief rules and relying more on state reimbursements and formulas, it centralizes control. Local schools and governments become even more dependent on state decisions, not local voters. That weakens accountability and property rights while keeping stadium subsidies and convention‐center deals intact for the well‐connected.

Ohioans should demand something better than a bigger, more complicated government dressed up as reform. Call your legislators. Tell them to vote no on SB 190 and come back with a plan that shrinks government, simplifies taxes, and trusts families--not bureaucracies--to care for children.

Donald Trump hand-picked DHS Secretary Kristi Noem to carry out his most extreme, dangerous policies, and they're deploying ICE in Democratic cities across the country to sow chaos and fear in our communities.

**But now, EMILYs List women are calling for Kristi Noem to be FIRED.**

This is a critical moment: Trump and Noem are weaponizing federal law enforcement to intimidate communities that dare to stand up to them. Families are being torn apart. Children are not only going to school afraid their parents won't be there when they come home — they are being detained themselves.

Democratic women in Congress refuse to look away, and they aren't backing down. They're standing up to Trump's bullying tactics and demanding accountability – but they can't do it alone.

[**We need our community to stand up to Donald Trump and Kristi Noem and demand that Noem be removed as DHS secretary immediately. Please, can we count on you to sign our urgent petition right away?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124665121/599312350/25959555?refcode=WUENEN08_20260203_Noem_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1057689&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTU3NmIxOC00YjAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KiNGsUFDqDpl35AWLO4pcUnzC7BMj3GQLD7Lg6jKY5Y=&emci=08576b18-4b01-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=0a576b18-4b01-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=5177934) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124665122/599312351/25959555?refcode=WUENEN08_20260203_Noem_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1057689&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTU3NmIxOC00YjAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KiNGsUFDqDpl35AWLO4pcUnzC7BMj3GQLD7Lg6jKY5Y=&emci=08576b18-4b01-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=0a576b18-4b01-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=5177934)

clean_body: | Peter, Donald Trump hand-picked DHS Secretary Kristi Noem to carry out his most extreme, dangerous policies, and they're deploying ICE in Democratic cities across the country to sow chaos and fear in our communities. But now, EMILYs List women are calling for Kristi Noem to be FIRED. This is a critical moment: Trump and Noem are weaponizing federal law enforcement to intimidate communities that dare to stand up to them. Families are being torn apart. Children are not only going to school afraid their parents won't be there when they come home — they are being detained themselves. Democratic women in Congress refuse to look away, and they aren't backing down. They're standing up to Trump's bullying tactics and demanding accountability – but they can't do it alone. | Thank you for standing up for what's right, the EMILYs List team | = | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. | | Peter,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---

This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust.

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

**[And right now, when you make a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA, we’ll send you a copy — as our thank-you for carrying Charlie’s mission forward.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=468189b70f794fc189ae02738dc19c03&_e=ppknQ4Gj0dP2EfnCJcLV7JQ-LziHe5ZJdzg6rny36LOWfdAM9kRJsT_LMzPntQ2g1tMN8HCBMJbhfBrD10z8oZBerzCJDoKsKFYjIB_gNFQ_QCrN6CBmd8ljFNAbiDHAOuPWpwSg3TdkHQuDYk2Af7LG_7IdTqrm3Y53Bl3jBlZUEITDib9F_5-yGOET0vYBwKxnRtzK974Y0g36-FWSRTMa0gvJ-w8yk5DHpSB-wqz7E3hwLWpGb8m3abyr7SywQSkvvAIFsmoYtFqlUY8eRWEM3FM_QEE0UCLUo7MXMQQjrhZzBV-8oNU5BzzsD9AeYemjdtvg1ZzUvTQyklWhYTooXlPdbresq2KJMopBh0Ca9gZTwzf790E3ykqIAYmQ-Bi52LefYFhKWrQs9eGKaJ7oo7e6sDqjk0likvEfdl6x7QW1uXU9DLDdNuw_k5uEv6pSeE7hz-y_Gh56wMTAID5ir636rYXuzm9J618UZNvkEdeqZTCBJaLmtnw9VN8PkOxu6wYWqcekrQyL7he1dBSLqnYAzwgAGJZf5yGmAWktDdvjSuGE64GMO-cjcjabz1eWeL-mflfX9H-azs0zpeRSGIvyTK7aZCJD0GrU7ZfZH5FCuDLjHN4Fl_s57RreF0GKBWjwl13ecDgED1LQ2Qc6EwBbs-uVOCb0ZqAp6mH9hBTbClHfqVUHhb63uAhL)**

Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=468189b70f794fc189ae02738dc19c03&_e=ppknQ4Gj0dP2EfnCJcLV7JQ-LziHe5ZJdzg6rny36LOWfdAM9kRJsT_LMzPntQ2g1tMN8HCBMJbhfBrD10z8oZBerzCJDoKsKFYjIB_gNFQ_QCrN6CBmd8ljFNAbiDHAOuPWpwSg3TdkHQuDYk2Af7LG_7IdTqrm3Y53Bl3jBlZUEITDib9F_5-yGOET0vYBwKxnRtzK974Y0g36-FWSRTMa0gvJ-w8yk5DHpSB-wqy1B2nLFN6utAkxPUZK8EuX8hmDj3oAVwrO9CH0-3zE471AFf4u28Kbk7Z2fjxgr2qCvjIrtKbQI_Fg0A4QiEjl-kJv_9fcCjpvp9E9HNFBM6Sj4rla4wrdD5g7MUgY_6ByIQ2y6gboYWjyLan023T367HT76tNxCTXQQ7X0orMO9YyWnFeJ8IKNoahTt7_sSc_Z1VbFtm-p3OVturqVcPc5aDLuEpfVYCv6JotG-XRU4wASgmFiiTGAjUXprcr-DrZe6XWI_5YMFz7zE3XGQNA0qoXYbKoTHptmJMirJbZ2D_rQe3BOl9U2PVYznot1qiYufCeJ-Dz9SMsCfcSpX8Hfv-l06Q-J6VLKWRYF72rk9wRuADXMiPPeK11_8i9etEtJERsTvgFPiA1FkSYLLgfQDjxdmJ6-drnOOnKJX6hcpD1pIC_IquXzPmMTyso7x-mlPAebIgqwVJwyXLTYnSj)**

Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, | | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: It’s all thanks to you, friend.
body:
|
#
Friend, January had a way of dragging on – and if that groundhog is to be believed, winter isn’t done with us just yet. _(Ugh!)_ **But last month also proved something important: when it mattered, our coalition stepped up.** Because of you, we hit our monthly fundraising goal. Whether you donated, volunteered your time, or stayed engaged, it made a real difference – and I’m genuinely grateful. This campaign has always been built around people who care about their communities and want things to work better here in mid-Michigan. January was a reminder of that, and I don’t take it for granted. What comes next is staying focused on what matters most: making life a little easier for Michigan families. With health care costs rising and everyday expenses stretching paychecks thinner and thinner, too many families are feeling the squeeze. That’s where my focus is. This race has real stakes, and I don’t take that lightly. I’m grateful to have you with me as we keep showing up and doing the work that mid-Michigan sent me here to do. body:
A note of appreciation as we head into February.

| | | | |
---
Peter, As January comes to a close, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. The start of a new year is always busy. People are pulled in a lot of directions, and time is limited. The fact that you’ve taken a moment to read, stay engaged, or reach out over the past few weeks means a lot to me, [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/CV3xWjq66hvYw-PmBs7ITg~~/AAUS1hA~/vrlBd8T8jB6TYdpBzGy95-Lwjx4ocH4JLS1a25jmYg4CVVG7_RMG787fleh2_HlffDTnzwXaUNsqeY_EhVt0lPxDwf-1Oi6Jyjw6k-Rcn3QARGtSLQq2ZDbNOMvhXGEsagdh0Dabn-q1J62kThDqQkvopSSWBwzpjdw2WZQYHq7zB8BqAomLiMvJPIILwmTddrezIANTYkh-8ly5UHJatjz9nZn_ViR1fK_2M_8r1iwr7pK5AjVEwISschrkDjhg) When I decided to run, I did so with the same approach I’ve taken as mayor: paying attention to what’s happening close to home and taking public service seriously. That mindset continues to guide this campaign. I’m grateful for the conversations, the encouragement, and the support people have shown in different ways. This campaign is built on a lot of steady work, and I’m thankful for everyone who has been part of that. If you’d like to support the campaign as we head into the year, you can contribute below. No pressure, just a way to be involved if it makes sense for you. Thanks again for taking the time, and I hope the year is off to a good start for you. Sincerely, Chaz | [CONTRIBUTE](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/tIL0Ezt06t7B2AbcXRA8Rg~~/AAUS1hA~/dDPi2UrLsZ8N5Uhjds0BGof4Xr7sx1Mrh9zIDgAf8J6e1_ZPhZJK_CwwZGGcNZQmTQpEevij_DzjM3ozpLM-cGOgwWhA__URAu5B9PK2DxgeCuTEnQYzN8aj5fcEsLdE_32QzqpEjMJ4BlHr005wAT5dVHqUULA_CRTDYddRkzR_rkEX1vt-lZ1ZCyIe4_l1Fg5ZTDPx3Uuv9FRhCW_XJb2xUhmNyqZF9W4B2roE7wqOLLkSzMHYLgr8B4VB42qu)

### About Chaz Molder
Chaz Molder is the Mayor of Columbia, Tennessee, serving since 2019 and re-elected in 2022. A Columbia native and graduate of the University of Tennessee and the University of Memphis Law School, he returned home to build a career in law and public service. A Columbia native and graduate of the University of Tennessee and the University of Memphis Law School, he returned home to build a career in law and public service. As mayor, he founded the Columbia Mayor’s Youth Council to promote civic engagement among young people and emphasizes the importance of being present and responsive to the community. | | | ~~ Click~~ to receive fewer emails. Follow Chaz | ~ | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Molder for Congress Molder for CongressPO Box 1468Columbia, TN 38402United States www.chazmolder.com "Website"

body:
What, like it's hard?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124665650/599314547/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2ZlOThhZS00YjAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YDT7Bb8gFaOM_7VkZpRDF77ElLLLymAgv3Pvq_dztmg=)

Peter,

Last weekend, Christina spent her days crisscrossing the district to talk with her future constituents about her vision for IA-01, their priorities, and how she can best advocate for them!

From recording a podcast in front of a live audience, to hosting a labor roundtable, and sitting down with people of all walks of life, Christina is dedicated to open conversations with the people she seeks to represent.

**_It’s difficult to imagine Mariannette Miller-Meeks spending a day that way. She's had a hard time communicating with her constituents._** Last year she made a name for herself sprinting away from constituents and practically had to be backed into a corner before she held a town hall.

Christina is connecting with constituents even before she wins in November because it's the _bare minimum_. We don't need more politicians who hide behind the velvet curtain while their constituents hear crickets. Christina knows it's critical for constituents to see the face of their representative, to have open conversations with them, and be able to hold them accountable.

**[Meeting her constituents where they are helps Christina continue running a campaign for and by the people of Iowa's First District. Chip in to ensure Christina can keep traveling the district and defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks in November>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124665653/599314556/-2011951990?refcode=em26_260203_FRmeet_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260203_FRmeet_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=63fe98ae-4b01-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2ZlOThhZS00YjAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YDT7Bb8gFaOM_7VkZpRDF77ElLLLymAgv3Pvq_dztmg=)**

name: David Hogg
subject: This is what generational change looks like
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
After nearly 50 years in Congress, Steny Hoyer is passing the torch.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260203-1&t=1&akid=3114%2E587540%2ETdP9Cm)
Peter,
After nearly half a century in Congress, the _longest-serving House Democrat in history_ just announced he's retiring.
After nearly 50 years serving in the House, **Rep. Steny Hoyer** is stepping aside, joining leaders like Nancy Pelosi in making room for the next generation.
Hoyer has a real legacy, serving as House Majority Leader, helping pass the Americans With Disabilities Act, and working alongside Speaker Pelosi to deliver major legislative victories like the Affordable Care Act.
This is important, impactful work — **and what’s also important is recognizing when it’s time to pass the torch.**
What Rep. Hoyer is doing is exactly what Leaders We Deserve has been calling for. The Democratic Party is facing its biggest test in decades, and we need a new wave of leaders who will take on the challenge and fight back against Trump and MAGA extremism.
We have an opportunity — and a responsibility — to elect bold, young progressives ready to lead in crisis.
**Peter, this is an urgent moment.[If you’re ready to elect the next generation of leaders, please make a $5 contribution now to stand with us in this fight.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260203_1_steny.7-A095&refcode=em20260203-3114&amount=5&t=2&akid=3114%2E587540%2ETdP9Cm)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260203_1_steny.7-A095&amount=5&refcode=em20260203-3114&t=21&akid=3114%2E587540%2ETdP9Cm)**
This is a step in the right direction.
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260203-1&t=22&refcode2=3114_587540_TdP9Cm&akid=3114%2E587540%2ETdP9Cm)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Sue Walker, Campaign Manager
subject: No joke - Chrissy accomplished a lot last year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Take a look
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124665738/599314720/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2ZlOThhZS00YjAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6SJ367i0na32TheSQMxi5Gs4Jygbj_R6760jp2RX-2M=&emci=6dd9f0e0-6500-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=5cfe98ae-4b01-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek,

Before we get too far into the new year, we want to take a moment to celebrate some of Chrissy’s accomplishments from last year. Yes, you heard that right. Last year wasn’t all bad – she helped a lot of people in our community and got legislation enacted to make our nation safer. _These are achievements that give Chrissy the energy to tackle 2026._ Take a look:
**$10.9 Million Directly to Constituents in 2025**
Every day, members of our community ask for help fixing enrollment issues with Medicare, inaccurate calculations from Social Security, a lost passport, disputes with the IRS, unrealized VA benefits, and more. Chrissy is here to help, and the increase in closed cases and dollars returned reflect that. Since taking office, her team has resolved over 10,000 constituent issues and returned over $70 million directly to constituents – including recovering $10.9 million from federal agencies last year alone.
**$51 Million in Education Funding**
After the Trump administration announced that it was suspending billions in education funding across the country, including more than $51 million for Chester and Berks counties, Chrissy spent weeks working to get these funds released. Thanks to her efforts, our schools received the funds they were entitled to.
**7 Biotech Initiatives Signed Into Law**
Chrissy started the Congressional BIOTech Caucus to force the House to stay focused on the need for a thriving domestic biotech sector and the threats coming from China. Seven of her initiatives – including biotech training, guidelines for ensuring ethical use of this technology, support for public-private partnerships – were signed into law in December.
**40 National Security Policy Goals Signed Into Law**
Chrissy helped draft and pass a National Defense Authorization Act that invests in manufacturing jobs in our district, expands child care support for military families, protects women in the military, and so much more. In total, 40 of her bills, amendments, and initiatives were included in the final bill.
Throughout this past year, Chrissy remained steadfast in her commitment to you, your families, and our communities – fighting to deliver progress for hardworking Americans. That's the same fight she'll bring in 2026 to support legislation that improves lives, holds the Trump administration accountable, and upholds our Constitution.
**But she can't do this without support from people like you, Derek. So please: **_[Will you chip in $5 so Chrissy can continue solving real problems for the people and communities of PA-06?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124665739/599314721/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1218-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2ZlOThhZS00YjAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6SJ367i0na32TheSQMxi5Gs4Jygbj_R6760jp2RX-2M=)_
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124665740/599314722/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1218-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2ZlOThhZS00YjAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6SJ367i0na32TheSQMxi5Gs4Jygbj_R6760jp2RX-2M=)

Sue Walker

Devon, PA 19333

name: Geoff Duncan
subject: I can’t thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Duncan for Governor
body:
|
---

| | I can’t thank you enough for being part of our grassroots team -- I’m humbled by the generous support we received ahead of our campaign’s biggest fundraising deadline yet.

**_Thousands_ of grassroots donors like you (from all 50 states!) have already pitched in to power our campaign.** Together, I’m confident we have what it takes to elect a Democratic governor in Georgia for the first time in decades.

But now is not the time to take a victory lap. Election Day is just over three months away, which means we have _a lot_ of work to do in not much time.

name: George Whitesides
subject: My focus is on bettering our communities.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2026?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2026?refcode=em-header] Thank you, Peter.

I’m proud to share that with your support in January, we met our online fundraising goal. This is a critical step forward in what is already turning out to be a tumultuous midterm election year.

Right now, families across CA-27 and the country are hurting. Costs are rising, and fears are mounting as ICE continues their crusade through communities nationwide.

Through it all, I’m committed to doing right by the Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys:

- I helped push for an extension of the ACA tax credits that passed the House and now is pending Senate approval.

- I’m adding my voice to impeach and remove DHS Secretary Kristi Noem -- because we must restore accountability to ensure our communities stay safe.

I’m standing up to this Administration because CA-27 deserves real results -- through oversight, legislation, and every tool available to me in Congress. Your continued support makes it possible.

Thank you,

George

name: Team Voter Action Project
subject: We must investigate DOGE’s attempt to undermine our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
Elon Musk’s DOGE took millions of Americans’ private Social Security records and handed access to election deniers . Congress needs to make sure it never happens again.
The Department of Justice has now admitted that the Department of Government Efficiency gained sweeping access to addresses, birthdates, and identifiers that can be weaponized to target voters, suppress turnout, or erode trust in elections. DOGE’s access came as Trump and his allies escalated attacks on mail-in voting and independent federal agencies.
That context matters. This was a power grab designed to undermine our democracy using our private data. Congress must not ignore this or look away.
Tell Congress to investigate DOGE’s efforts to access and share our private Social Security data with election deniers. Demand that all who participated in the scheme are held accountable, and make sure this never happens again >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-investigate-doges-attempt-to-undermine-our-elections/?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
START WRITING NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-investigate-doges-attempt-to-undermine-our-elections/?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
DOGE was created by executive order, shielded from transparency, and staffed with political loyalists. Reports show its operatives bypassed standard clearance procedures and ignored internal warnings to gain and share “unprecedented” access to our data with no guardrails.
DOGE staffers engaged in prohibited political activity while embedded inside a nonpartisan agency in violation of the Hatch Act. This is how elections are undermined from inside the government.
Congress must act now — not only to expose what happened, but to ensure it can never happen again . The House Oversight Committee and the Senate Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs Committee must launch a full investigation, subpoena DOGE leadership, and lock in safeguards so no future administration can abuse federal data to rig the system.
Send your letter today to demand Congress investigate DOGE, defend our data privacy, and make sure this never happens again >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-investigate-doges-attempt-to-undermine-our-elections/?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
START WRITING NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-investigate-doges-attempt-to-undermine-our-elections/?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=020326_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=020326_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=URLFOLi3fgNaR6R9ljuWnsqqEtNIJmYhBtjM7HJ3usxt%2BekC%2FVF9DKMs8S4SENh%2Fdw2W4JN65sHikReLssvMizQ3T6MeC7Tr%2B1Pu3Jk9gMkgBWVW1sNMnmWWBvBUfPQfsiRKqJ1UUAfOw8JZkoZxEDRlCXgj%2Fuq4f0BGWfiRDvBmRZPWCr%2FJgc%2FMFC9NDFnTTgPk0ndHD%2BVekzyg64nbVjXiHq1iBJNfPjZ2tWvKz6cu%2Botw%2B1GVRm3DRQgUQ9NOLN4QALUuiZqJKp%2B%2BQQKdICvWlg5gT4P3%2B0unPm8HkBkp7gQ5K%2BS6aZJv7vGOpHxQMpydS9tk%2B%2BqauMOcRREp8LD9bczeNbDOuZeJRJCew2MwfU3oMKlFeuaQbzcfEj56kNhHApJ4BRgedU2V23LmXGM47Mggr6q0yDwMtqfNd28%3D .

| | | | | | Peter,
This June, we have another chance to defeat MAGA right here in San Bernardino County. And guess what, we have the momentum. People are sick and tired, and they are looking for an opportunity to fight back, just like we saw in Texas this past week.We have to defeat MAGA everywhere because MAGA extremists aren’t just focused on Washington — they are trying to take over our state and local governments too.I’m proud to be the only Democrat in this race, and I’m proud to be fighting back. Election Day is only four months away, and I feel the momentum every day. I hope you will join me and keep our momentum growing.[**If you can chip in today, you’ll be helping win locally and nationally.**](https://christinagagnier.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe810d8b1ba298ccabc8f3ce7&id=0a3897430c&e=0a3217b588)

clean_body: We Got the Momentum Against MAGA | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, This June, we have another chance to defeat MAGA right here in San Bernardino County. And guess what, we have the momentum. People are sick and tired, and they are looking for an opportunity to fight back, just like we saw in Texas this past week.We have to defeat MAGA everywhere because MAGA extremists aren’t just focused on Washington — they are trying to take over our state and local governments too.I’m proud to be the only Democrat in this race, and I’m proud to be fighting back. Election Day is only four months away, and I feel the momentum every day. Peter,

This is Rep. Mike Collins, and I'm shaking mad.

**_Tulsi Gabbard just described something so horrific, it makes every border hearing I 've sat through look tame.

_** **_" The most insidious arrest was Jalisco New Generation Cartel baby trafficker called La Diablo. Her whole money-making operation was centered around luring pregnant women, performing illegal C-sections, harvesting organs, and selling newborn babies."_** - DNI Tulsi Gabbard

_**Let that sink in.

**_ Illegal cartels, empowered by open-border radicals, are literally selling babies like livestock.

And what's the response from Jon Ossoff and the Radical Left?

**SILENCE**. Not a single word of outrage.

They're too busy protecting the same **_" humanitarian"_** policies that fuel this evil.

This is what happens when Democrats put ideology over innocence.

Four years of Biden & Ossoff opened the floodgates, and the monsters rushed in.

Peter, I didn't come to Washington to play politics or let D.C. pencil-pushers look the other way while evil spreads.

[_**I’m running for the U.S. Senate to shut down these cartels, hold the enablers accountable, and make America safe again.**_](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/YpCWBaWNU1Iz-pSnajapgrPsW0mpHVsqhcPeD9vZB6xwCvdtU0P3tNYVKNu_2Gnt6ZgFNIPU38vQUmXwAidxpvu6CIS6PPHvYXmx9GtDBKqLvZ_uh7decYW2U_eLrouDEoS9GqapdxrQqcbFZ2VlIcVFd-5Sg4GUU8a-8YWemjj2GlOTOcIJ3_kkrZzt82qUHc9GNEQNHXR_4MmjlMmdR3x8qd3MpIUSAnorE1sT8zpjsS4rmQx18NGhzWzxG3za0iorUs5olWBiqKn5VOp68rRhstHp9LgKOD4xjjpOWofTfvYGRnhr5rwx7crJ71jaIARve2FnpUGRQ-c5H-jl1AaOQDOltTrqz0ltC983IMvmr9SNjH3jp8RcsE-vJw3YsuVIX_aYSeHPC-kGyTv67ZjU67SCk3J6a1hM7Zd364FfkkUD9W7Uv7crPVw-SkyJ1JaFfgrYcjlv-V35YpiJsJ338-CHdr0B2C9MWydlrXKchYIa7l35GWIHtwKh4rp98A2YHKO7NDe1rDEjinYhloyd1QPL_brqVFR83C8RWPCEHyKYgMutyi4cKhBzujsDmUcamVyFIDkhKwQRJyk-Hg9DcesPUQvRjnBj-zZzurnteEFt41l6hvwb97XLPiNVUlHw7rVWG-yCgT7x9XnZ3umchVMPnFbERS3y8UHsEJUFKkVbdnHtiMfHvZLb8Q1aoY03Mf4dtN7TSoQWAVraLLhZiAzWxOtVMnq3q95lN1ADuAYqkDicIeoZMbBAU3kkT3ZWx-sv4VuK43Pu_NwKFeep6vKp6p76kLAhRuPaTYWpkN14w2zIN-Hg-JvOvb_qJ9PfcrEWxqmantaDigNi4XYFk3wMKmFz9_X_8mCnLWJKIOwKDOdhXiVt5JC6Z0kjE4jHD4WM3agrZqvs_algKTM0uw/EjcHL24OipJszRn8K-e7Vm5NB19LG8MX/17)

_**But here 's the hard truth:

**_ **The Republican majority in the Senate is razor-thin.

** If we lose Georgia, Chuck Schumer and his dark-money donors will **BULLDOZE** the America First agenda before Trump's second term is halfway done.

We can't let that happen.

Georgia is ground zero, **AGAIN**.

Our victory here decides whether America First keeps its majority ... or evil keeps its power.

clean_body: | Peter, This is Rep. Mike Collins, and I'm shaking mad. Tulsi Gabbard just described something so horrific, it makes every border hearing I 've sat through look tame. " The most insidious arrest was Jalisco New Generation Cartel baby trafficker called La Diablo. Her whole money-making operation was centered around luring pregnant women, performing illegal C-sections, harvesting organs, and selling newborn babies." - DNI Tulsi Gabbard Let that sink in. Illegal cartels, empowered by open-border radicals, are literally selling babies like livestock. And what's the response from Jon Ossoff and the Radical Left? SILENCE. Not a single word of outrage. They're too busy protecting the same " humanitarian" policies that fuel this evil. This is what happens when Democrats put ideology over innocence. Four years of Biden & Ossoff opened the floodgates, and the monsters rushed in. Peter, I didn't come to Washington to play politics or let D.C. pencil-pushers look the other way while evil spreads. But here 's the hard truth: The Republican majority in the Senate is razor-thin. If we lose Georgia, Chuck Schumer and his dark-money donors will BULLDOZE the America First agenda before Trump's second term is halfway done. We can't let that happen. Georgia is ground zero, AGAIN. Our victory here decides whether America First keeps its majority ... or evil keeps its power. I've got diesel in the tank and faith in my heart, but I can't do this alone. 👉 | For Christ. For Country. For Georgia. -- Mike Collins PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO Box 6491 Athens, GA 30604 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please .

subject: My decision to run for the United States Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124666682/599317907/-1370139186?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.03_Vindman-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTYxOGI3YS00ZTAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wYE8dOtrswGyn1G2MWftfxGnldXuZropDwZJlJsFZ4k=) Hello,

My name is Alex Vindman, and I wanted you to hear directly from me: I am running for the United States Senate in Florida.

I’ll explain more about why I chose to run, but if you already know the stakes of this race — and are fired up to defeat Donald Trump’s top ally in the Senate — then please become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between my campaign and Maggie Hassan:

**_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_em_q12026_vindman-split/founding-donor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124666683/599317910/-1370139186?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.03_Vindman-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTYxOGI3YS00ZTAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wYE8dOtrswGyn1G2MWftfxGnldXuZropDwZJlJsFZ4k=)_** I swore an oath to protect this country when I joined the U.S. Army more than two decades ago.

In 2019, I honored that oath by blowing the whistle on Donald Trump’s corrupt phone call with Ukraine, an act that led to Trump’s first impeachment and ultimately cost me my military career.

**People told me to keep my head down. But my family came here as refugees to escape tyranny. I sure as hell wasn’t going to bow down to a wannabe tyrant.**

This president unleashed a reign of terror and retribution, not just against me and my family, but against all of us.

Today, our country is in chaos. We are entering a dark chapter of American history, one that echoes early stages of authoritarian power consolidation seen elsewhere.

Thug militias attacking citizens. Tariffs pushing prices sky-high. Healthcare premiums through the roof. While all of this is happening, my opponent refuses to put the interests of the American people before her own self-interest.

Ashley Moody screwed Florida homeowners by caving to the big insurance companies, supported this administration that gutted disaster help for communities trying to rebuild, and had over a million dollars in her corporate stock traded last year while she had access to insider information only Congress gets.

They put Ashley Moody in the Senate to be a ‘yes’ vote for Trump and the billionaires. She’s not Florida’s senator. She’s theirs.

We need someone who isn’t afraid to put a check on an outlaw president, to defend our democracy, and to make sure that every American has a fair chance at prosperity.

**That is why I am running for Senate, and why I am humbly asking you:**

**_[Will you split a donation of any amount between my Senate campaign in Florida and Maggie Hassan before midnight? Your donations add up quickly when everyone is chipping in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124666685/599317912/-1370139186?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.03_Vindman-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTYxOGI3YS00ZTAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wYE8dOtrswGyn1G2MWftfxGnldXuZropDwZJlJsFZ4k=)_** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Alex Vindman and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124666686/599317914/-1370139186?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.03_Vindman-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTYxOGI3YS00ZTAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wYE8dOtrswGyn1G2MWftfxGnldXuZropDwZJlJsFZ4k=)

clean_body: = Hello, My name is Alex Vindman, and I wanted you to hear directly from me: I am running for the United States Senate in Florida. I’ll explain more about why I chose to run, but if you already know the stakes of this race — and are fired up to defeat Donald Trump’s top ally in the Senate — then please become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between my campaign and Maggie Hassan: = I swore an oath to protect this country when I joined the U.S. Army more than two decades ago. In 2019, I honored that oath by blowing the whistle on Donald Trump’s corrupt phone call with Ukraine, an act that led to Trump’s first impeachment and ultimately cost me my military career. People told me to keep my head down. But my family came here as refugees to escape tyranny. I sure as hell wasn’t going to bow down to a wannabe tyrant. This president unleashed a reign of terror and retribution, not just against me and my family, but against all of us. Today, our country is in chaos. We are entering a dark chapter of American history, one that echoes early stages of authoritarian power consolidation seen elsewhere. Thug militias attacking citizens. Tariffs pushing prices sky-high. Healthcare premiums through the roof. While all of this is happening, my opponent refuses to put the interests of the American people before her own self-interest. Ashley Moody screwed Florida homeowners by caving to the big insurance companies, supported this administration that gutted disaster help for communities trying to rebuild, and had over a million dollars in her corporate stock traded last year while she had access to insider information only Congress gets. They put Ashley Moody in the Senate to be a ‘yes’ vote for Trump and the billionaires. She’s not Florida’s senator. She’s theirs. We need someone who isn’t afraid to put a check on an outlaw president, to defend our democracy, and to make sure that every American has a fair chance at prosperity. That is why I am running for Senate, and why I am humbly asking you: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Alex Vindman and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = The billionaires and special interests will throw everything they’ve got to try and stop us. But in the infantry, we didn’t back down from a fight — we went towards it. Join me. Thank you. Alex Vindman | = Alexander Vindman is a former member of the United States Army. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Politics wasn’t on my radar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I had my life all planned out: Go to college, play on the basketball team, study pre-med, and then become a doctor.

**[I’ll be honest, Derek — this email is a bit on the longer side, and I hope you’ll take a minute to read it through. But if you’re in a hurry, and you already know what’s at stake in this election, I hope you’ll chip in just a few dollars to help us push back against all the far-right attacks we’re facing right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124666666/599317864/-1395620021?refcode=email_020326_basketball&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTI2ZjE1YS00ZDAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3e6K04O4-EsFixNQY7l1SI34CqzOwDTWMcn-t4Ej1lw=)**

Growing up, I wasn’t planning to run for office.

I thought I had a plan: Go to college, play on the basketball team, study pre-med, and then become a doctor.

**Well, you can see how that plan turned out. I became none of those things.**

Instead, I nearly failed organic chemistry and got cut from the basketball team. On the same day.

That day, my gameplan went up in smoke. I knew I wanted to serve my community in some way — but I wasn’t sure how. Then, just a few hours later, someone knocked on my dorm room door and asked if I wanted to run for student government.

Since my basketball skills clearly didn’t translate to the college level, I figured there was nothing to lose. So I ran for Students’ Association president as a freshman. And I won. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124666667/599317865/-1395620021?refcode=email_020326_basketball&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTI2ZjE1YS00ZDAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3e6K04O4-EsFixNQY7l1SI34CqzOwDTWMcn-t4Ej1lw=) _Can you believe this guy got cut from the basketball team?_ We won that race the old-fashioned way, Derek: By knocking on doors, focusing on the issues, and not just talking to folks — but _listening_ to them.

Over 30 years later, that’s the same mindset I’ve had throughout every race I’ve run. The belief that the most effective campaigns — and leaders — don’t just talk and talk all the time. They listen and learn from folks like you.

But Derek, I’ve never won an election on my own. From student government to Governor of Pennsylvania, I’ve always had a core group of supporters behind me. And now, as we stare down the most important, most consequential election yet, I need this team by my side.

**[Take it from me: Politics can get a little ugly sometimes. But with folks like you in our corner, I know we can make sure Pennsylvanians hear the truth about our campaign — not the far-right’s lies. If you’re with me, will you chip in just a few dollars to keep our campaign in fighting shape?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124666668/599317866/-1395620021?refcode=email_020326_basketball&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTI2ZjE1YS00ZDAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3e6K04O4-EsFixNQY7l1SI34CqzOwDTWMcn-t4Ej1lw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124666669/599317867/-1395620021?&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&refcode=email_020326_basketball&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTI2ZjE1YS00ZDAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3e6K04O4-EsFixNQY7l1SI34CqzOwDTWMcn-t4Ej1lw=)

* * *
Peter, history doesn’t just happen; it is written by those who show up when the stakes are highest. _Right now, we are witnessing the first chapters of a Great American Realignment._ The "blue fever" we’re seeing isn't just a trend; it’s a mandate. From the heart of Texas, where we just defied every political gravity to flip a State Senate seat, to the decisive victories in Minnesota that protected our progress, the message is clear: **_The grip of MAGA extremism is shattering._** We are winning in places we weren't "supposed" to win, from the plains of Iowa to the suburbs of Virginia. _This is the moment we’ve been waiting for._ We have a rare, generational opportunity to sweep the ballot and return power to WE THE PEOPLE. But this momentum only moves as fast as we fuel it. **Local Democracy Project is recruiting the boldest leaders, training the most dedicated organizers, and supporting the Progressives who will usher in a more free and just America.** [**Will you chip in today to help us seize this momentum and rebuild our democracy?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnN_uWYPpvMkxHbaNmJMl7Mjq50-rCekK79UYNFuPRuPwkz3iH1xqXfMEee0S0B6XyvoLawu7CU9g1CVJ-PtBfr2KLGF1EScE6Ge0wXYOeaM4IP0XZBgSQ13maEp5j09EezR3bj-EIScogBAxW68AyYv6S5U1OpOUKs0aZtHJRJQg1hOGlXN_tIY8XPOP-9YmwzTdJofwNdfA54ZOAAIL64eXvgyK0XWo5QhbafBPZc85eR4fP6BVIwO3fgvTW86J4keFRSO9G-JdIjrMybncBZDektVhbBshtq8xigm65RHS8C6jhlpXGVupXRZ_0nVWX_Q/4nu/i4__JfObQRy9uYlPdwcHDw/h2/h001.09qptWAyYnuNNwrFlfAtV_eKHz7cCyXReyu3kwxEPLc) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcmFqYWZvcmlsL3AvYW4tdW5saWtlbHktc3RvcnktdG8tdGVsbC15b3U_.ZQ_iSH6uS0S2_JC5UQEXR66g79RU6mNCuZEwr2dFiXE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rajaforil/p/an-unlikely-story-to-tell-you?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I have an unlikely story to tell you.
I grew up as a racial, religious, and ethnic minority immigrant with 29 letters in my name.
My family worked hard to achieve the American Dream, but we faced tough times and had to rely on food stamps and public housing to get by.
But thanks to these programs, my parents' hard work, and support from our community, we defied the odds and found a path to the middle class.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6c361009-20bb-4c57-85c9-fcb3f1a1028c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Look, there aren't a whole lot of people with backgrounds and stories like mine in the halls of Congress.
When I first ran for office, some people thought that I didn't have the right name, the right background, or the connections to win. It wasn't the first time I was written off -- but voters proved them wrong.
**Together we defied the odds again - and I had the honor of being elected as Illinois' first Indian-American Congressman.**
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6c361009-20bb-4c57-85c9-fcb3f1a1028c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Now, I'm trying to defy the odds one more time.
There's a lot at stake right now -- our democracy is under threat, ICE is running rampant and murdering U.S. citizens in our streets, and working families are struggling.
**You can bet that Donald Trump and his far-right MAGA allies don 't want to see someone like me in the U.S. Senate. And they're going to throw **_**everything**_**at me to stop us from winning.**
That's why I need to ask for your support. This is an uphill battle, but I know firsthand what defying the odds looks like -- and I know we can do it again.
But early voting starts in _less than 48 hours_ , and I'm up against a shady, dark money Super PAC that is running hundreds of thousands of dollars in misleading ads.
If we're going to defy the odds, win this race, and flip the Senate blue, I need you with me right now.
**[Please, can I count on your support before voters hit the polls?](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6c361009-20bb-4c57-85c9-fcb3f1a1028c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ RUSH A DONATION ->](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6c361009-20bb-4c57-85c9-fcb3f1a1028c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thank you,
Raja

**_[YOU, my team just uncovered that one of our so-called members was a RADICAL DEMOCRAT, actively working to undermine and dismantle my America First agenda from the inside.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e145503/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtMjAyNi10cnVtcC1hZHZpc29yeS1ib2FyZC12NC1zYg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjAyMDM/LbmNsa05ZdWQ2Mw/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTIyNDEwX2Z0ZDE/gaYJ6wg/s9idff1ee38)_**

_WE CAUGHT THEM_ _WE EXPOSED THEM_ _WE KICKED THEM OUT IMMEDIATELY_

That means **ONE SPOT JUST OPENED UP!** And, I’m giving you **ONE FINAL CHANCE **to prove where you stand. Will your name appear on my Trump roster tonight?

[FINAL SPOT AVAILABLE FOR YOU.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e145503/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtMjAyNi10cnVtcC1hZHZpc29yeS1ib2FyZC12NC1zYg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjAyMDM/LbmNsa05ZdWQ2Mw/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTIyNDEwX2Z0ZDE/gaYJ6wg/s9idff1ee38)

This is a critical midterm year. We are holding the **HOUSE** and the **SENATE****by a razor-thin margin** , and the Radical Left is doing EVERYTHING they can to rip control away and shut me down.
Your support via the Trump Advisory Board could decide the future of this country.
This is about SAVING AMERICA – plain and simple.

body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=sP2wWYxv%2BUCcH4XNrvMtplNppnqAzw9j1NrzNhEQL3NVEBatkHd3R9DqZngh%2FFejhX86Njp3ROqWAlB23H557giwbc3UKF21UJ%2FMrlJDmtk8goWTqOipbNXTLoGbsrrE9LNnBdH56QDzmNyR2Aj7HbC6QNnGJpuRBHSfiHJjrX89Pu9FGvEmQrlW6nNjxIxd3q4WQP3mRYwvV1mrxhV%2FHYBPxbmFHvORpRNexaL3SDDdVK6ODds9xwdB6i8rP7oD5ebeTKlA%2BlIRHv0TWfPezYQSiMIqdaORGkcpbrrMKXFPGBYQ5gcjtlDUZSGRK41ODEDExtQ%2B7Qmdli%2BtvGfp5jvXwKVsPyJEMiVFOQ86vEb%2BuxkezM%2F3pnSqeReyMrwit8HqzViycplMMfrqVmIGQiK%2F7lcr8aZZ4g245dNNNKecIUOpr0c6UsxrS8pbf8DN)
---
| |
---
Peter,

ICE detained a five-year-old boy named Liam Ramos despite his parents following the law. **Liam’s parents didn’t enter the U.S. illegally.** They did **_exactly_** what the law prescribes – they presented themselves at a port of entry, requested asylum, and were waiting for their day in court.

The facts didn’t stop JD Vance from confronting me on social media to try to defend the imprisonment of 5 year old Liam. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124667363/599320450/2092679929?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20260203_FR_VanceTweet_0_3MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTFiNjU0MS01MjAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nwARPbkx1220rBqlrMGwW6yLOLWu4y9ibEUaUBBNVjg=) We need to stand up to bullies like JD Vance. And as long as I am in Congress, that is exactly what I will do.

It’s never been more important for us to stand up against the extremism of the Trump administration. [I need your help. Please chip in so I can continue to hold the Trump administration accountable for their cruelty.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124667364/599320451/2092679929?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20260203_FR_VanceTweet_0_3MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTFiNjU0MS01MjAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nwARPbkx1220rBqlrMGwW6yLOLWu4y9ibEUaUBBNVjg=)

I won't stay silent while they twist the truth to justify tearing families apart.

Onward,
Seth

They did exactly what the law prescribes – they presented themselves at a port of entry, requested asylum, and were waiting for their day in court. The facts didn’t stop JD Vance from confronting me on social media to try to defend the imprisonment of 5 year old Liam. = We need to stand up to bullies like JD Vance. And as long as I am in Congress, that is exactly what I will do. It’s never been more important for us to stand up against the extremism of the Trump administration. = I won't stay silent while they twist the truth to justify tearing families apart. name: Pramila Jayapal (via LeftNet)
subject: Trump’s invasion of Venezuela is about oil, greed, and power.
body:
Yes, Nicolas Maduro is an illegitimate dictator. That fact alone does not give Trump the authority to invade Venezuela.
#
Let’s be clear about what has happened in Venezuela. Donald Trump recently ordered an illegal and unconstitutional attack, with no authorization from Congress, and no plan for what comes next.
This is how forever wars start. It’s not about drug trafficking — if it were, Trump wouldn’t have pardoned the former Honduran president who was convicted for his role in a drug trafficking scheme that smuggled 400 tons of cocaine into the United States.
**This is about oil, greed, and power. And it’s about a president who lied when he said he’d put a stop to endless wars and focus on making life affordable for people here at home.**
Trump can’t even run America, and now he wants to run Venezuela.
Congress, not the president, has the sole power to authorize war. Republicans need to step up, do their Constitutional duty, and join Democrats in ensuring that Congress reasserts our authority and puts a stop to this.
Because if we allow Trump to get away with this, we’re setting a precedent where any rogue leader can push regime change anywhere they want across the world.
I’m fighting back, but I can’t do it alone.
**[Will you add your name to join me in the fight to stop forever wars and rein in Trump’s abuse of power?](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22304?t=1&akid=1499%2E2118727%2ESFKUMn)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME ››](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22304?t=2&akid=1499%2E2118727%2ESFKUMn)**
The American people have said over and over again that we do not want another war. If we’re going to stop this one, we have to step up together.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

**LeftNet is an online political network fighting for progressive causes and candidates focused on social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=1499%2E2118727%2ESFKUMn)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/update_your_information/?t=4&akid=1499%2E2118727%2ESFKUMn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leftnet.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1499%2E2118727%2ESFKUMn)

Email us: [team@leftnet.org](mailto:team@leftnet.org)

| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/053e642e-3ac8-410e-9492-496d4f137302?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As an election observer with over four decades covering the intricacies of American democracy, I've witnessed how razor-thin margins can expose the vulnerabilities in our voting systems.

An examination of historical races--like Al Franken's 2008 Senate win in Minnesota and Dino Rossi's 2004 gubernatorial defeat in Washington--and their alleged ties to ongoing voter integrity debates is too similar to ignore.

I'll connect these races to contemporary issues involving Governors Tim Walz (D-MN) and Bob Ferguson (D-WA), including allegations of fraud in Somali-American communities and First Lady Dr. Jill Biden's 2022 visits to Minnesota promoting child care funds.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.DT4m0u2LvBGEUmmGiORC5eAR3G-dUCtzfaLABcJMyXg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=186774644)
Drawing on facts, I'll pursue a non-partisan lens, highlighting verified events, reforms, and unresolved questions rather than unsubstantiated conspiracies.

Let's start with the 2004 Washington gubernatorial election, a textbook case of electoral chaos that amplified concerns over mail-in and absentee ballots. Republican Dino Rossi initially led Democrat Christine Gregoire by 261 votes out of nearly 2.9 million cast, based on the machine count.

A mandatory machine recount narrowed Rossi's lead to 42 votes, prompting a hand recount requested by Democrats. During this process, King County--Washington's most populous and Democratic-leaning area--discovered hundreds of previously uncounted absentee ballots in a warehouse, some mishandled due to administrative errors.

Gregoire ultimately won by 133 votes after these ballots were included, leading Republicans to cry foul over potential fraud and lax oversight.

Rossi challenged the results in court, alleging illegal votes from felons and deceased individuals, but a judge upheld Gregoire's victory in June 2005, citing insufficient evidence of widespread fraud.

The saga highlighted issues with Washington's hybrid system, where absentee ballots ( precursors to full mail-in voting) were common but prone to human error. By 2011, the state shifted to all-mail elections, a move praised for accessibility but criticized by some for [security risks](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/29320cce-4092-4cb9-b347-a09fbc634f8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

This race didn't just cost Rossi the governorship; it eroded public trust, with echoes in national debates over mail ballots during the 2020 election. Four years later, Minnesota's 2008 U.S. Senate race between Saturday Night Live [comedian and writer](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8e9e085a-56d4-4f02-bfa3-6217b27d9041?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Democrat Al Franken and Republican incumbent Norm Coleman mirrored Washington's drama, intensifying scrutiny on [absentee ballots and recounts](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d677e17a-9222-458f-b833-176b9f6b66dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Coleman led by 215 votes on election night, but a recount flipped the result, giving Franken a 312-vote margin after eight months of legal battles.

Controversies, again, centered on rejected absentee ballots: Franken's team argued thousands were improperly dismissed due to technicalities like mismatched signatures or witness issues, while Coleman claimed fraud, including votes from ineligible felons.

A state canvassing board and courts [eventually included](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3ecad4f8-adde-4cd2-9f3f-710608b13501?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) many of these ballots, tipping the scale.

The Minnesota Supreme Court [unanimously affirmed](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/be40bc05-5abb-4e97-a617-57121c20935d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Franken's win in June 2009. A Washington judge upheld the election of Gov. Christine Gregoire.

This race, like Rossi's, underscored how absentee ballots--often used by overseas voters, the elderly, military and minorities--could become flashpoints in tight contests. It led to modest reforms in Minnesota, including better training for election officials, but critics argue it normalized prolonged disputes that undermine confidence.

These historical episodes "paved the way" for each other--Rossi preceded Franken--but they collectively fueled a national discourse on voter integrity, particularly around mail-in voting and [Somali immigration](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/86114928-8e0f-4f75-8340-5a60dd699f72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) advocacy. Washington, with its early adoption of high absentee rates, became a model (or cautionary tale) for other states. By 2020, amid the pandemic, mail ballots surged nationwide, reigniting old fears. In Minnesota, [allegations of ballot harvesting](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/96f8582b-8e15-4560-be7b-de149cd091dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Somali-American communities emerged, notably in a 2020 Project Veritas video claiming illicit practices tied to Rep. Ilhan Omar's campaign.

A 2020 press release from a Republican lawmaker claimed "massive voter fraud" in Somali areas, but courts dismissed related lawsuits for lack of evidence.

Still, these claims persist, linking back to the absentee ballot debates of 2008.

Fast-forward to today, and the dots connect to Governors Walz and Ferguson through a web of political alliances and scandals. Bob Ferguson, Washington's Attorney General since 2013, won the 2024 gubernatorial race handily against Republican Dave Reichert, becoming governor in January 2025.

His relationship with Minnesota's Tim Walz appears collegial, rooted in shared Democratic priorities. In December 2025, Walz attended a $2,500-a-plate fundraiser in Seattle for Ferguson, amid Walz's own reelection preparations. He has announced he will not run amidst today's scandals.

The event drew criticism as Walz faced scrutiny over massive fraud in Minnesota's social programs, many benefiting Somali immigrants.

Federal probes have charged dozens in schemes defrauding child nutrition, autism services, and child care funds--totaling over $250 million since 2022.

The Feeding Our Future scandal, involving Somali-led nonprofits, saw convictions for wire fraud and money laundering, with funds allegedly siphoned for luxury goods.

Critics blame Walz's administration for lax oversight, especially as the Department of Justice ramped up investigations in late 2025.

Somali communities, while not monolithic, have been implicated.

Adding irony, Dr. Jill Biden visited Minnesota in February 2022 to tout federal investments in child care, joining Walz at the University of Minnesota's child development center.

She praised the American Rescue Plan's $39 billion for stabilizing providers, emphasizing affordability for families--including immigrant ones.

Walz echoed her, noting Minnesota's use of funds to support early education.

Yet, by 2026, some of these programs face fraud allegations, with a recent HHS rule closing loopholes that allowed payments without attendance verification.

This has fueled conservative narratives linking Biden-era spending to waste, though experts attribute issues to rapid fund distribution during COVID.

Walz and Ferguson's ["cozy" ties](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8697ff36-0723-4f8e-9f0a-37ae63645494?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with Somali communities in their states, seems standard party networking. As we approach future cycles, the real lesson is vigilance: robust audits, bipartisan oversight, prohibition of mail-in ballots to keep judges out of elections, and evidence-based reforms to safeguard democracy without disenfranchising voters. In a polarized era, distinguishing fact from frenzy is key, but the systems put in place and ripe for corruption from Rossi and Franken era lives on.

_Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer._

name: Tobias Read
subject: Politico: President Trump says Republicans should take over elections
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260203em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260203em]
President Trump just crossed a line.
He’s now openly calling for Republicans to take over over elections by “nationalizing” them — stripping states of their authority and handing personal control over to a president who already tried to bully, pressure, and lie his way into staying in power.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260203em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260203em]
That’s not how democracy or our Constitution works. And it’s nott going to fly in Oregon — not while I’m Secretary of State.
It’s my job to protect our elections from interference, intimidation, and politicians who believe power belongs to them rather than the people.
We’ve already stopped Trump’s illegal efforts twice in court. We blocked attempts to pry into Oregon’s private voter data. We defended state elections and Oregon’s gold-standard vote-by-mail system. We won, and we’re prepared to do it again.
But make no mistake: these fights are deliberate, ongoing, and relentless. Trump and his allies are counting on states backing down. I won’t — and I know you won’t either.
If you believe Oregon’s elections should be run by Oregonians — not a president who has no respect for our democracy — chip in to support this work today. We need all hands on deck to defend our elections from MAGA Republicans who care more about power than the people. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260203em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260203em]
If Washington tries to overrule Oregon’s voters, we’ll be ready. If they try to bully our election officials, we’ll defend them. And if they try to take away Oregon’s voting system and hand it to Republicans in Congress, we’ll fight tooth and nail to stop it.
Join me in the fight today, and let’s get to work. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260203em]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260203em]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
