name: Impeaching Hegseth and RFK Jr. (VPP)
subject: Thank you, House Dems!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
A huge step towards accountability >>
| **House Democrats Double Down on Hegseth, RFK Jr. Impeachments as More Scandals Emerge** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/102552?t=6&akid=22828%2E878179%2E9UhFi3) **We need to act FAST before Trump unleashes his revenge!** [**We’re gathering 500 signatures to THANK House Democrats at 8 AM tomorrow – so we need your signature by MIDNIGHT! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/102552?t=7&akid=22828%2E878179%2E9UhFi3) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/102552?t=8&akid=22828%2E878179%2E9UhFi3)
---
TO: House Democratic Caucus
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you! **_Dear House Democrats – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

Your fight to IMPEACH Trump’s stooges Pete Hegseth and RFK Jr. is exactly what our country needs right now.

The American people are sick and tired of Hegseth and RFK Jr.’s inexperience, dangerous lies, and life-threatening policies!

**This news gives me hope that we WILL hold them accountable — and stand up to Trump’s authoritarianism once and for all.**

**I’m so grateful to have you leading the way!**

[**That’s why I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation and to help House Democrats FLIP the few seats we need to take back the majority »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/102552?t=9&akid=22828%2E878179%2E9UhFi3) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/102552?t=10&akid=22828%2E878179%2E9UhFi3)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22828%2E878179%2E9UhFi3). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22828%2E878179%2E9UhFi3).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=22828%2E878179%2E9UhFi3) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=22828%2E878179%2E9UhFi3). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=22828%2E878179%2E9UhFi3)
---

name: URGENT PETITION via Team Raja
subject: Not ONE more dollar for Trump’s ICE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RAJA FOR ILLINOIS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_senate-footer_q22025?amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_senate-footer_q22025?amount=5]

URGENT → DEMOCRATS DEMAND ICE RESTRICTIONS

Peter, Donald Trump’s out-of-control ICE is wreaking havoc and terrorizing our communities.

They’re kidnapping our neighbors off our streets and tearing apart families.

They’ve enacted massive violence – resulting in the deaths of two American citizens.

Right now, the bill to fund ICE is before Congress. We cannot sit idly by while Donald Trump and his ICE cronies h
arm Americans.

name: The VoteVets PX
subject: New Shirt: The Tuskegee Airmen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
All true Americans know that one of our greatest assets as a nation is our diversity. The best of all peoples, bringing their best, to serve this country.
#
Peter:
All true Americans know that one of our greatest assets as a nation is our diversity. The best of all peoples, bringing their best, to serve this country.
There is arguably no better example of this than the Tuskegee Airmen in World War II — our nation’s first black military aviators. Barred from pilot roles until 1941, they went on to become one of the most elite fighter outfits in history. Their valor and excellence was a driving force in the desegregation of the entire military after the Second World War.
So when Pete Hegseth says stuff like “Your diversity is not your strength,” remember the Tuskegee Airmen.
[**And for Black History Month, honor their service by wearing our “Diversity is Lethality” shirt. $35 at the VoteVets PX, and shipped to you free of charge with the code FREESHIP25.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/19425?t=1&akid=34919%2E3013755%2E2KQ4v9)

With out-of-control ICE agents killing Americans in the streets – it’s never been more clear that Kristi Noem is a complete failure at her job as Secretary of Homeland Security.
Even some Republicans are now saying it’s time for her to step aside, but she still has the support of Donald Trump.
**As one of the first Senate Democrats who called on Noem to be impeached, I believe we need to send a clear message that the American people overwhelmingly agree that it's time for Noem to go. _[Will you please add your name to my petition now calling for Kristi Noem to resign or be removed from office _immediately_?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124668415/599324558/292619986?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&refcode=jtk5694-su-nd&code=jtk5694-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWM5OGNjNy01NDAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pwkd0Sd2FqHf9pj2-9kuvm6_lh6SrJwpzh_-i5UY-eo=&emci=9fdddf69-0e01-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=85c98cc7-5401-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=3800590)_**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My day in court
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friend, it's Mark.
Most of you probably know that I am suing the Secretary of Defense. Today, I was in court to make my case against Pete Hegseth, and I just left the courthouse.
After 25 years in uniform and another 5 in the United States Senate, I never imagined I’d have to do something like that. Hegseth has left me no choice.
When he censured me and threatened my rank and retirement, he came after what I earned over 25 years — and chilled the free speech rights of every retired member of the military alongside me.
If Hegseth isn’t stopped, our longest-serving military veterans will have to live with the constant threat that they could be deprived of their rank and pension years — even decades — after they leave the military if they say something he doesn’t like.
I’m not going to sit by and let that happen. So, I sued Hegseth. And now, we wait and see what the court decides.
I’ve been truly humbled by the support people have sent my way over the past couple of months. It means the world to me that so many of you care about what Trump and Hegseth are trying to do.
That’s how we’ve made it this far, and it’s how we’ll get to the other side of this chapter in our nation’s history. Together.
If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a stand and join the fight, this is it.
[**Please, if you can spare a quick donation, can I count on you to chip in?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-feb26.6dv2ri&refcode=em260203-1-120&t=1&akid=6356%2E6688874%2E6U8-55)

---
This is BIG, friend: I just turned in ballot petitions signed by thousands of grassroots supporters across New Mexico, and **now I’m OFFICIALLY on the ballot to be New Mexico’s next Governor.**
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4682?refcode=jtk225-fr-nd&t=2&akid=7285%2E400544%2EVucvOD)

---
I truly could not have done this without folks like you. Even if you don’t live in New Mexico and couldn’t sign my petition, I still want to say thank you. You showed up in so many other ways, and that support helped get us here. Reading my emails and texts (I know I reach out a lot), chipping in whatever you comfortably can, and standing with this campaign, all of that helped get me officially on this ballot. This accomplishment is a testament to how strong our grassroots campaign is — and how it's growing every single day.
New Mexico needs a leader who can help move our state toward a future where everyone can thrive — and I can promise you this, friend: **I'm the best person for the job.** On Day One, I’ll begin tackling healthcare in New Mexico, bringing down costs while raising wages, improving education so our kids read earlier, and standing as a brick wall against Trump and the federal government when they try to push their extremist agenda and sow fear.

I will build a New Mexico where **_every single person_** is safe, healthy, and able to thrive.
**Thank you so much for supporting my campaign for governor, friend.[If you'd like to do even more to help power my fight, chip in $5 – or whatever you can spare – to help me win in November.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4682?refcode=jtk225-fr-nd&t=4&akid=7285%2E400544%2EVucvOD)**

Stay fierce,
Deb

clean_body: | | | This is BIG, friend: I just turned in ballot petitions signed by thousands of grassroots supporters across New Mexico, and now I’m OFFICIALLY on the ballot to be New Mexico’s next Governor. | | I truly could not have done this without folks like you. Even if you don’t live in New Mexico and couldn’t sign my petition, I still want to say thank you. You showed up in so many other ways, and that support helped get us here. Reading my emails and texts (I know I reach out a lot), chipping in whatever you comfortably can, and standing with this campaign, all of that helped get me officially on this ballot. This accomplishment is a testament to how strong our grassroots campaign is — and how it's growing every single day. New Mexico needs a leader who can help move our state toward a future where everyone can thrive — and I can promise you this, friend: I'm the best person for the job. On Day One, I’ll begin tackling healthcare in New Mexico, bringing down costs while raising wages, improving education so our kids read earlier, and standing as a brick wall against Trump and the federal government when they try to push their extremist agenda and sow fear. I will build a New Mexico where every single person is safe, healthy, and able to thrive. Thank you so much for supporting my campaign for governor, friend. Stay fierce, Deb | | | | |

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: The FBI raid on Fulton County’s elections office should set off alarm bells for all of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
In this moment of rising autocracy |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124668724/599325608/1793776944?refcode=emm_ff_20260203_T1_SYAFulton_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDdmYWMwZS01NjAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_DWvBVA2wlZeI3BAqhqbPtjSHwi5L6bvyJDtmT3C4I=&emci=af77b19d-3f01-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=407fac0e-5601-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=1037277)

| | | **“The FBI raid at the Fulton County elections office should alarm us all.”**
—Stacey Abrams
---
I co-founded Fair Fight after significant large-scale voter difficulties in Georgia’s 2018 election.
And I had one fundamental mission in mind: to help make sure every eligible voter can register to vote, cast their ballot, and have it counted.
We got to work tackling voter suppression. We helped make sure people were ready and able to make their voices heard at the ballot box. And in 2020, Georgia voters awarded our state’s electoral votes to Joe Biden — the first time a Democratic presidential candidate had won here in nearly 30 years.
Donald Trump has yet to forgive the people of Georgia for handing him that defeat.
He and his extremist enablers have continued to spread lies about the results and spew conspiracy theories focused on Fulton County, Georgia. **And just last week, the FBI carried out a raid at a Fulton County elections office, seizing hundreds of boxes of election-related materials from the 2020 cycle.**
That should set off alarm bells for all of us in this moment.
Fulton County is the most populous in Georgia, home to roughly a million people, the majority of them Black, Latino, Asian, and immigrant. It is a backbone of Democratic participation in the state. The Trump Regime seizing the 2020 voter file along with ballots is very concerning. And Trump directly engaging with the FBI agents shows this is a personal vendetta and that he is willing to violate any and all norms to attempt to suppress votes and control elections. **If you were looking for a single dataset that could be misused to intimidate, challenge, or preemptively disqualify voters at scale, this would be it.**
[**This news makes it even more critical to make sure the will of the people can still be heard. The team at Fair Fight continues to defend the basic American principle of free and fair elections in Georgia, throughout the South, and around the country. They need our support in this moment of rising autocracy. Please donate to Fair Fight today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124668726/599325610/689896174?refcode=emm_ff_20260203_T1_SYAFulton_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDdmYWMwZS01NjAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_DWvBVA2wlZeI3BAqhqbPtjSHwi5L6bvyJDtmT3C4I=)

---|---
The FBI raid comes as the Trump Regime faces an array of political setbacks — including intense backlash to their ICE raids and violence.
If they do not believe their Republican Party can win free and fair elections, they appear ready to try to silence the will of the people.
That is how you hollow out a democracy.
In Step 10 of the 10 Steps to Autocracy and Authoritarianism that I have laid out, people are still allowed to show up and cast ballots, but decisions will already have been made long before Election Day — about who is allowed to register, whose eligibility is challenged, whose presence is considered suspicious, whose vote is counted, and whose is quietly discarded.
It’s the difference between the right to vote and the ability to vote.
Once that line is crossed, elections can remain technically “free” while no longer being fair — because the outcomes are shaped in advance, and the test is graded before anyone is allowed to take it.
**There is still time to stop American autocracy, but not much. Organizations like Fair Fight will continue to need our support so they can ensure elections that are truly free and actually fair.**
[**Make a contribution to Fair Fight today to help fight back against voter suppression and elect Democracy Champions who will defend the freedom to vote.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124668757/599325711/689896174?refcode=emm_ff_20260203_T1_SYAFulton_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDdmYWMwZS01NjAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_DWvBVA2wlZeI3BAqhqbPtjSHwi5L6bvyJDtmT3C4I=)
Thank you,
Stacey

clean_body: In this moment of rising autocracy | | | | “The FBI raid at the Fulton County elections office should alarm us all.” —Stacey Abrams I co-founded Fair Fight after significant large-scale voter difficulties in Georgia’s 2018 election. And I had one fundamental mission in mind: to help make sure every eligible voter can register to vote, cast their ballot, and have it counted. We got to work tackling voter suppression. We helped make sure people were ready and able to make their voices heard at the ballot box. And in 2020, Georgia voters awarded our state’s electoral votes to Joe Biden — the first time a Democratic presidential candidate had won here in nearly 30 years. Donald Trump has yet to forgive the people of Georgia for handing him that defeat. He and his extremist enablers have continued to spread lies about the results and spew conspiracy theories focused on Fulton County, Georgia. And just last week, the FBI carried out a raid at a Fulton County elections office, seizing hundreds of boxes of election-related materials from the 2020 cycle. That should set off alarm bells for all of us in this moment. Fulton County is the most populous in Georgia, home to roughly a million people, the majority of them Black, Latino, Asian, and immigrant. It is a backbone of Democratic participation in the state. The Trump Regime seizing the 2020 voter file along with ballots is very concerning. And Trump directly engaging with the FBI agents shows this is a personal vendetta and that he is willing to violate any and all norms to attempt to suppress votes and control elections. If you were looking for a single dataset that could be misused to intimidate, challenge, or preemptively disqualify voters at scale, this would be it. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- The FBI raid comes as the Trump Regime faces an array of political setbacks — including intense backlash to their ICE raids and violence. If they do not believe their Republican Party can win free and fair elections, they appear ready to try to silence the will of the people. That is how you hollow out a democracy. In Step 10 of the 10 Steps to Autocracy and Authoritarianism that I have laid out, people are still allowed to show up and cast ballots, but decisions will already have been made long before Election Day — about who is allowed to register, whose eligibility is challenged, whose presence is considered suspicious, whose vote is counted, and whose is quietly discarded. It’s the difference between the right to vote and the ability to vote. Once that line is crossed, elections can remain technically “free” while no longer being fair — because the outcomes are shaped in advance, and the test is graded before anyone is allowed to take it. There is still time to stop American autocracy, but not much. Organizations like Fair Fight will continue to need our support so they can ensure elections that are truly free and actually fair. = Thank you, Stacey * = = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2026 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. body:

Patriot
They don’t want me to say this and I know I’ll catch a lot of flack for it, but SOMEONE has to say it.
The radical left and their media puppets are screaming about the ICE officer in Minneapolis who defended his life against radical leftist Renee Good.
They call it murder. They riot in the streets. They demand the agent's head on a pike. But I don't care what anybody thinks – **I support that brave ICE officer 100%.**
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15991232/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9qYWlteWJsYW5jby9qYl9kb25fc2JfbmNsX2xuLWlpX2JyXzIwMjYwMjAzLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAyMDM/LbmNsbnpCU0tYWg/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjI0MDRfd3Ix/gaYKDXg/s0o3ca7059d) _(Pictured: ICE Agent Johnathon Ross)_

[DEFEND OUR ICE AGENTS](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15991232/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9qYWlteWJsYW5jby9qYl9kb25fc2JfbmNsX2xuLWlpX2JyXzIwMjYwMjAzLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAyMDM/LbmNsbnpCU0tYWg/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjI0MDRfd3Ix/gaYKDXg/s0o3ca7059d)
He feared for his life when she weaponized her vehicle and tried to run him down during a tense enforcement action. He acted to protect himself and his fellow agents.
**That's not aggression, that's survival.**
This is exactly why **[we need to flip TX-9 red](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15991232/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9qYWlteWJsYW5jby9qYl9kb25fc2JfbmNsX2xuLWlpX2JyXzIwMjYwMjAzLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAyMDM/LbmNsbnpCU0tYWg/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjI0MDRfd3Ix/gaYKDXg/s0o3ca7059d)** and crush Al Green. He's the kind of Democrat who cheers on these mobs, blocks ICE at every turn, and puts criminals over citizens.
My own mother came here legally from Mexico. She earned her citizenship the right way, no shortcuts, no excuses.
She taught me respect for the law. That's why I back our border heroes who put their lives on the line every day to stop the invasion, deport criminals, and keep our communities safe.
The left wants to defund ICE, smear every agent as a killer, and turn Texas into a sanctuary for chaos. Not on my watch.
**In Congress, I'll fight to give ICE the tools, funding, and backing they need... no apologies, no retreats.**
This fight is heating up, and the radicals are dumping millions to stop me from even reaching out to you.
**_[If you can chip in right now – even $10 or $20 – please do it. I’ve been talking to Wisconsinites across the state
| Hi there, since I launched my campaign for Governor, I’ve been traveling across the state and speaking to Wisconsinites about the issues facing their communities. Over and over again, I’ve heard the same concern: life is simply not affordable. Folks are facing rising costs caused by Republicans who care more about their wealthy donors than the people they were elected to represent. That’s why I’m running for governor on a platform of:
* Empowering the small business owners who keep our local economies running
* Putting more money in your pockets by taxing the ultra-wealthy
* Doubling the minimum wage

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Why I’m running in 2026
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] Hi there,

I’m running for re-election this November, and I want to tell you why. But first, I have a quick ask: Can you chip in $ or whatever you can to help us start this race strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2602?amount=]

When I first ran for Congress, I made a promise: to put people over politics, to fight for lower costs and safer communities, and to always put Jersey first over partisan agendas or national noise. That promise hasn’t changed .

While some in Washington are still playing games, I’ve been focused on results. I’ve helped lower health insurance premiums, pushed back against rising costs and Trump’s tariffs, and took real steps to make our communities safer and more affordable.

But here’s the truth : this November will be tough. Extremists are already organizing and targeting this seat, and if we don’t show early strength, they’ll flood this district with attacks.

That’s why I’m asking again, will you chip in $ to help us defend our Jersey Values and show we’re ready for the fight ahead? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2602?amount=]

CONTRIBUTE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2602?amount=]

I’m running because I still believe public service should be about delivering, not dividing. And I’ll never stop working for the people of New Jersey.

Thanks for being in this with me,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. clean_body: [#] Hi there, I’m running for re-election this November, and I want to tell you why. But first, I have a quick ask: Can you chip in $ or whatever you can to help us start this race strong? [=] When I first ran for Congress, I made a promise: to put people over politics, to fight for lower costs and safer communities, and to always put Jersey first over partisan agendas or national noise. That promise hasn’t changed . While some in Washington are still playing games, I’ve been focused on results. I’ve helped lower health insurance premiums, pushed back against rising costs and Trump’s tariffs, and took real steps to make our communities safer and more affordable. But here’s the truth : this November will be tough. Extremists are already organizing and targeting this seat, and if we don’t show early strength, they’ll flood this district with attacks. That’s why I’m asking again, will you chip in $ to help us defend our Jersey Values and show we’re ready for the fight ahead? [=] CONTRIBUTE NOW [=] I’m running because I still believe public service should be about delivering, not dividing. And I’ll never stop working for the people of New Jersey. Thanks for being in this with me, Josh Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. [] Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: I’m making sure this year counts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished, but there’s still more to do. |
#
---
I have to say, team, I’m incredibly proud of the work we've done together to make Michigan the best place in the country to live and raise a family. We've supported workers, made our communities safer, provided free school meals to students, protected reproductive freedom, fixed the damn roads, and more. **Now, it’s my last year in office, and I’m making sure it counts.** Families are still feeling the squeeze from high costs and reckless tariffs, and too many national Republicans are focused on rolling back rights instead of helping people. We can’t rest. Not now. Not when the progress we fought for can be reversed if we don’t keep pushing. **[I want to finish strong, deliver for working families, protect our freedoms, and lock in the wins we’ve earned. | | Peter,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...

This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust.

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=693034a47819461f8af3a5c6c914f4d8&_e=9ZABILf-d8i1kvVV_wa9r63c8l-BfNq-EBWVpw_YFywR4DHTlcwD_iYFGwMn_Gf_ugDuLS45RMwbm-g8cUINX0klNHMVJHBWCqy-d_o1ZQkJU7JL7BlS3GHpOcV7uva6elVX2mrlHx8xo8ZZo6EC0z5Lr17tcyFPhHGT0Fw8JXQ-i41yrjiAKy4tkBeSsLsM6M-W-oo3pakDocaTg9ZfnavlGDX0pmZqppr0oBE4vpwM9SMujAMAY0FGL_Jhk_LuFRw7td1yeY-efEzlRcImDjBzJxBdU6Z98ap6Z9EJKBX1-4OrbW3M7zqP9DCb5n1exfV5GCY66BUOGt0m5K-rql67acArQ42rN9yo_hCLbSQlmEHEobC-TaFQ_xn9ibfLYH8EBjYUHW9rY9y0o3R8xE00jD22cMna7EaRxTvg03v5H5fHQwXWELvkQ25BiD9amuI7Sd0UDjpq0uwNsDGorVd7RT_3UFbr-bSYtK98GQJ8SFYObZ0nERKA_KGsX5F7fPrSPgTyV58pYuYZ9vumJadrqmWoJnCqao8HWwRpUB2s7IkgA3GzNDh6LkstYZiYDT2JfeEGxmYOSU2TJpysyMiNmrDTbnUSK7BQj_3x7bfnfFb2EKSL0cdOlh8RK5T-SUYQFDd68oi9pPVHCD4ywMDFOo3VIRQt-OfkAt4_to8PJx9jOmJXzuWirUHfHz9A)**

Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

clean_body: His final book wasn’t about politics...| | | | | Peter, | | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

It's Michele Tafoya with some exciting news!
As you may know, I cut my teeth as a sideline reporter, and I've been following professional football for as long as I can remember.
I can't wait for next week's big game! I've been keeping close tabs on both teams all season long.
[That’s why I’m thrilled to announce my Countdown to Kick-Off event before the big game on February 8th. I really want you to be a part of it.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/sCbJ4KLUk-0-jD1ZYVlYOO_xdUqLWlWcJmuqYtAqQxeiEav8QfeAeLca03Lq7i3xD4JqCFUP_qTmLjFrejvWEdSlmoIhIRnj0_1DBU8Tyz8Lu74EVChkxU8MusriS5O9lsXbi9mrxnmsgZvYY8XprZEw2uF63qO6kNV6XciBFO9UXaAb8cvZC6L0xJMC0lfUFsNSiVxqTHx8BiCp9lpTyBKv5C9A_3HyA05_rM4Qk_2xXidbzW3XlufwyU97iT8TWt__iLgOZtY5TpRVqoGJH6ckYK6cHZLUlvFxpu4kELoOrhVOOlxYeqKtDaop5mnxrwaYNVMI3kOxlLhOkMHuDsa_qXapL9d-WKXJI-Mn7UGE6ThDPvzdtM6JaXBqb0txAqxjzSjnN9imYQLhyw30A_2bsRhRVtiHlG0TxGK70aXbyXyZc0ED9y-pVVt-lHzfDyl1PyAGykxTZ0BdMOQeNr_Iw-1hWTQ4idoDfPCtK66rerLxLcInx0sba0X9Jq22RDB-tMVgiqsdvtdShXXMIcHAtgF9LpfBXbNJk9J0J3FZ87Wj_pgVQOVnyy-tMeGz01GON2NzKDIwjBn78Vj9EfLPtk8M2lfW-r42hl3nxeTyyra9qx-eEhL1U3gYgRnrpq0Es7znwYGCJeIGmW1xmVMmnsb0jJdomgEGyKVINoZ-DNutX9FLyEZ0lN4zofOj8ZKTi4hw8Ii56wvXF7VNOCn6sv0qvcPOSsTXyFHf3ZIYyMRwz2-rQNHX3DO2dgC8b3heXdxuQ-XQ9RmDFTLSZhQcvB8Pc6Nj4Y-w-1aUitsOY5uWQn6s9t6o6H2tGrkEnLCa/9V4qcbhjHYQaWnxFgKmyxYDDaP4qmGel/17)
It'll be hosted by me (and maybe even a special guest or two).
Now listen -
I'd love to open this up to the public and let anyone join, but we have an uphill battle running for Senate in Minnesota. This will be one of the most consequential races in the country, and we need all hands on deck to win.
So here's the plan: All you need to do to join is pitch in any amount to our campaign, and I'll send you the details on how to join AND how to submit a question you'd like me to answer on air.

clean_body: Peter, It's Michele Tafoya with some exciting news! As you may know, I cut my teeth as a sideline reporter, and I've been following professional football for as long as I can remember. I can't wait for next week's big game! I've been keeping close tabs on both teams all season long. It'll be hosted by me (and maybe even a special guest or two). Now listen - I'd love to open this up to the public and let anyone join, but we have an uphill battle running for Senate in Minnesota. This will be one of the most consequential races in the country, and we need all hands on deck to win. So here's the plan: All you need to do to join is pitch in any amount to our campaign, and I'll send you the details on how to join AND how to submit a question you'd like me to answer on air. You'll get access to this exclusive event, hear my personal thoughts about the big game, and get the inside scoop about why I'm running in the first place. promise you - no one else running for office knows this game, the players, and the history of the teams more than I do. You get to hear my thoughts straight from the horse's mouth. brave. Do good.- Michele TafoyaRepublican for Senate, Minnesota official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! Endorse her here:**| | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447 |

name: Team Seligman
subject: New ICE tactic in Colorado: racist “death cards”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seligman for AG,
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-iceprotest?refcode=x_260203_ICEpetition2_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-iceprotest?refcode=x_260203_ICEpetition2_act]
In Eagle County, ICE agents in unmarked vehicles ran traffic stops, detained people, and left behind ace of spades “death cards,” a symbol long used to terrorize communities.
That kind of behavior isn’t law enforcement. It’s abhorrent, un-American intimidation . And it’s against the damn law.
After the Civil War, Congress passed the Ku Klux Klan Act of 1871 to stop disguised vigilantes from raiding communities and abusing power on public highways. It exists for exactly this kind of anonymous, extra-legal activity.
Now, over a century and a half after the Civil War , the Ku Klux Klan Act is still relevant because agents in disguise are once again intimidating families and violating our civil rights.
David knows where he stands on this: as attorney general, he will hold ICE officers accountable for violating our rights, including using tools like the Ku Klux Klan Act to prosecute lawbreakers .
If you think our leaders should be specific about how they’ll stand up to Donald Trump’s rogue ICE army, add your name to demand accountability for ICE abuses and intimidation in Colorado. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xKCuI2hxU0akC8u5HegFxQ2]
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xKCuI2hxU0akC8u5HegFxQ2]
We need to show the strength of this grassroots campaign right now. Will you donate $10, $25, or $50 to help David fight a rigged system, prosecute abuses of power, and make sure no one, regardless of a badge, is above the law? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-iceprotest?refcode=x_260203_ICEpetition2_act]
— Team Seligman
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-iceprotest?refcode=x_260203_ICEpetition2_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-iceprotest?refcode=x_260203_ICEpetition2_act] As Executive Director of the nonprofit legal organization Towards Justice, David has taken on corporate giants like Amazon, Uber, and the biggest corporate landlords in the country—helping recover more than $70 million stolen from working people by powerful interests.
Now he’s running for attorney general to defend our freedoms, challenge concentrated power, and build a future where working people can thrive.
He’s already doing the work. Visit SeligmanforAG.com [https://www.seligmanforag.com] to learn more.

A senior national political correspondent for _Politico_ was discussing our battleground race on _MS NOW_ and said what we’ve been seeing on the ground for months: **Haley is the front-runner.
**
That kind of recognition doesn’t come out of nowhere. It’s a direct result of the support and dedication of this grassroots team. And it’s all thanks to people like you, null.
This assessment lines up with the data: **New polls show Haley statistically tied with her MAGA Republican opponent and performing better than her primary opponents,** and she’s performing especially well with independent voters, the critical group that decides elections in Michigan.

That’s why analysts are paying attention. And it’s why we _know_ this race is winnable.

**We’ve got the momentum. We’ve got the numbers. And we’ve got a clear path to victory –****if we keep pushing.**
Because we know the GOP is going all in. A Texas oil billionaire is backing our MAGA opponent, and Donald Trump recently traveled to Michigan – signaling that this race is a top priority in the battle for Senate control.

# **[A Smarter Way to Protect Tomorrow Morning](https://substack.com/redirect/c7cea4a4-df4d-4fe3-b717-438d8c0fea2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

---|---|---
**A good night out shouldn 't derail the next day.** Planning ahead is a small shift that makes a real difference, especially as we get more serious about our time and productivity.
That's where **[ZBiotics Pre-Alcohol Probiotic Drink](https://substack.com/redirect/0634953e-3198-4a43-89ef-8113a53b7e18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** comes in. It's the world's first genetically engineered probiotic, developed by PhD scientists to help prevent rough mornings after drinking.
**Here 's how it works:** When you drink alcohol, your body converts it into a toxic byproduct in the gut. It's the buildup of this byproduct--not dehydration--that's largely responsible for feeling lousy the next day. ZBiotics Pre-Alcohol produces an enzyme that breaks this byproduct down, helping your body process alcohol more efficiently.
**The routine is simple:** Make Pre-Alcohol your first drink of the night, drink responsibly, and give yourself a better chance at a productive morning.

* * *
# Melinda Gates demands ex-husband Bill explain Epstein bombshells
Melinda Gates expressed profound sadness for Jeffrey Epstein's victims and said her ex-husband Bill Gates must answer questions **[about his ties to the disgraced financier following the latest release of Epstein files,](https://substack.com/redirect/7b124b73-f879-4f30-aa86-a882b8323dfd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** which include explosive allegations of his extramarital conduct.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/466dd650-c702-48fd-a55c-f30b2f3f8101?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Epstein files allege misconduct** Bill Gates reportedly sought antibiotics to secretly treat an STD allegedly from Russian girls, per draft emails from Epstein's circle; his advisor accused him of morally inappropriate acts.

[| | | | | Alec Lace
---
@AlecLace
🚨 Breaking: Epstein emails allege Bill Gates caught an STD from "Russian girls" & begged Epstein for secret antibiotics to dose Melinda without her knowing. Fast forward: Melinda divorced him in 2021, citing his Epstein ties. Now she's now worth $29.6 Billion
| 6:32 PM * Jan 30, 2026 * 2.56M Views336 Replies * 1.21K Reposts * 5.96K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/466dd650-c702-48fd-a55c-f30b2f3f8101?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Melinda distances herself fully** The philanthropist, divorced from Gates in 2021 partly over his Epstein meetings and affairs, says she has pushed away the pain and is now thriving in a positive new chapter.
* **Gates issues strong denial** A spokesperson for Bill Gates called the claims "absolutely absurd and completely false," suggesting they reflect Epstein's desperation after Gates ended their association years ago.

* * *
# Jill Biden's ex-husband charged with wife's murder
William Stevenson, former husband of Jill Biden during their 1970-1975 marriage, was **[arrested Monday and indicted on first-degree murder](https://substack.com/redirect/14d8bb88-a901-45f4-8dec-cc54bc503c2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in the December death of his current wife, Linda Stevenson, 64, after she was found unresponsive in their Delaware home following a domestic dispute call, authorities said Tuesday.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/14d8bb88-a901-45f4-8dec-cc54bc503c2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Arrest Follows Indictment** Grand jury indicted Stevenson February 2 on one count of first-degree murder; he was taken into custody the same day and held without posting $500,000 bail at Howard Young Correctional Institution.
* **Death Investigation Details** Police responded December 28 to a domestic dispute in the Wilmington area, found Linda unresponsive in the living room, attempted life-saving measures, but she was pronounced dead at the scene with autopsy handled by state forensics.

* **No Comment From Bidens** The Office of Joe and Jill Biden did not respond to requests for comment on the charges against Stevenson, who owned a notable club near the University of Delaware during his marriage to Jill.

* * *
# Billie Eilish slammed over "stolen land" hypocrisy
The Tongva tribe, indigenous to the Los Angeles basin, confirmed **[Billie Eilish's multimillion-dollar LA mansion sits on their ancestral land,](https://substack.com/redirect/c5f098c6-cfb3-40f6-a61a-6dca5c95fe1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** following her Grammy speech declaring "no one is illegal on stolen land" and blasting ICE, prompting accusations of hypocrisy as critics demand she address the claim directly.
* **Tongva Asserts Ancestral Claim** -- Tribe spokesperson states Eilish's gated home is on Gabrieleno Tongva territory in greater LA, with no direct contact from the singer or her team about the property.

[| | | | | John Roberts
---
@johnrobertsFox
The Tongva tribe reacts to @billieeilish remarks about "stolen land": "...As the First People of the greater Los Angeles basin, we do understand that her home is situated in our ancestral land. Eilish has not contacted our tribe directly regarding her property..." We'll follow up
| 1:49 PM * Feb 3, 2026 * 178K Views273 Replies * 1.26K Reposts * 5.39K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/58431002-2527-41f5-9881-a97f6e64f559?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Tribe Seeks Explicit Recognition** -- Spokesperson hopes celebrities invoking "stolen land" explicitly name the Gabrieleno Tongva to clarify the basin's indigenous history and avoid vague virtue signaling.
* **Historical Irony Highlighted** -- Critics argue that all land has historically conquered, including by Tongva ancestors from prior groups, undermining moral claims against modern property owners.

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23888%2E4449941%2E_b4q6x) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23888%2E4449941%2E_b4q6x) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72950?t=3&akid=23888%2E4449941%2E_b4q6x) **Listen, we’re writing with a CRITICAL UPDATE.**

[Because of Trump’s orders, ICE has the go-ahead to conduct BRUTAL RAIDS in your city and in cities across the country!](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72950?t=4&akid=23888%2E4449941%2E_b4q6x)

[**We’re HORRIFIED and DISGUSTED, but we have no idea if voters in your city feel the same way.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72950?t=5&akid=23888%2E4449941%2E_b4q6x) [ **dpwillis67@gmail.com: DO YOU APPROVE OF ICE RAIDS IN YOUR CITY? **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72950?t=6&akid=23888%2E4449941%2E_b4q6x) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72950?t=7&akid=23888%2E4449941%2E_b4q6x)
| | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72950?t=8&akid=23888%2E4449941%2E_b4q6x)
---
| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72950?t=9&akid=23888%2E4449941%2E_b4q6x)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72950?t=10&akid=23888%2E4449941%2E_b4q6x)
---
Look, we can’t overstate this.

Trump’s ICE raids are vile, repulsive and completely inhumane.

We want to send a strong message to Trump that local voters won’t tolerate them... but the sad reality is we can’t say that in full honesty. We have no idea.

Please, we need more data. We’re literally begging you, will you take our quick poll so we can show Trump that voters in your city won’t accept these raids??

Peter, today is National Women Physicians Day, and we're celebrating our very own Doctor Kim Schrier!

Kim was the first pediatrician ever elected to Congress, and she remains the only pro-choice woman doctor serving in Congress today. Her time in office hasn't always been easy, _but she didn't run for office because it was easy._

She ran because her former representative wasn't doing enough to fight for affordable healthcare, and as a doctor and a mom, she knew Washington families deserved better. Now, every day in Congress, Kim brings that same commitment to lowering healthcare costs, protecting affordable insurance, and defending the right to access abortion and essential reproductive care.

Her medical background isn't just part of her career history; it's part of her story—and it's essential to the fight we're in right now. On this National Women Physicians Day, let's remind our favorite woman physician how grateful we are to have her fighting for us. [**Add your name to her card today and show Kim how much we appreciate her work for us in Congress! name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: They wouldn’t attack me like this if they weren’t scared
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JASMINE FOR TEXAS Jasmine for Texas
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124669832/599329071/-1529437191?refcode=260203_E1A4_JC_GOPAttacksRS&refcode2=b7e13a7c-5a01-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&contactdata=x/WiGFuNELJYH5/Kfi23Z4e/aP98QLkz8Ifts1HEgKqJXAuNB1nexewHK7HUyw3d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2UxM2E3Yy01YTAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCTqfUv_s5-U3ChXb22BDaRSwAcWhFWX0k_4CMsa4PA=) | | They don’t attack you like this unless you’re a threat. _Donald Trump calls me “low IQ.”
One Republican U.S. Senator says I’m hearing voices.
The Vice President mocks my appearance on stage to cheers._ That’s not strength. That’s fear. They see the polls. They know I’m leading this primary. And instead of waiting, they decided to come for me early — insults, lies, and dog whistles — hoping they can scare me off or soften me up. Let me be very clear: _**it won’t work.**_ [**If you’ve got my back, I’m asking you right now to chip in and help me meet these attacks head-on.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124669833/599329072/-1529437191?amount=10&refcode=260203_E1A4_JC_GOPAttacksRS&refcode2=b7e13a7c-5a01-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&contactdata=x/WiGFuNELJYH5/Kfi23Z4e/aP98QLkz8Ifts1HEgKqJXAuNB1nexewHK7HUyw3d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2UxM2E3Yy01YTAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCTqfUv_s5-U3ChXb22BDaRSwAcWhFWX0k_4CMsa4PA=) | [DONATE » ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124669834/599329073/-879695014?amount=10&refcode=260203_E1A4_JC_GOPAttacksRS&refcode2=b7e13a7c-5a01-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&contactdata=x/WiGFuNELJYH5/Kfi23Z4e/aP98QLkz8Ifts1HEgKqJXAuNB1nexewHK7HUyw3d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2UxM2E3Yy01YTAxLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCTqfUv_s5-U3ChXb22BDaRSwAcWhFWX0k_4CMsa4PA=)
---
I didn’t become a public defender because it was easy. I didn’t stand with protesters when it was unpopular. And I didn’t win my first race by 90 votes because I was “safe.”
I fight. And Texans know it.
**I’m running to turn out the people this state keeps ignoring — the folks who need health care, open hospitals, and someone who won’t blink when powerful people get uncomfortable.**
That’s why they’re coming for me.
That’s why they’re nervous.
And that’s exactly why this campaign can win.
**But make no mistake — winning this race means being ready for everything they’re throwing at us, starting now.**
[**So I’m asking again: stand with me and make a contribution today. clean_body: = | | They don’t attack you like this unless you’re a threat. Donald Trump calls me “low IQ.” One Republican U.S. Senator says I’m hearing voices. The Vice President mocks my appearance on stage to cheers. That’s not strength. That’s fear. They see the polls. They know I’m leading this primary. And instead of waiting, they decided to come for me early — insults, lies, and dog whistles — hoping they can scare me off or soften me up. Let me be very clear: it won’t work. = | = I didn’t become a public defender because it was easy. I didn’t stand with protesters when it was unpopular. And I didn’t win my first race by 90 votes because I was “safe.” I fight. And Texans know it. I’m running to turn out the people this state keeps ignoring — the folks who need health care, open hospitals, and someone who won’t blink when powerful people get uncomfortable. That’s why they’re coming for me. That’s why they’re nervous. And that’s exactly why this campaign can win. * * *
_**By David Shuster**_
The latest memorandum from the Trump administration's Immigration and Customs Enforcement Agency (ICE) cheerfully announces with bureaucratic calm what once would have been answered by revolutionary era muskets: federal agents may enter private homes without a warrant signed by a judge.
According to internal documents disclosed by whistleblowers and reviewed by multiple news organizations, including The Washington Post and the Associated Press, this memo directs ICE officers to rely on internal "administrative warrants" -- not warrants signed by a neutral judge -- to forcibly enter residences to make arrests.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a557d2fe-407b-4ff0-8f63-b80e9f86c97a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In practical terms, it gives the Trump administration license to break down doors without the traditional judicial oversight that has long been a cornerstone of American liberty.
This is not merely a policy adjustment. It is a confession--of contempt for the U.S. Constitution and for the intelligence of the American public.
* * *
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.R5JA8hQ-YHUPeMQG2i4e3wvYf7E8_uMWzWKN7J9jhNs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=186770615)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a557d2fe-407b-4ff0-8f63-b80e9f86c97a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Fourth Amendment states in plain English that the government may not search or seize without a warrant issued by a neutral magistrate. It was written by our nation's founders - people who had experienced firsthand the charms of having British agents, on behalf of King George the third, kicking in doors based on vague suspicions. The colonists found these encounters repugnant. The 4th amendment was their way of saying: never again. ICE's memo is the modern Trump reply: just watch us.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a557d2fe-407b-4ff0-8f63-b80e9f86c97a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The administration's defenders insist this is all perfectly legal. The ICE agents, they say, carry "administrative warrants." These are documents produced by Trump's executive branch, approved by Trump's executive branch, and executed by Trump's executive branch. The neutral judge, part of that meddlesome judicial branch, is removed entirely. It amounts to government by self-approval, a system that would delight every petty despot from Julius Caesar to that narcissistic night manager at the local shopping mall.
To be clear, the controversy here is not about whether the Trump administration or any other should enforce immigration law. The United States, like all nations, has the sovereign right to enforce its borders and ensure compliance with immigration rules. But enforcement must proceed within the bounds of the U.S. Constitution.
* * *
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=186770615&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NzcwNjE1LCJpYXQiOjE3NzAxNjQ2NDEsImV4cCI6MTc3Mjc1NjY0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GJ3YhxurZqqXFTkL3QbfetQccGjxpjkeWtrhqRaoK7o)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a557d2fe-407b-4ff0-8f63-b80e9f86c97a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Trump team distinction between a real warrant and an administrative one is not legal hair-splitting. It is huge. A judicial warrant is an interruption. It forces the government to explain itself to someone who does not take orders from it. An administrative warrant is a permission slip the government writes to itself, like a child excusing his or her own absence from school. The fact that such a document is now offered as justification for forced entry into a home tells you everything you need to know about the Trump administration's view of constitutional limits: the limits are optional, situational, and are best handled internally.
Naturally, the Trump goons are claiming this new policy is necessary. Immigration enforcement, they insist, requires speed, surprise, and force. If only we remove this one pesky safeguard, says MAGA world, order will finally reign. It is the same argument that has justified every overreach since governments were invented. And it's been wrong every time.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a557d2fe-407b-4ff0-8f63-b80e9f86c97a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Under Trump, what is most revealing now is not the brutality of the policy but its smugness. There is no apology and no acknowledgment or regret that something precious is being taken away, The memo treats warrantless entry as a minor procedural tweak, like changing office hours. The casualness is remarkable. It assumes that members of the public are so exhausted, distracted, or fearful that we will accept, as our new normal, armed agents entering our homes without a judge's say-so.
Mark my words: This new Trump policy will not remain confined to immigration related raids. Once the principle is established that the executive branch may decide, on its own, when homes may be entered by force, the precedent will be set. Today the Trump administration agents will target undocumented migrants. Tomorrow, the Trump fascists will target anyone inconvenient enough to fall within the expanding MAGA definition of "enforcement necessity." Journalists? Observers? Political opponents? Uppity citizens? Watch out.
* * *
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=186770615&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NzcwNjE1LCJpYXQiOjE3NzAxNjQ2NDEsImV4cCI6MTc3Mjc1NjY0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GJ3YhxurZqqXFTkL3QbfetQccGjxpjkeWtrhqRaoK7o&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a557d2fe-407b-4ff0-8f63-b80e9f86c97a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Also, there is the matter of human reality. Homes are not abstractions. They contain families, children, the elderly, and the innocent. They are places of sleep, argument, refuge, and dignity. Authorizing a home invasion without independent oversight is trading a constitutional right for a third-world police tactic. This is not law enforcement. It is a declaration that the Trump team's convenience outweighs everybody's personal security or liberty.
In response to the ICE memo and aggressive new tactics, lawmakers have already begun to argue and posture. Many democrats and a few republicans are speaking out against the latest Trump erosion of our constitutional rights. But in our divided Congress, there will be no true oversight of the Trump administration. So, at some point, the courts will be asked to intervene and clean up the mess. Inevitably, the courts will rule in favor of the Constitution and demand that ICE stop the administrative warrant-based raids and require judicial warrants instead. But by then, a lot of people apprehended will have already been disappeared.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a557d2fe-407b-4ff0-8f63-b80e9f86c97a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the meantime, the administration continues to test how much constitutional rot the public is willing to tolerate. This has become the defining experiment of the Trump era: whether the Constitution can survive the tyrannical ambitions of Donald Trump, J.D. Vance, and Stephen Miller.
This episode should serve as a wake-up call. Whether you agree or disagree with the Trump administration's immigration goals, no administration -- Republican or Democrat -- should be allowed to reinterpret the Constitution unilaterally.
If the Fourth Amendment can be waved aside by a memo, then it is no longer a constitutional right but a suggestion. And a nation that treats its fundamental protections as optional paperwork should not be surprised when the knock on the door for any of us comes without warning--and without a judge's warrant.

Team,

Tom is guided by his principles, not by big donors.

He has _**never**_ taken corporate PAC money, and never will. As a Congressman, he pushed for stronger ethics rules and banned stock trading by members of Congress, and put his own assets in a blind trust so he could focus on the job without conflicts.

That’s not popular with everyone in Washington, but it’s the right thing to do. **That’s who Tom is.**

[That’s the kind of leader we need for New Jersey. As a Congressman, he pushed for stronger ethics rules and banned stock trading by members of Congress, and put his own assets in a blind trust so he could focus on the job without conflicts. That’s not popular with everyone in Washington, but it’s the right thing to do. name: From President Trump
subject: I saved YOU a spot right next to me!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I’m sitting in front of the Oval Office
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
|
---
I had a critical meeting with my Trump Advisory Board.
Your seat was there.
But it was empty.
[READ TRUMP MEMO:](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
I saved **YOU** a spot right next to me because last year, you weren’t just on the roster. You were one of the **_most active patriots_** on my board. Tremendous work.
I couldn’t figure out why you hadn't advised me all of January...then it hit me. I forgot to send your renewal paperwork!
HOLY SMOKES, I’M SORRY!
I told my team: __“Do whatever it takes. Get this patriot BACK on the board!”__ All spots were taken. IMPOSSIBLE, they said. But they pulled it off.
Now here’s the deal of the century:

**__[YOU’VE GOT UNTIL MIDNIGHT TONIGHT](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)__**
[CLAIM YOUR SEAT ON MY TRUMP ADVISORY BOARD](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
I know how much you care.
I can’t wait to have you back on the team!
\- DJT

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: A Really GOOD Problem
body:
Over the last year at Sheridan.Church, we have had a REALLY GOOD PROBLEM... Every Sunday has been packed and we have simply ran out of space. We are
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27735152.14353.1.6ccc09816f1b17390807ee69f092d177) |
---
Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27735152.14354.1.aca96af374708329d225edcf343712c8), we have had a **REALLY GOOD PROBLEM**... Every Sunday has been _packed_ and we have simply ran out of space. We are grateful that God has blessed our church with great growth in such a short time. It was a little over 2 years ago that we bought the **Caravan Nightclub** and with your help transformed it into a beautiful church. However, we have to make a change. We are expanding the size of our auditorium to add several hundred more seats by removing the west wall of the auditorium! This is also going to be a great benefit for all the special events that we host such as bringing in **Donald Trump Jr**., **Eric & Lara Trump**, **Tim Tebow** , **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** and all the others. We as a church do things on a cash basis. God has provided every resource we have needed up to this point to take an old nightclub and make it into a church such as the outside of the building that we did this last year along with a new parking lot. Every project from start to finish has been paid for with cash! Not only are we expanding the size of the auditrouim but we are also doing a complete makeover of the auditorium. Instead of all black walls, we will have a beautiful soft white interior with real cedar wood columns spread throughout. Below you can view the mockups of what the auditorium will soon look like. I am sending this out to ask you to consider parenting with us to complete this project. This project of expanding and redoing the auditorium will cost us around $33,600. See breakdown of the project here:
---
|
---
I have discovered if a lot of people will give a little bit that it adds up to a whole lot. Please consider giving to this project at Sheridan to help us solve a good problem by visiting: [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27735152.14355.1.aa135f954425daf82643f92a509fa562) Thank you Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
